exampleTranslation: 請將 USB 隨身碟插入電腦以傳輸檔案。

meaning: 在...內部；在...裡面
exampleSentence: Please leave the report inside the designated folder.
exampleTranslation: 請將報告放在指定的資料夾裡。

meaning: 內部人士；知情者；內部消息
exampleSentence: The CEO was accused of insider trading after selling a large number of shares before the bad news was announced.
exampleTranslation: 執行長被指控在壞消息公布前出售大量股票，涉嫌內部交易。

meaning: 洞察力；深刻的理解或見解，尤其是在商業或分析情境中。
exampleSentence: The market research provided valuable insights into consumer behavior.
exampleTranslation: 市場調查提供了關於消費者行為的寶貴洞察。

meaning: 洞察力；深刻見解（通常指透過分析數據或觀察得出的結論，用於改善決策或策略）
exampleSentence: The market research provided valuable insights into consumer behavior.
exampleTranslation: 市場調查提供了關於消費者行為的寶貴洞察。

meaning: 堅持、堅決要求
exampleSentence: The supplier insists on receiving payment within 30 days.
exampleTranslation: 供應商堅持要求在 30 天內收到付款。

meaning: 堅持不懈的；持續要求的
exampleSentence: The client was insistent on seeing the project manager directly.
exampleTranslation: 客戶堅持要直接見項目經理。

meaning: 堅持；主張（某事），強烈要求
exampleSentence: The supplier insists on receiving payment within 30 days of the invoice date.
exampleTranslation: 供應商堅持在發票日期後的 30 天內收到付款。

meaning: 無力清償債務的；資不抵債的
exampleSentence: The company declared bankruptcy after becoming insolvent due to declining sales.
exampleTranslation: 由於銷售額下降，該公司無力清償債務，最終宣布破產。

meaning: 失眠症；無法入睡或維持睡眠的狀態，影響工作效率和健康。
exampleSentence: The employee's insomnia has significantly impacted his productivity and attendance.
exampleTranslation: 這位員工的失眠症嚴重影響了他的工作效率和出勤率。

meaning: 仔細檢查；檢驗；審查
exampleSentence: The quality control department will inspect all incoming shipments before they are stored.
exampleTranslation: 品質管制部門會在將貨物存儲之前，仔細檢查所有進貨貨物。

meaning: 檢查；檢驗；審查（通常指對產品、流程或文件進行系統性的檢查以確保符合標準或規範）
exampleSentence: The quality control department conducts a thorough inspection of all incoming materials.
exampleTranslation: 品質管制部門對所有進貨材料進行徹底的檢查。

meaning: 檢查員；監管員，指負責檢查、審查或評估某項工作、產品或流程的人員。
exampleSentence: The quality control inspector thoroughly examined the shipment before it was released to the customer.
exampleTranslation: 品質控制檢查員在將貨物交付客戶之前，仔細檢查了這批貨。

meaning: 靈感；啟發；鼓舞
exampleSentence: The team found inspiration in the CEO's vision for the company's future.
exampleTranslation: 團隊從執行長對公司未來願景的描述中獲得了靈感。

meaning: 激發（靈感、動力、熱情等），鼓舞
exampleSentence: The CEO's vision inspired the entire team to work harder and achieve their goals.
exampleTranslation: 執行長(CEO)的願景激勵了整個團隊更加努力並實現他們的目標。

meaning: 受到…啟發；鼓舞；激發靈感
exampleSentence: The team's innovative ideas were inspired by the latest market trends.
exampleTranslation: 團隊的創新想法受到最新市場趨勢的啟發。

meaning: 鼓舞人心的；激勵士氣的，使人充滿熱情和動力。
exampleSentence: The CEO's inspiring speech motivated the entire team to work harder.
exampleTranslation: 執行長鼓舞人心的演講激勵了整個團隊更加努力工作。

meaning: 不穩定性；缺乏穩固性，可能導致風險或變動。
exampleSentence: The company's stock price is facing instability due to the ongoing trade war.
exampleTranslation: 由於持續的貿易戰，該公司的股票價格正處於不穩定狀態。

meaning: 安裝；設置（軟體、設備等）
exampleSentence: The IT department will install the new software on all employee computers by the end of the week.
exampleTranslation: 資訊部門將在週末前在所有員工電腦上安裝新的軟體。

meaning: 安裝；設置；裝置
exampleSentence: The IT department is responsible for the installation of new software on all company computers.
exampleTranslation: 資訊部門負責在所有公司電腦上安裝新的軟體。

meaning: 安裝；設置（軟體、設備等）
exampleSentence: The IT department has installed the new software on all company computers.
exampleTranslation: 資訊部門已在所有公司電腦上安裝了新軟體。

meaning: 安裝；設置（軟體、硬體等）
exampleSentence: The IT department is currently installing the new software update on all company computers.
exampleTranslation: 資訊部門目前正在所有公司電腦上安裝新的軟體更新。

meaning: 分期付款；各期金錢
exampleSentence: The company offers a payment plan with three monthly installments.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供分期付款計畫，包含三個每月一期的付款。

meaning: 實例；一例，藉以說明或證明的事例
exampleSentence: For instance, the new software significantly improved the team's productivity.
exampleTranslation: 例如，新軟體顯著提升了團隊的生產力。

meaning: 立即的；瞬間的；即時的
exampleSentence: The company needs an instant solution to the software bug.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要對軟體錯誤立即解決方案。

meaning: 立即地；瞬間地
exampleSentence: The system updated instantly after the software installation.
exampleTranslation: 軟體安裝後，系統立即更新。

meaning: 代替；取而代之；反而
exampleSentence: Due to unforeseen circumstances, we will use a different vendor instead.
exampleTranslation: 由於突發狀況，我們將改用不同的供應商。

meaning: 代替；取而代之；與...相比
exampleSentence: Instead of sending a physical document, we will email it to you.
exampleTranslation: 我們將會以電子郵件寄送文件，而不是寄送實體文件。

meaning: 本能；直覺；天性
exampleSentence: Her first instinct was to check her phone when she heard the notification.
exampleTranslation: 她聽到通知後的第一個本能反應是查看手機。

meaning: 憑直覺的；本能的，不經過思考或分析就產生的反應或行為。
exampleSentence: The manager made an instinctive decision to postpone the project due to the unexpected market downturn.
exampleTranslation: 由於市場出現意料之外的下滑，經理憑直覺決定延遲該項目。

meaning: 機構；設立（某事物）；學院
exampleSentence: The company plans to institute a new training program to improve employee skills.
exampleTranslation: 公司計畫設立一個新的培訓計畫，以提升員工技能。

meaning: 機構；組織（通常指教育、慈善、金融等具有特定目的的正式組織）
exampleSentence: The company is committed to providing equal opportunities for all applicants, regardless of their affiliation with any institution.
exampleTranslation: 公司致力於為所有申請人提供平等機會，無論他們與任何機構的關係如何。

meaning: 機構的；制度上的；習以為常的
exampleSentence: The company secured significant institutional investment for its expansion plans.
exampleTranslation: 該公司為其擴張計畫獲得了大量的機構投資。

meaning: 指導；指示；教導（通常指正式的指示或教學）
exampleSentence: The supervisor instructed the new employees on the company's safety procedures.
exampleTranslation: 主管指示新進員工遵守公司的安全程序。

meaning: 指示；指導；命令（通常指正式的指示或命令）
exampleSentence: The manager instructed the team to prioritize the urgent tasks.
exampleTranslation: 經理指示團隊優先處理緊急任務。

meaning: 指示；指導；說明（通常指書面或口頭的說明）
exampleSentence: Please follow the instructions carefully to assemble the product.
exampleTranslation: 請仔細按照說明書組裝產品。

meaning: 指示；指導；說明（通常指書面或口頭的步驟或程序）
exampleSentence: Please read the instructions carefully before assembling the new equipment.
exampleTranslation: 請在組裝新設備之前仔細閱讀說明。

meaning: 指導者；教練（通常指專業領域的指導者，例如飛行教練、駕駛教練等）
exampleSentence: The company is looking for experienced instructors to train new employees.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在尋找有經驗的教練來培訓新員工。

meaning: 指導者；教練（通常指在專業或技能培訓領域的指導者）
exampleSentence: The company hired several instructors to train new employees on the software.
exampleTranslation: 公司聘請了幾位指導者，為新員工培訓軟體操作。

meaning: 工具、儀器；（音樂）樂器
exampleSentence: The IT department needs to calibrate the testing instruments before running the quality assurance checks.
exampleTranslation: IT部門需要在進行品質保證檢查之前校準測試儀器。

meaning: 在達成目標或解決問題方面起關鍵作用的；至關重要的。
exampleSentence: Effective communication is instrumental in ensuring a smooth project launch.
exampleTranslation: 有效的溝通對於確保專案順利啟動至關重要。

meaning: 工具、儀器（通常指用於工作或測量的設備）
exampleSentence: The company invested in new testing instruments to ensure product quality.
exampleTranslation: 公司投資了新的測試儀器以確保產品品質。

meaning: 不足夠的；不勝需求的
exampleSentence: The company's budget was insufficient to cover all the project expenses.
exampleTranslation: 公司的預算不足以涵蓋所有專案費用。

meaning: 隔熱材料；隔絕
exampleSentence: The company is investing in improved insulation to reduce energy consumption and lower operating costs.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在投資更好的隔熱材料，以減少能源消耗並降低營運成本。

meaning: 胰島素
exampleSentence: People with diabetes often need to inject insulin to control their blood sugar levels.
exampleTranslation: 糖尿病患者通常需要注射胰島素來控制血糖水平。

meaning: 冒犯；侮辱； оскорбление
exampleSentence: The manager warned the employee that making sarcastic remarks could be considered an insult to colleagues.
exampleTranslation: 經理警告員工，發表諷刺性言論可能會被視為對同事的侮辱。

meaning: 保險；保險金
exampleSentence: The company offers comprehensive insurance coverage for its employees.
exampleTranslation: 該公司為員工提供全面的保險保障。

meaning: 為...投保；確保...
exampleSentence: The company requires all employees to insure their vehicles before using them for business travel.
exampleTranslation: 公司要求所有員工在將其車輛用於商務差旅前都必須投保。

meaning: 保險公司；承保人
exampleSentence: The insurer will cover the damages to your car.
exampleTranslation: 保險公司將賠償您汽車的損壞。

meaning: 叛亂; 暴動; 叛亂活動
exampleSentence: The government has struggled to contain the growing insurgency in the southern provinces.
exampleTranslation: 政府一直在努力遏制南部省份日益壯大的叛亂活動。

meaning: 叛亂分子；起義者；暴動者 (n.)；叛亂的；起義的 (adj.)
exampleSentence: The government launched a major operation to suppress the insurgent groups in the region.
exampleTranslation: 政府發動了一項大規模行動，以鎮壓該地區的叛亂團體。

meaning: （指）攝取量；（指）收入、進口量
exampleSentence: The company is increasing its intake of raw materials to meet the rising demand.
exampleTranslation: 為了滿足不斷上升的需求，公司正在增加原材料的採購量。

meaning: 無形的；觸摸不到的；無形資產
exampleSentence: Brand reputation is an intangible asset that significantly impacts a company's value.
exampleTranslation: 品牌聲譽是一種無形資產，對公司的價值有重大影響。

meaning: 構成整體所必需的；不可或缺的；積分 (數學術語)
exampleSentence: Effective communication is an integral part of a successful team.
exampleTranslation: 有效的溝通是成功團隊不可或缺的一部分。

meaning: 整合；將...融入
exampleSentence: The company aims to integrate the new software into its existing systems.
exampleTranslation: 公司旨在將新的軟體整合到現有的系統中。

meaning: 整合的；將…結合的；（系統、功能等）整合的
exampleSentence: The company's new software is fully integrated with our existing systems.
exampleTranslation: 公司的全新軟體已完全整合到我們現有的系統中。

meaning: 整合；融合
exampleSentence: The department implemented innovative integration procedures to improve operational efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 部門實施創新的integration程序以提高營運效率。

meaning: 誠信；完整
exampleSentence: The department implemented innovative integrity procedures to improve operational efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 部門實施創新的integrity程序以提高營運效率。

meaning: 智力的；聰明的；知識分子
exampleSentence: She is known for her impressive intellectual abilities.
exampleTranslation: 她以其令人印象深刻的智力而聞名。

meaning: 智力財產，指由人類智慧創作的各種形式的成果，例如發明、文學、藝術作品、設計等，並受到法律保護。
exampleSentence: Protecting our intellectual property is crucial for maintaining a competitive advantage in the market.
exampleTranslation: 保護我們的智力財產對於在市場上維持競爭優勢至關重要。

meaning: 智力、聰明才智，尤其指解決問題和學習的能力。
exampleSentence: The company values employees with high emotional intelligence and strong problem-solving skills.
exampleTranslation: 公司重視具備高情商和強大問題解決能力的員工。

meaning: 聰明的；有智慧的；理解能力強的
exampleSentence: The company seeks intelligent and motivated candidates for the project management role.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在尋找聰明且有動機的候選人擔任專案管理職位。

meaning: 打算、意圖，表示計畫或目標
exampleSentence: The company intends to expand its operations into the Asian market next year.
exampleTranslation: 公司計畫明年將業務拓展至亞洲市場。

meaning: 預期的；打算的；旨在...
exampleSentence: The meeting was intended to discuss the new marketing strategy.
exampleTranslation: 這場會議旨在討論新的行銷策略。

meaning: 預期收件人；郵件或訊息的目標對象
exampleSentence: Please double-check the email address to ensure it reaches the intended recipient.
exampleTranslation: 請仔細核對電子郵件地址，以確保郵件能送達預期收件人。

meaning: 強烈的；劇烈的；高度的（程度）
exampleSentence: The project deadline is approaching, so we need to work with intense focus.
exampleTranslation: 專案截止日期即將到來，我們需要以高度的專注力工作。

meaning: 加強、加劇、變得更加強烈
exampleSentence: The competition in the market intensifies as new companies enter the field.
exampleTranslation: 隨著新公司進入市場，競爭正在加劇。

meaning: 加強、加劇（程度、強度等）
exampleSentence: The company is intensifying its marketing efforts to boost sales during the holiday season.
exampleTranslation: 為了在節假日期間提升銷售額，公司正在加強其行銷力度。

meaning: 強度；劇烈程度；熱烈
exampleSentence: The intensity of the light diminished as the sun set.
exampleTranslation: 隨著太陽西下，光的強度減弱了。

meaning: 強烈的；集中的；密集的（指投入大量資源或時間以達到特定目標）
exampleSentence: The company is offering an intensive training program for new employees.
exampleTranslation: 該公司為新進員工提供一項密集培訓計畫。

meaning: 意圖；目的；打算
exampleSentence: The company's intent is to expand its market share in Asia.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的意圖是擴大其在亞洲的市場份額。

meaning: 意圖；目的
exampleSentence: The department implemented innovative intention procedures to improve operational efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 部門實施創新的intention程序以提高營運效率。

meaning: 故意地；蓄意地
exampleSentence: The company released the software update intentionally to address the security vulnerability.
exampleTranslation: 公司故意發布軟體更新以解決安全漏洞。

meaning: 意圖；計畫；目的
exampleSentence: The company's intentions are to expand its market share in Asia.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的意圖是擴大在亞洲的市場份額。

meaning: 專注地；全神貫注地
exampleSentence: The manager listened intently to the employee's explanation of the project delays.
exampleTranslation: 經理專注地聽取了員工對專案延遲的解釋。

meaning: 埋葬；安葬
exampleSentence: The remains of the ancient king were interred in a grand tomb.
exampleTranslation: 這位古代國王的遺骸被安葬在一座宏偉的陵墓中。

meaning: 部門間的；跨部門的
exampleSentence: The project requires close inter-department collaboration to ensure a smooth workflow.
exampleTranslation: 這個專案需要部門間緊密的合作，以確保工作流程順暢。

meaning: 互動；彼此影響或作用
exampleSentence: The software allows users to interact with the data in a more intuitive way.
exampleTranslation: 這款軟體讓使用者能夠以更直觀的方式與數據互動。

meaning: 互動；相互作用，尤其指透過溝通或交流產生的影響。
exampleSentence: Effective team interaction is crucial for project success.
exampleTranslation: 有效的團隊互動對於專案成功至關重要。

meaning: 互動的；能與使用者產生反應的，通常指數位內容或系統。
exampleSentence: The company is developing an interactive training module to improve employee engagement.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在開發一個互動式訓練模組，以提高員工參與度。

meaning: 攔截；阻止；中斷（通訊、信號等）
exampleSentence: The firewall intercepted a malicious email attempting to access our network.
exampleTranslation: 防火牆攔截了一封試圖存取我們網路的惡意郵件。

meaning: 利息；興趣；關注；關心
exampleSentence: The bank charges interest on overdue accounts.
exampleTranslation: 銀行對逾期帳戶收取利息。

meaning: 感興趣的；對...有興趣的
exampleSentence: I am very interested in the proposal for the new marketing campaign.
exampleTranslation: 我對新的行銷活動提案非常感興趣。

meaning: 引起興趣或令人好奇的；引人入勝的
exampleSentence: The presentation included interesting data on market trends.
exampleTranslation: 這場簡報包含關於市場趨勢的有趣數據。

meaning: 令人感興趣地；有趣地
exampleSentence: Interestingly, the new proposal received more support than we expected.
exampleTranslation: 有趣的是，這項新提案獲得了比我們預期更多的支持。

meaning: 興趣、關注點（尤指商業或專業領域）
exampleSentence: The company is exploring new markets to broaden its interests.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在探索新的市場以擴展其業務範圍。

meaning: 介面；連接點（通常指系統、軟體或硬體之間的交互點，用於數據或指令的傳輸）
exampleSentence: The software's user interface is designed to be intuitive and easy to navigate.
exampleTranslation: 該軟體的用戶介面設計直觀且易於導航。

meaning: 干擾；妨礙；影響
exampleSentence: The construction noise interfered with our conference call.
exampleTranslation: 施工噪音干擾了我們的視訊會議。

meaning: 干擾、妨礙（某事物正常進行）
exampleSentence: The construction noise is interfering with our ability to concentrate on the project.
exampleTranslation: 施工噪音正在妨礙我們專注於專案。

meaning: 干擾；妨礙；介入
exampleSentence: We are experiencing some signal interference, which is affecting the call quality.
exampleTranslation: 我們正遭遇一些訊號干擾，這影響了通話品質。

meaning: 暫時的；過渡期的
exampleSentence: The interim manager will oversee the project until a permanent replacement is found.
exampleTranslation: 在找到永久替代者之前，臨時經理將負責監督這個項目。

meaning: 內部空間；內裝；內部事務
exampleSentence: The company is renovating the interior of the office to create a more modern workspace.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在翻新辦公室的內部裝潢，以打造更現代化的工作空間。

meaning: 交織; 使交錯; 編織
exampleSentence: The branches of the trees interlace above the path, forming a natural archway.
exampleTranslation: 樹木的枝條在小徑上方交織，形成了一個天然的拱門。

meaning: 仲介；中間人；調解人
exampleSentence: The bank acts as an intermediary between the buyer and the seller.
exampleTranslation: 銀行充當買方與賣方之間的仲介。

meaning: 中級的；介於初級和高級之間
exampleSentence: This training program is designed for employees with an intermediate level of English proficiency.
exampleTranslation: 這項培訓課程是為英語中級程度的員工設計的。

meaning: （演出、會議等）中場休息時間；幕間休息
exampleSentence: The conference will have a 15-minute intermission between each session.
exampleTranslation: 本次會議在每個環節之間將會有 15 分鐘的中場休息時間。

meaning: 不時地；間歇性地
exampleSentence: The internet connection was intermittent during the video conference, causing disruptions.
exampleTranslation: 視訊會議期間，網路連線不穩定，造成中斷。

meaning: 實習生；短期實習者，通常是大學或學院學生，在公司或機構從事短期工作以獲取工作經驗。
exampleSentence: The company offers internships to recent graduates to help them gain practical experience.
exampleTranslation: 該公司提供實習機會給剛畢業的學生，以幫助他們獲得實際工作經驗。

meaning: 內部的；公司內部的；私人的
exampleSentence: The company's internal policies regarding remote work are outlined in the employee handbook.
exampleTranslation: 關於遠端工作的公司內部政策已在員工手冊中說明。

meaning: 在內部地；內在地；由內部產生地
exampleSentence: The company decided to promote from within, hiring a new manager internally.
exampleTranslation: 公司決定從內部晉升，在內部招聘了一位新經理。

meaning: 國際的；全球性的，指涉及多個國家或地區的。
exampleSentence: Our company is expanding its operations to become an international business.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在擴展業務，以成為一家國際企業。

meaning: 在國際上；國際地
exampleSentence: The company is expanding its operations internationally.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在國際擴展其業務。

meaning: 互聯網，全球性的電腦網路系統，用於傳輸和獲取資訊。
exampleSentence: Our company is investing heavily in improving its online presence on the internet.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在大力投資於提升其在互聯網上的線上形象。

meaning: 實習，為期有限的時間，通常在公司或機構中，以獲取工作經驗。
exampleSentence: Many students seek internships to gain practical experience in their chosen field.
exampleTranslation: 許多學生尋找實習機會，以在他們選擇的領域獲得實際經驗。

meaning: 人際互動技巧，指在工作環境中有效溝通、合作和建立關係的能力。
exampleSentence: Strong interpersonal skills are essential for a team leader to motivate and guide their team members.
exampleTranslation: 強大的人際互動技巧對於團隊領導者來說，激勵和指導團隊成員至關重要。

meaning: 解讀；詮釋（通常指分析並理解複雜資訊，並給予意義）
exampleSentence: The translator needs to accurately interpret the contract terms for the legal team.
exampleTranslation: 翻譯人員需要為法律團隊準確地解讀合約條款。

meaning: 詮釋；解釋（尤指對文件、數據或行為的理解）
exampleSentence: The legal team needs a precise interpretation of the contract to avoid any disputes.
exampleTranslation: 法律團隊需要對合約進行精確的詮釋，以避免任何爭議。

meaning: 翻譯者，口譯員
exampleSentence: The company hired an interpreter to facilitate communication with their international clients.
exampleTranslation: 公司聘請了一名口譯員，以促進與國際客戶的溝通。

meaning: 口譯；將一種語言轉換成另一種語言的過程，通常在口頭交流中。
exampleSentence: The conference requires a skilled interpreter to facilitate communication between speakers and the audience.
exampleTranslation: 本次會議需要一位熟練的口譯員來促進演講者與聽眾之間的溝通。

meaning: 中斷；打斷；暫停
exampleSentence: I'm sorry to interrupt, but could you please clarify the deadline for this project?
exampleTranslation: 不好意思打斷一下，請問您能請您釐清這個專案的截止日期嗎？

meaning: 中斷；暫停，尤指在進行中時發生的短暫停止。
exampleSentence: I apologize for the interruption, but I need to confirm a few details with my colleague.
exampleTranslation: 我很抱歉打斷您，但我需要和同事確認幾個細節。

meaning: 路口；交叉路口
exampleSentence: Due to road construction, the intersection will be closed to traffic for two days.
exampleTranslation: 由於道路施工，該路口將在兩天內對交通關閉。

meaning: 間隔；休息
exampleSentence: The department implemented innovative interval procedures to improve operational efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 部門實施創新的interval程序以提高營運效率。

meaning: 干預；調停；介入
exampleSentence: The government refused to intervene in the dispute between the two companies.
exampleTranslation: 政府拒絕干預這兩家公司之間的爭議。

meaning: （尤指為解決問題或改善情況）介入；干預
exampleSentence: The manager's intervention resolved the conflict between the two employees.
exampleTranslation: 經理的介入解決了這兩位員工之間的衝突。

meaning: 面試；訪談（通常指工作或學術機會）
exampleSentence: The HR department is scheduling interviews for the marketing manager position.
exampleTranslation: 人資部門正在為行銷經理職位安排面試。

meaning: 面試；被面試
exampleSentence: The candidate was interviewed by the hiring manager last week.
exampleTranslation: 候選人上週被面試主管面試了。

meaning: 面試者；受訪者（指接受面試或採訪的人）
exampleSentence: The HR manager scheduled interviews with several qualified interviewees.
exampleTranslation: 人事經理排定了與幾位合格的面試者進行面試。

meaning: 面試官；面試者
exampleSentence: The interviewer asked several questions about my previous work experience.
exampleTranslation: 面試官問了我幾個關於我之前工作經驗的問題。

meaning: 面試官；面試者（複數）
exampleSentence: The HR department is scheduling interviews with potential candidates next week.
exampleTranslation: 人資部門下週將安排與潛在候選人的面試。

meaning: 面試；面談（通常指工作或職位相關）
exampleSentence: The HR department is currently interviewing candidates for the marketing manager position.
exampleTranslation: 人資部門目前正在面試市場經理職位的候選人。

meaning: 面試；面談（通常指正式的求職面試或商務面談）
exampleSentence: The HR department is scheduling interviews for next week.
exampleTranslation: 人資部門正在為下週安排面試。

meaning: 恐嚇、威脅（使某人感到害怕或不安，通常藉由強勢的行為或言辭），使人退縮。
exampleSentence: The aggressive tone of the email intimidated the junior staff member.
exampleTranslation: 這封郵件的強硬語氣讓初級員工感到畏懼。

meaning: 進入...裡面；對...感興趣；變成...
exampleSentence: She walked into the office early this morning.
exampleTranslation: 她今天早上很早就走進辦公室了。

meaning: 語調；聲調；語音高低
exampleSentence: Her intonation rose at the end of the sentence, making it sound like a question.
exampleTranslation: 她句尾的語調上揚，讓這句話聽起來像個問題。

meaning: 引起興趣；激發好奇心；密謀；詭計
exampleSentence: The proposal's innovative approach really intrigued the investors.
exampleTranslation: 該提案的創新方法確實引起了投資者的興趣。

meaning: 引人入勝的；吸引人的；令人好奇的
exampleSentence: The presentation included an intriguing proposal for expanding into the Asian market.
exampleTranslation: 該簡報包含了一個關於擴展至亞洲市場的引人入勝的提案。

meaning: 引人入勝地；令人著迷地，通常指某事物以一種吸引人的方式呈現。
exampleSentence: The presentation was intriguingly designed to capture the audience's attention.
exampleTranslation: 簡報設計引人入勝，旨在吸引聽眾的注意力。

meaning: 固有的; 內在的; 本質的
exampleSentence: The intrinsic value of the antique cannot be determined solely by its market price.
exampleTranslation: 這古董的內在價值不能僅憑其市場價格來決定。

meaning: 介紹；引見；呈現
exampleSentence: Let me introduce Mr. Lee, our new marketing director.
exampleTranslation: 讓我向大家介紹李先生，他是我們的新營銷主管。

meaning: 介紹；引進；呈現
exampleSentence: The CEO introduced the new marketing strategy to the board of directors.
exampleTranslation: 執行長向董事會介紹了新的行銷策略。

meaning: 介紹；引導；呈現
exampleSentence: The speaker began by introducing the company's new product line.
exampleTranslation: 演講者首先介紹了公司的新產品線。

meaning: 介紹；導言；初步說明
exampleSentence: The speaker began his presentation with a brief introduction of the company's history.
exampleTranslation: 這位演講者以簡短的公司歷史介紹開始了他的簡報。

meaning: 介紹性的；入門的；開場的
exampleSentence: The introductory chapter provides an overview of the book's topics.
exampleTranslation: 導論章節概述了本書的主題。

meaning: 直覺
exampleSentence: She had a strong intuition that something was wrong.
exampleTranslation: 她有種強烈的直覺，覺得事情不對勁。

meaning: 憑直覺地；不需經過深思熟慮地
exampleSentence: The project manager intuitively knew that the new strategy would be successful.
exampleTranslation: 專案經理憑直覺知道新的策略會成功。

meaning: 入侵；（軍事上）侵略；（比喻）滲透
exampleSentence: The company's marketing strategy was designed to invade the competitor's market share.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的行銷策略旨在侵蝕競爭對手的市場佔有率。

meaning: 無效的；無效的資料或文件
exampleSentence: The system flagged the invoice as invalid due to a missing account number.
exampleTranslation: 由於缺少帳戶號碼，系統將該發票標記為無效。

meaning: 無價的；極其寶貴的，無法估量的價值
exampleSentence: The market research data proved invaluable in developing our new product strategy.
exampleTranslation: 市場調查數據對我們制定新的產品策略來說極其寶貴。

meaning: 入侵；侵略；侵犯；侵擾
exampleSentence: The invasion of privacy is a serious concern in the digital age.
exampleTranslation: 在數位時代，侵犯隱私是一個嚴重的問題。

meaning: 創造、發明（新產品、方法或解決方案）
exampleSentence: Our R&D department is constantly working to invent new products to stay ahead of the competition.
exampleTranslation: 我們的研發部門不斷努力發明新產品，以保持競爭優勢。

meaning: 發明；創造（新產品、方法或概念）
exampleSentence: Our R&D department invented a revolutionary new software to streamline the workflow.
exampleTranslation: 我們的研發部門發明了一款革命性的新軟體，以簡化工作流程。

meaning: 發明；創造
exampleSentence: The department implemented innovative invention procedures to improve operational efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 部門實施創新的invention程序以提高營運效率。

meaning: 庫存；存貨（指公司擁有的商品或材料）
exampleSentence: The company needs to take a complete inventory of its warehouse to assess current stock levels.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要對倉庫進行全面庫存盤點，以評估目前的庫存水平。

meaning: 倒置；倒轉；顛倒；反轉
exampleSentence: In some languages, an inversion of the subject and verb is common in questions.
exampleTranslation: 在某些語言中，主詞和動詞的倒置在疑問句中很常見。

meaning: 使倒轉; 使反向; 顛倒
exampleSentence: If you invert the glass, the water will spill out.
exampleTranslation: 如果你把玻璃杯倒過來，水就會灑出來。

meaning: 投資；將資金或資源投入於預期可獲得回報的項目或業務
exampleSentence: The company plans to invest $5 million in new manufacturing equipment next quarter.
exampleTranslation: 公司計畫於下季投入 500 萬美元於新製造設備。

meaning: 投入（資金、時間、精力等）；投資
exampleSentence: The company invested heavily in research and development to stay competitive.
exampleTranslation: 為了保持競爭力，該公司大量投資於研發。

meaning: 調查；審查（通常指正式或深入的調查）
exampleSentence: The company will investigate the cause of the production delay.
exampleTranslation: 公司將會調查生產延遲的原因。

meaning: 調查；審查（通常指正式或深入的調查）
exampleSentence: The internal audit department will investigate the discrepancy in the financial records.
exampleTranslation: 內部審計部門將調查財務記錄中的差異。

meaning: 調查；審查（通常指正式的、系統性的調查以查明事實或解決問題）
exampleSentence: The company launched an investigation into the data breach to determine the cause and prevent future incidents.
exampleTranslation: 該公司啟動了對資料外洩的調查，以確定原因並防止未來事件發生。

meaning: 調查員；偵查員；研究員
exampleSentence: The independent investigator was appointed to look into the allegations of fraud.
exampleTranslation: 獨立調查員被指派調查詐欺指控。

meaning: 將資金投入於資產以期望獲得未來收益的行為，通常涉及股票、債券、房地產等。
exampleSentence: The company is investing heavily in research and development to stay competitive.
exampleTranslation: 為了保持競爭力，該公司正在大力投資於研發。

meaning: 投資；將資金投入於某物以期望獲得回報。
exampleSentence: The company is considering a significant investment in renewable energy.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在考慮對再生能源進行一項重大投資。

meaning: 投資；資本投入
exampleSentence: The company is seeking new investments to expand its operations.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在尋求新的投資以擴展其業務。

meaning: 投資者，指投入資金以期望獲得回報的人或組織。
exampleSentence: The company is seeking new investors to fund its expansion plans.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在尋找新的投資者來資助其擴張計劃。

meaning: 投資者；股東，指投入資金以期獲利的人或團體。
exampleSentence: The company is seeking new investors to fund its expansion plans.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在尋找新的投資者以資助其擴張計劃。

meaning: 邀請函；邀請
exampleSentence: We received an invitation to attend the industry conference next month.
exampleTranslation: 我們收到下個月業界會議的邀請函。

meaning: 邀請函；邀請（活動或聚會）
exampleSentence: The company sent out invitations to the annual conference last week.
exampleTranslation: 公司上週發出了年度會議的邀請函。

meaning: 邀請；請求參與（活動、會議等）
exampleSentence: The company will invite key clients to the product launch event.
exampleTranslation: 公司將邀請重要客戶參加產品發布活動。

meaning: 被邀請；受到邀請
exampleSentence: Our CEO invited several key clients to the product launch event.
exampleTranslation: 我們的 CEO 邀請了幾位重要客戶參加產品發布會。

meaning: 具有吸引力，令人歡迎的；（活動、場所等）邀請性的。
exampleSentence: The company created an inviting atmosphere in the showroom to attract more customers.
exampleTranslation: 該公司在展覽廳營造了令人歡迎的氛圍，以吸引更多客戶。

meaning: 發票；付款請求書
exampleSentence: Please review the invoice and let me know if the amount is correct.
exampleTranslation: 請審閱發票，並告知我金額是否正確。

meaning: 不由自主地；非自願地
exampleSentence: He involuntarily flinched when he heard the loud noise.
exampleTranslation: 當他聽到巨大的噪音時，不由自主地畏縮了。

meaning: 包含、涉及、牽涉到
exampleSentence: This project involves a significant amount of research and development.
exampleTranslation: 這個專案牽涉到大量的研究和開發。

meaning: 參與；牽涉；包含
exampleSentence: The project manager is heavily involved in the budget negotiations.
exampleTranslation: 專案經理在預算談判中扮演著重要角色。

meaning: 參與；投入；關涉
exampleSentence: The project requires significant involvement from all department heads.
exampleTranslation: 這個專案需要所有部門主管的積極參與。

meaning: 包含；涉及；需要到...
exampleSentence: The project involves a significant investment of time and resources.
exampleTranslation: 這個專案需要投入大量的時間和資源。

meaning: 包含、涉及
exampleSentence: The project involves several departments and requires close collaboration.
exampleTranslation: 這個專案涉及多個部門，需要密切的合作。

meaning: 向內；內向的；內部
exampleSentence: The company is focusing its resources inward to improve internal efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 公司正將資源集中於內部，以提高內部效率。

meaning: 離子；電離體
exampleSentence: The technician explained that the device malfunctioned due to an ion imbalance.
exampleTranslation: 技術人員解釋說，由於離子失衡，導致設備故障。

meaning: 愛爾蘭，一個位於歐洲西部的島嶼國家，也是歐洲聯盟成員國。
exampleSentence: Our company is exploring potential business opportunities in Ireland.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在探索在愛爾蘭的潛在商機。

meaning: 源自愛爾蘭的；愛爾蘭人的；愛爾蘭風格的
exampleSentence: The company decided to incorporate some Irish charm into their new marketing campaign.
exampleTranslation: 公司決定將一些愛爾蘭風情融入他們的全新行銷活動中。

meaning: 熨斗；熨燙
exampleSentence: The hotel offers ironing services for guests who need their clothes pressed.
exampleTranslation: 飯店為需要燙衣的客人提供熨燙服務。

meaning: 諷刺的；具有反諷意味的，指語氣或情境與實際情況相反，產生幽默或批判效果。
exampleSentence: It's ironic that the company promoting eco-friendly products is facing criticism for its excessive packaging.
exampleTranslation: 諷刺的是，宣傳環保產品的公司卻因過度包裝而受到批評。

meaning: 熨燙；熨平
exampleSentence: The hotel offers ironing services for guests who need their clothes pressed.
exampleTranslation: 飯店為需要熨燙服裝的客人提供熨燙服務。

meaning: 非規則的，不規律的；不整齊的；不穩定的；不合規矩的
exampleSentence: The company announced that due to unforeseen circumstances, there would be some irregular working hours next week.
exampleTranslation: 公司宣布，由於不可預見的情況，下週將會有一些不規律的工作時間。

meaning: 不相關的；無關緊要的；與主題無關的
exampleSentence: The information about the company's history is irrelevant to this project.
exampleTranslation: 關於公司歷史的資訊與這個專案無關緊要。

meaning: 無可取代的；極其重要的，無法用其他事物替代的
exampleSentence: The company considers its experienced project managers irreplaceable assets.
exampleTranslation: 公司認為其經驗豐富的專案經理是無可取代的資產。

meaning: 不負責任的；玩忽職責的，缺乏責任感
exampleSentence: The employee's irresponsible handling of the project led to significant financial losses.
exampleTranslation: 這位員工對專案的不負責任處理導致了重大的財務損失。

meaning: 無法挽回的；無法找回的；永久喪失的
exampleSentence: The company deemed the lost data irretrievable after the system failure.
exampleTranslation: 系統故障後，公司認為丟失的數據已無法挽回。

meaning: 不可逆的；無法恢復原狀的
exampleSentence: Once the contract is signed, the agreement becomes irreversible.
exampleTranslation: 一旦簽署合約，協議將不可逆轉。

meaning: 灌溉
exampleSentence: Modern irrigation techniques help farmers save water and increase crop yields.
exampleTranslation: 現代灌溉技術有助於農民節省用水並提高作物產量。

meaning: 灌溉系統，指用於向農田或其他土地供應水資源的一系列設施和技術。
exampleSentence: The company is investing in a new irrigation system to improve crop yields and reduce water waste.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在投資新的灌溉系統，以提高作物產量並減少水資源浪費。

meaning: 激怒；使惱怒；煩擾
exampleSentence: Constant interruptions during the meeting irritated the project manager.
exampleTranslation: 會議中持續的中斷讓專案經理感到惱火。

meaning: 令人煩躁的；惱人的；激怒的（指事物或行為），通常指持續或重複的困擾。
exampleSentence: The constant buzzing of the fluorescent lights was incredibly irritating during the meeting.
exampleTranslation: 在會議中，持續不斷的熒光燈嗡嗡聲非常令人煩躁。

meaning: 島嶼，通常指被水環繞的陸地。
exampleSentence: The company is considering developing a resort on a remote island to attract tourists.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在考慮在一個偏遠的島嶼上開發度假村以吸引遊客。

meaning: 群島；島嶼（多個島嶼的集合）
exampleSentence: The company is considering expanding its resort operations to several tropical islands in the Pacific.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在考慮將度假村業務擴展到太平洋上的幾個熱帶島嶼。

meaning: 群島；島嶼（多個島嶼的集合）
exampleSentence: The company is exploring opportunities to develop eco-tourism resorts on the remote isles.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在探索在偏遠群島上發展生態旅遊度假村的機會。

meaning: 使隔離；使與外界隔絕（通常為了安全或衛生目的）
exampleSentence: Due to the outbreak, the affected area was isolated to prevent further spread.
exampleTranslation: 為了防止疫情進一步擴散，受影響的區域被隔離。

meaning: 孤立的；與外界隔絕的；獨立的（通常指位置或狀態）
exampleSentence: The remote office is isolated from the main headquarters, making frequent travel necessary.
exampleTranslation: 偏遠的辦公室與總部隔絕，需要頻繁出差。

meaning: 孤立；隔離；分離
exampleSentence: The company implemented a period of isolation for employees who were exposed to the virus.
exampleTranslation: 該公司對接觸病毒的員工實施了一段隔離期。

meaning: 發行；頒布；發出
exampleSentence: The company announced the issuance of new shares to raise capital.
exampleTranslation: 該公司宣布發行新股以籌集資金。

meaning: 問題；議題；發行（刊物、股票等）
exampleSentence: The meeting will address several key issues related to the new project.
exampleTranslation: 會議將討論與新專案相關的幾個關鍵議題。

meaning: 發行者；發行人
exampleSentence: The bond issuer is responsible for making timely interest payments.
exampleTranslation: 債券發行人負責按時支付利息。

meaning: 問題、爭議、議題（通常指需要解決或討論的複雜情況）
exampleSentence: The company is facing several key issues related to supply chain disruptions.
exampleTranslation: 公司正面臨幾個與供應鏈中斷相關的重要議題。

meaning: 源自義大利的；義大利的（人、事物、文化等）
exampleSentence: The restaurant offers authentic Italian cuisine.
exampleTranslation: 這家餐廳提供正宗的義大利料理。

meaning: 義大利，指位於歐洲南部的國家，在國際貿易和商業活動中經常被提及。
exampleSentence: Our company is exploring potential partnerships with Italian manufacturers to source high-quality leather goods.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在探索與義大利製造商建立合作夥伴關係，以採購高品質皮革產品。

meaning: 項目；物品；（清單中的）一項
exampleSentence: Please review the list of items before finalizing the purchase order.
exampleTranslation: 請在確認購買訂單之前，審閱清單中的所有項目。

meaning: 物品；貨品；（採購或庫存管理中的）項目
exampleSentence: Please review the list of items to be shipped to our overseas warehouse.
exampleTranslation: 請審閱需要運送到我們海外倉庫的物品清單。

meaning: 行程表；旅程計畫（詳細列出行程安排的時間、地點等資訊）
exampleSentence: Please review the itinerary carefully before the business trip to ensure everything is confirmed.
exampleTranslation: 請仔細審閱這次出差的行程表，以確保所有安排都已確認。

meaning: 它自己；本身
exampleSentence: The company prides itself on its innovative technology.
exampleTranslation: 這家公司以其創新的技術為傲。

meaning: （在某些地區的）雅努阿里語，一種在印度北部使用的語言。
exampleSentence: The translator needs to be fluent in Jaan to accurately convey the message to the local community.
exampleTranslation: 翻譯人員需要精通雅努阿里語，才能準確地將訊息傳達給當地社群。

meaning: 刺、戳、猛推 (v.); 猛刺、突然的一擊、注射、預防針 (n.)
exampleSentence: He jabbed the button repeatedly, but the machine wouldn't start.
exampleTranslation: 他反覆地按鈕，但機器就是不啟動。

meaning: 插座；連接器
exampleSentence: Please ensure all laptops are plugged into a power jack before leaving the conference room.
exampleTranslation: 請確保所有筆記型電腦在離開會議室前都已插上電源插座。

meaning: 外套；夾克
exampleSentence: He brought an extra jacket in case the office gets chilly.
exampleTranslation: 他帶了一件額外的外套，以防辦公室裡變得寒冷。

meaning: 大型摺疊刀；（潛水或體操的）摺疊式跳水/彎身；（尤指卡車與拖車失控時）摺疊成V形，失控打橫
exampleSentence: He carried a small jackknife in his pocket for emergencies.
exampleTranslation: 他的口袋裡放了一把小型摺疊刀以備不時之需。

meaning: 雅各布森 (Jacobson) 是一位語言學家，其理論在溝通學和翻譯領域具有重要影響。在商務情境中，通常指引用他的理論來分析溝通障礙或提升翻譯品質。
exampleSentence: The marketing team applied Jacobson's model to analyze the communication breakdown between the sales and development departments.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊運用雅各布森的模型來分析銷售部門和研發部門之間的溝通障礙。

meaning: 熱水按摩浴缸，通常指帶有水按摩功能的豪華浴缸，常設於飯店或度假村。
exampleSentence: The hotel boasts a luxurious suite with a private jacuzzi overlooking the ocean.
exampleTranslation: 這間飯店以其擁有私人按摩浴缸，可俯瞰海洋的豪華套房而聞名。

meaning: 監獄；拘留所（通常指因犯罪而關押人員的地方）
exampleSentence: The company is cooperating fully with the investigation to avoid any legal repercussions, including potential jail time for executives.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在全力配合調查，以避免任何法律後果，包括高管可能面臨的監禁。

meaning: 交通壅塞；堵塞；（機器）卡住
exampleSentence: The heavy traffic jam caused a significant delay in the delivery schedule.
exampleTranslation: 嚴重的交通堵塞導致了交貨時間的顯著延遲。

meaning: 清潔人員；保全人員（通常指負責清潔和維護辦公室或建築物的員工）
exampleSentence: The janitor is responsible for maintaining the cleanliness of the office building.
exampleTranslation: 保全人員負責維護辦公大樓的清潔。

meaning: 一月，農曆新年期間，通常是公司年度計畫審查和預算規劃的重要月份。
exampleSentence: The annual budget review will take place in January.
exampleTranslation: 年度預算審查將在元月進行。

meaning: 羅馬神話中具有兩張臉的神祇，象徵著過去與未來，常用於比喻具有雙重面向或多重功能的系統或結構。
exampleSentence: The new software system is designed as a Janus interface, allowing users to access both legacy and modern data.
exampleTranslation: 這個新的軟體系統被設計成羅馬神雅努斯式介面，讓使用者可以同時存取舊有和現代數據。

meaning: 日本，一個位於東亞的國家，在國際貿易和商業活動中經常被提及。
exampleSentence: Our company is exploring potential partnerships with businesses in Japan.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在探索與日本企業建立合作夥伴關係。

meaning: 日本的；日本人的；日本語的
exampleSentence: The company is expanding its operations into the Japanese market.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在擴展其業務到日本市場。

meaning: 賈瑞奇 (Jarecki) 是一家專注於數位資產和區塊鏈技術的顧問公司，提供策略規劃、技術評估和實施服務。
exampleSentence: Our company is considering hiring Jarecki to assess the feasibility of implementing blockchain technology.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在考慮聘請賈瑞奇來評估導入區塊鏈技術的可行性。

meaning: （虛擬）管家系統；智能助理，通常指基於人工智能的個人助理。
exampleSentence: Our company is exploring the implementation of a Jarvis system to automate routine tasks and improve efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在考慮導入 Jarvis 系統以自動化例行任務並提高效率。

meaning: （口語）含糊不清、令人困惑的說話；（比喻）雜亂無章的資訊或資料。
exampleSentence: The CEO's explanation of the new strategy was jarvisgibbering and left many employees confused.
exampleTranslation: 執行長對新策略的解釋含糊不清，讓許多員工感到困惑。

meaning: 茉莉花；（香氣）茉莉花香
exampleSentence: The hotel is known for its jasmine-scented lobby, creating a relaxing atmosphere for guests.
exampleTranslation: 這家飯店以其茉莉花香的接待大廳而聞名，為客人營造了放鬆的氛圍。

meaning: 碧玉石，一種半寶石，通常用於裝飾或工藝品。
exampleSentence: The jewelry store is featuring a new line of necklaces adorned with beautiful jaspers.
exampleTranslation: 該珠寶店正在展示一系列以美麗的碧玉石裝飾的項鍊。

meaning: 下顎；頜骨；（口語）喋喋不休地說話；嘮叨
exampleSentence: He suffered a broken jaw in the accident.
exampleTranslation: 他在那次事故中下巴骨折了。

meaning: 翠鳥（一種藍綠色羽毛的鳥類），在商務情境中通常指代「不合群、不守規矩的人」。
exampleSentence: He's a bit of a jay; he often disregards company policies.
exampleTranslation: 他有點像翠鳥，經常不遵守公司政策。

meaning: 一種源自美國非裔美國人社群的即興爵士樂，通常用於營造輕鬆愉快的氛圍。
exampleSentence: The company decided to play jazz music in the lobby to create a more relaxed atmosphere for visitors.
exampleTranslation: 公司決定在接待大廳播放爵士樂，以營造更輕鬆愉快的氛圍。

meaning: 牛仔褲；耐用的棉布服裝（通常指長褲）
exampleSentence: The company's dress code allows employees to wear jeans on Fridays.
exampleTranslation: 公司著裝規定允許員工在星期五穿牛仔褲。

meaning: 牛仔褲；耐用的棉布長褲，通常用於休閒或工作場合。
exampleSentence: The dress code allows employees to wear jeans on Fridays.
exampleTranslation: 著裝規定允許員工在星期五穿牛仔褲。

meaning: （電腦）連接器，通常指小型電纜連接器，用於連接外部設備。
exampleSentence: The technician needs to check the jed connection to ensure the printer is functioning correctly.
exampleTranslation: 技術人員需要檢查連接器的連接，以確保印表機正常運作。

meaning: 果凍；（食品）果膠
exampleSentence: The hotel buffet offers a wide variety of desserts, including fruit jellies and chocolate mousse.
exampleTranslation: 飯店自助餐提供多種甜點，包括水果果凍和巧克力慕斯。

meaning: 珍妮弗（Jennifer）是一個常見的女性名字，通常用於稱呼同事、客戶或商業夥伴。
exampleSentence: Jennifer from the marketing team will be leading the presentation.
exampleTranslation: 來自行銷團隊的珍妮弗將負責主持簡報。

meaning: 珍妮愛游泳 (Jenny loves swimming) 是一種個人喜好或興趣的表達，通常用於描述某人熱愛游泳的行為。
exampleSentence: Jenny loves swimming, so she often goes to the pool after work.
exampleTranslation: 珍妮愛游泳，所以她經常在下班後去游泳池。

meaning: 危險；使…受到威脅；冒險
exampleSentence: The company's reputation could be jeopardized if the product quality is not maintained.
exampleTranslation: 如果產品品質無法維持，公司的聲譽可能會受到威脅。

meaning: 混蛋，笨蛋；猛拉，急動
exampleSentence: He can be a real jerk sometimes, especially when he's stressed.
exampleTranslation: 他有時候真是個混蛋，尤其是當他壓力大的時候。

meaning: 運動服、球衣（通常指有隊徽或號碼的）
exampleSentence: The company is launching a new line of sports jerseys featuring popular athletes.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在推出一系列以知名運動員為特色的運動服。

meaning: 球衣；運動衫（通常帶有隊徽或球員姓名號碼）
exampleSentence: The company is launching a new line of limited-edition jerseys to boost sales.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在推出一系列限量版球衣以提高銷售額。

meaning: 潔西卡 (名詞)：一個常見的女性名字，通常用於稱呼同事或客戶。
exampleSentence: Could Jessica from the sales department please join the conference call?
exampleTranslation: 銷售部門的潔西卡能請加入視訊會議嗎？

meaning: 噴射機；噴射（氣流或水流）；黑玉（一種黑色寶石）；搭乘噴射機飛行；噴射，射出
exampleSentence: The airline operates daily international jet flights.
exampleTranslation: 這家航空公司每天都有國際噴射機航班。

meaning: 時差反應；因跨時區旅行而引起的疲勞和睡眠障礙。
exampleSentence: After the long flight to Tokyo, he's suffering from severe jet lag and needs a day to recover.
exampleTranslation: 飛往東京的長途飛行後，他正遭受嚴重的時差反應，需要一天時間來恢復。

meaning: （網路用語）網路迷因，通常指在社群媒體上廣泛傳播的幽默圖片、影片或文字。
exampleSentence: The marketing team decided to incorporate a popular jetryan into their latest social media campaign to increase engagement.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊決定將一個流行的網路迷因納入他們最新的社群媒體活動中，以提高參與度。

meaning: 貴重寶石；珠寶，通常指鑽石、紅寶石等。
exampleSentence: The company's new marketing campaign features a stunning diamond jewel to attract high-end customers.
exampleTranslation: 公司的新行銷活動以一顆令人驚豔的鑽石珠寶來吸引高端客戶。

meaning: 珠寶首飾；精美飾品（通常指金屬、寶石等製成的裝飾品）
exampleSentence: The company is launching a new line of jewelry to attract luxury consumers.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在推出全新珠寶系列，以吸引高端消費族群。

meaning: 吉爾（Jill）通常指女性的名字，在商務情境中，可用於指代一位同事、客戶或合作夥伴。
exampleSentence: Jill from the marketing department will be leading the presentation.
exampleTranslation: 行銷部 Jill 將會主導這次的簡報。

meaning: （小）吉米，一種常見的英文名，也指一種小型三明治。
exampleSentence: Could you please ask Jimmy to send over the latest sales report?
exampleTranslation: 請詢問吉米是否能傳送最新的銷售報告。

meaning: （廣告或音樂的）短促響亮旋律；（節日或促銷活動的）廣告歌曲
exampleSentence: The marketing team is creating a catchy jingle for the new product launch.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊正在為新產品發布製作一首朗朗上口的廣告歌曲。

meaning: 工作；職位；任務
exampleSentence: She's looking for a new job in the marketing department.
exampleTranslation: 她在行銷部門尋找新的工作。

meaning: 裁員削減，公司因經濟或營運考量而減少員工數量。
exampleSentence: The company announced a job cutback due to the recent economic downturn.
exampleTranslation: 由於最近的經濟衰退，公司宣布裁員削減。

meaning: 就業博覽會；徵才博覽會，通常由公司聚集在一起，為求職者提供面試和就業機會。
exampleSentence: Our company will be participating in the annual job fair next month to recruit fresh graduates.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司將會在下個月的年度就業博覽會上參與，以招聘應屆畢業生。

meaning: 工作邀約；公司正式發出的聘僱邀請，包含職位、薪資、福利等條件。
exampleSentence: The company extended a job offer to Ms. Lee, pending a successful background check.
exampleTranslation: 公司向李小姐發出工作邀約，條件是背景調查順利通過。

meaning: 職位空缺；工作機會
exampleSentence: The company website lists several job opportunities for recent graduates.
exampleTranslation: 公司網站上列出了幾個適合應屆畢業生的職位空缺。

meaning: 工作滿意度，指員工對其工作、工作環境及雇主所感到的整體滿意程度。
exampleSentence: The company is implementing new policies to improve employee job satisfaction.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在實施新的政策以提高員工的工作滿意度。

meaning: 求職活動；職位搜尋
exampleSentence: The company offers career counseling to assist employees with their job search.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供職涯諮詢，以協助員工進行職位搜尋。

meaning: 求職者；正在尋找工作的候選人
exampleSentence: The company is hosting a career fair to attract job seekers.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在舉辦就業博覽會以吸引求職者。

meaning: 職位名稱；工作頭銜
exampleSentence: The HR department is responsible for updating employee job titles in the company database.
exampleTranslation: 人力資源部門負責在公司資料庫中更新員工的職位名稱。

meaning: 工作；職位；任務
exampleSentence: The company is currently hiring for several entry-level jobs in the marketing department.
exampleTranslation: 公司目前正在市場部招聘幾個初級職位。

meaning: 輕微地移動；短暫地移動（通常指為了鍛鍊身體）
exampleSentence: To maintain productivity, employees are encouraged to take short breaks and jog around the office.
exampleTranslation: 為了保持生產力，員工們被鼓勵在工作間隙短暫地在辦公室裡走動。

meaning: 加入；參與；聯合
exampleSentence: Employees are encouraged to join the company's wellness program.
exampleTranslation: 公司鼓勵員工參與公司的健康促進計畫。

meaning: 加入；參與；聯合
exampleSentence: New employees are joining the company next week.
exampleTranslation: 新員工下週將加入公司。

meaning: 關節；聯合；合作
exampleSentence: The company is seeking a joint venture with a local firm to expand its market share.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在尋找與一家當地公司的聯合企業，以擴大其市場份額。

meaning: 合資企業；共同投資專案
exampleSentence: The company is exploring a joint venture with a local firm to expand into the Asian market.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在考慮與一家本地公司建立合資企業，以擴展到亞洲市場。

meaning: 共同地，聯合地
exampleSentence: The two companies decided to jointly develop a new product.
exampleTranslation: 這兩家公司決定共同開發一款新產品。

meaning: 笑話；玩笑，通常用於輕鬆化解緊張氣氛或在社交場合增添趣味。
exampleSentence: The CEO started the presentation with a lighthearted joke to ease the audience's tension.
exampleTranslation: 為了緩解聽眾的緊張氣氛，執行長以一個輕鬆的笑話開場。

meaning: 喬丹（品牌名）；指耐克旗下運動品牌喬丹系列產品。
exampleSentence: The marketing team is launching a new campaign featuring the latest Jordan sneakers.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊正在推出以最新款喬丹運動鞋為特色的新活動。

meaning: 日記；記錄（通常指定期記錄業務、研究或個人觀察的筆記本或電子文件）
exampleSentence: The project manager keeps a detailed journal of daily tasks and progress.
exampleTranslation: 專案經理會記錄每日任務和進度的詳細日記。

meaning: 新聞業；新聞學；報刊雜誌
exampleSentence: She is studying journalism at university, hoping to become a foreign correspondent.
exampleTranslation: 她正在大學修讀新聞學，希望能成為一名駐外記者。

meaning: 記者；新聞從業人員
exampleSentence: The company hired a journalist to write a press release about the new product launch.
exampleTranslation: 公司聘請了一位記者撰寫關於新產品發布的新聞稿。

meaning: 旅程；一段經歷（通常指具有挑戰性或有意義的過程）
exampleSentence: The company is embarking on a challenging journey to expand into new markets.
exampleTranslation: 公司正開始一段艱辛的旅程，以拓展新市場。

meaning: 歡樂；高興；樂趣；喜悅 (名詞)；感到高興 (動詞)
exampleSentence: Her eyes lit up with joy when she saw the surprise gift.
exampleTranslation: 當她看到驚喜禮物時，她的眼睛充滿了喜悅。

meaning: 評判；裁決；法官
exampleSentence: The hiring manager will judge candidates based on their experience and qualifications.
exampleTranslation: 招聘經理將根據候選人的經驗和資歷來評判他們。

meaning: 評估；評判；認定（價值、能力或品質）
exampleSentence: The candidate's performance was judged to be excellent based on the interview and skills assessment.
exampleTranslation: 根據面試和技能評估，候選人的表現被評為優秀。

meaning: 法官；評判者；評審者
exampleSentence: The panel of judges will evaluate the presentations based on clarity and innovation.
exampleTranslation: 評審團將根據清晰度和創新性來評估簡報。

meaning: 判斷；判斷力；看法；判決
exampleSentence: It's important to use your best judgment when making critical decisions.
exampleTranslation: 在做出關鍵決策時，運用你最佳的判斷力非常重要。

meaning: 與司法、法院或法律相關的；屬於司法系統的。
exampleSentence: The company is seeking legal counsel to ensure compliance with all judicial rulings.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在尋求法律顧問，以確保遵守所有司法裁決。

meaning: 果汁；ジュース（日語借詞，指果汁）
exampleSentence: The hotel offers a complimentary breakfast buffet with fresh juice and pastries.
exampleTranslation: 飯店提供免費的早餐自助餐，包含新鮮果汁和麵包點心。

meaning: （俚語）年輕、有活力的創作者或網紅，通常活躍於社群媒體，擅長製作短影片或音樂。
exampleSentence: Our marketing team is targeting juiceboys to promote our new energy drink on TikTok.
exampleTranslation: 我們的行銷團隊正鎖定年輕的社群媒體創作者（juiceboys）來推廣我們的新能量飲料在 TikTok 上。

meaning: 多汁的；引人入勝的；有利可圖的
exampleSentence: The freshly squeezed oranges made a very juicy and refreshing drink.
exampleTranslation: 新鮮榨的柳橙汁是一杯非常多汁又清爽的飲料。

meaning: 七月，一年中的第七個月。
exampleSentence: The annual sales conference is scheduled for July 15th.
exampleTranslation: 年度銷售會議預計在七月十五日舉行。

meaning: 躍起；跳躍；突然增加（價格、數量等）
exampleSentence: The company's profits jumped significantly after the new marketing campaign.
exampleTranslation: 新的行銷活動讓公司的利潤大幅躍升。

meaning: 躍起；跳躍；突然跳躍
exampleSentence: The employee jumped at the opportunity to lead the new project.
exampleTranslation: 這位員工非常樂意抓住機會，帶領新的專案。

meaning: 六月，一年中的第六個月。
exampleSentence: The annual sales conference is scheduled for June 15th.
exampleTranslation: 年度銷售會議預計在六月十五日舉行。

meaning: 初級的；資淺的；較年輕的（員工）
exampleSentence: The junior accountant is responsible for data entry and basic reconciliation.
exampleTranslation: 初級會計師負責資料輸入和基本的對帳。

meaning: 廢棄物；無用物品；劣質品
exampleSentence: The warehouse manager ordered a cleanup to remove all the junk and optimize storage space.
exampleTranslation: 倉庫經理下令清理，移除所有廢棄物並優化儲存空間。

meaning: 管轄權；司法權；審判權；管轄範圍
exampleSentence: The court has no jurisdiction over cases outside its district.
exampleTranslation: 該法院對其轄區以外的案件沒有管轄權。

meaning: 陪審團；（競賽的）評判委員會
exampleSentence: The jury delivered its verdict after a long trial.
exampleTranslation: 經過漫長的審判，陪審團宣讀了判決。

meaning: 剛才; 僅僅; 正好; 公正的
exampleSentence: I just sent the email, so they should receive it soon.
exampleTranslation: 我剛才發送了那封郵件，所以他們應該很快就會收到。

meaning: 以防萬一；預防措施
exampleSentence: I'm bringing an umbrella just in case it rains later.
exampleTranslation: 我帶了一把雨傘，以防萬一晚上海會下雨。

meaning: 準時抵達或送達，在需要時立即可用，通常指在最後一刻。
exampleSentence: The supplier delivers the components just in time for assembly.
exampleTranslation: 供應商準時送達零件，以便組裝。

meaning: 僅作為確認，為了確保
exampleSentence: Just to make sure, could you confirm the delivery address?
exampleTranslation: 僅作為確認，您可以確認一下送貨地址嗎？

meaning: 公正；公平；正義；法律
exampleSentence: The company is committed to upholding justice and ensuring fair treatment for all employees.
exampleTranslation: 公司致力於維護公正，並確保所有員工得到公平的待遇。

meaning: 合理說明；辯護理由
exampleSentence: The manager requested a written justification for the budget increase.
exampleTranslation: 經理要求針對預算增加提供書面合理說明。

meaning: 證明合理；為…辯護；合理化
exampleSentence: The company needs to justify the increased budget to the board of directors.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要向董事會證明增加預算的合理性。

meaning: 公平地；正當地（尤指根據法律或道德標準）
exampleSentence: The company decided to justly compensate the employee for the overtime work.
exampleTranslation: 公司決定公平地賠償員工加班所做的工時。

meaning: 卡羅斯（Karos），通常指一家總部位於德國的物流公司，專注於歐洲範圍內的貨物運輸和供應鏈管理。
exampleSentence: Our company is considering partnering with Karos to streamline our European distribution network.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在考慮與卡羅斯合作，以簡化我們在歐洲的配送網絡。

meaning: 卡翠娜（颶風卡翠娜），指 2005 年 8 月襲擊美國路易斯安那州的新奧爾良的破壞性颶風。
exampleSentence: The company is still recovering from the losses incurred due to Hurricane Katrina.
exampleTranslation: 公司仍在努力從卡翠娜颶風造成的損失中恢復。

meaning: 熱衷於；對...感興趣；渴望
exampleSentence: He's keen on learning more about the company's new marketing strategy.
exampleTranslation: 他對公司新的行銷策略很感興趣，並想多了解一些。

meaning: 敏銳地；強烈地；熱切地（形容詞，表示對某事抱有強烈的興趣或關注）
exampleSentence: The marketing team is keenly aware of the changing consumer trends.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊對不斷變化的消費者趨勢非常敏銳。

meaning: 保留；繼續擁有；維持；繼續進行
exampleSentence: Please keep me updated on the progress of the project.
exampleTranslation: 請將專案進度告知我，並持續更新。

meaning: 使…知情；通知…
exampleSentence: Please keep me informed of any changes to the project timeline.
exampleTranslation: 請將專案進度變動通知我。

meaning: 使...保持最新狀態；使...跟進最新資訊
exampleSentence: We need to keep our software up to date to ensure security.
exampleTranslation: 為了確保安全，我們需要將我們的軟體保持在最新狀態。

meaning: 持續進行；繼續努力
exampleSentence: The project is facing some challenges, but we need to keep going and meet the deadline.
exampleTranslation: 專案面臨一些挑戰，但我們需要繼續努力，按時完成。

meaning: 牢記；記住；切記（重要資訊或要求）
exampleSentence: Please keep in mind that the deadline for the project proposal is next Friday.
exampleTranslation: 請記住專案提案的截止日期是下週五。

meaning: 跟上進度；掌握最新資訊；持續關注
exampleSentence: It's crucial for project managers to keep on top of deadlines to ensure timely completion.
exampleTranslation: 為了確保項目能按時完成，專案經理必須持續掌握截止期限。

meaning: 密切關注；留意；監視（某物或某人），確保其安全或狀態。
exampleSentence: The security guard needs to keep an eye on the warehouse entrance to prevent theft.
exampleTranslation: 保全人員需要密切關注倉庫入口，以防止盜竊。

meaning: 獨來獨往；不與人交往
exampleSentence: He tends to keep to himself during team lunches, preferring to read a book.
exampleTranslation: 他在團隊午餐時傾向於獨來獨往，喜歡看書。

meaning: 追蹤、監控（進度、數據等），保持了解
exampleSentence: The project manager needs to keep track of all team members' progress to ensure timely completion.
exampleTranslation: 專案經理需要追蹤所有團隊成員的進度，以確保按時完成。

meaning: 維持；保存；持續（狀態、行為等）
exampleSentence: The company is keeping a close eye on market trends to adjust its strategy.
exampleTranslation: 公司正密切關注市場趨勢，以調整其策略。

meaning: 持續保有；維持；保存
exampleSentence: The company keeps detailed records of all transactions for auditing purposes.
exampleTranslation: 公司為審計目的，保留所有交易的詳細記錄。

meaning: 認識；了解；知道
exampleSentence: Do you know the deadline for submitting the project proposal?
exampleTranslation: 你知道提交專案提案的截止日期嗎？

meaning: 肯德頓 (Kenderton) 是指一家虛構的國際貿易公司，通常用於商業模擬和案例研究中，代表著一家在供應鏈管理和全球貿易領域的參與者。
exampleSentence: Our logistics team is working to optimize the delivery schedule for Kenderton's latest order.
exampleTranslation: 我們的物流團隊正在努力優化肯德頓最新訂單的交貨時間表。

meaning: 狗舍；犬舍（通常指商業性或專業的犬舍）
exampleSentence: The hotel offers a luxurious kennel service for guests' pets.
exampleTranslation: 這家飯店為住客的寵物提供豪華狗舍服務。

meaning: 保留；維持；保存
exampleSentence: The company kept detailed records of all transactions for auditing purposes.
exampleTranslation: 公司為了審計目的，保留了所有交易的詳細記錄。

meaning: 用來燒水的電熱水壺；電水壺
exampleSentence: The hotel staff is responsible for ensuring that all kettles in the rooms are clean and functioning properly.
exampleTranslation: 飯店人員負責確保所有房間內的電熱水壺清潔且運作正常。

meaning: 一種由鑄鐵球體和短柄組成的健身器材，用於進行全身性的力量訓練。
exampleSentence: The company's wellness program encourages employees to incorporate kettlebell training into their fitness routines.
exampleTranslation: 公司福利計畫鼓勵員工將壺鈴訓練納入他們的健身計畫中。

meaning: 鑰匙；關鍵；解決方案
exampleSentence: Could you please provide the key to the storage room?
exampleTranslation: 您能請提供儲藏室的鑰匙嗎？

meaning: 成功的關鍵；達成目標的要素
exampleSentence: Hard work and dedication are often cited as the key to success in the competitive business world.
exampleTranslation: 在競爭激烈的商業世界中，勤奮和奉獻通常被認為是成功的關鍵。

meaning: 鍵盤，用於輸入文字和指令的電子設備。
exampleSentence: The IT department replaced my keyboard because several keys were malfunctioning.
exampleTranslation: 由於幾個按鍵失靈，IT部門更換了我的鍵盤。

meaning: 鍵盤，用於輸入文字和指令的裝置。
exampleSentence: The IT department is replacing all the outdated keyboards with ergonomic models.
exampleTranslation: 資訊部門正在將所有過時的鍵盤更換為符合人體工學的型號。

meaning: 主旨演講；重點演講
exampleSentence: The CEO will deliver the keynote speech at the annual conference.
exampleTranslation: 執行長將在年度會議上發表主旨演講。

meaning: 主旨演講；重點演講（通常在會議或活動中，由重要人物發表演講，闡述主題或觀點）
exampleSentence: The CEO will deliver the keynote address at the annual conference.
exampleTranslation: 執行長將在年度會議上發表主旨演講。

meaning: 主題演講者；主要演講者，通常在會議或活動中負責發表重要演講。
exampleSentence: The keynote speaker at the conference is a renowned expert in artificial intelligence.
exampleTranslation: 這次會議的主演講者是人工智慧領域的著名專家。

meaning: 按鍵盤；數字鍵盤
exampleSentence: Enter your PIN code using the keypad to access your account.
exampleTranslation: 使用按鍵盤輸入您的 PIN 碼以訪問您的帳戶。

meaning: 關鍵要素；基礎石（比喻）；核心
exampleSentence: The new software is a keystone to our digital transformation strategy.
exampleTranslation: 這款新軟體是我們數位轉型策略的關鍵要素。

meaning: 關鍵技術；核心技術，通常指在特定領域具有領先地位的技術。
exampleSentence: Our company's competitive advantage lies in its proprietary keytech.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司的競爭優勢在於其專有技術。

meaning: 用腳踢；（比喻）促動、啟動
exampleSentence: The company needs to kick off the new marketing campaign next month.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要在下個月啟動新的行銷活動。

meaning: 跆拳道搏擊；進行跆拳道搏擊
exampleSentence: She decided to kickbox to improve her fitness and learn self-defense.
exampleTranslation: 她決定練習跆拳道搏擊來增強體能並學習自衛。

meaning: 額外的重要部分；（新聞標題等的）小標題；附加條款；出人意料的結果
exampleSentence: The presentation ended with a powerful kicker that left a lasting impression on the audience.
exampleTranslation: 這場簡報以一個強而有力的亮點收尾，給觀眾留下了深刻的印象。

meaning: 兒童；幼童（通常指未成年人，在商務情境中指公司內部或客戶的未成年子女）
exampleSentence: The company offers childcare benefits to support employees with young kids.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供托兒福利，以支持有幼童的員工。

meaning: 綁架；劫持
exampleSentence: The terrorists attempted to kidnap the ambassador.
exampleTranslation: 恐怖分子試圖綁架大使。

meaning: 腎臟
exampleSentence: The doctor explained that the patient's kidney function had significantly improved.
exampleTranslation: 醫生解釋說病人的腎臟功能已顯著改善。

meaning: 兒童；小孩（通常指一群孩子）
exampleSentence: The company offers childcare benefits to attract and retain employees with young kids.
exampleTranslation: 為了吸引和留住有小孩的員工，公司提供托兒福利。

meaning: 終止、消滅（生命、功能、計畫等）；造成損害或損失。
exampleSentence: The company is taking steps to kill off any potential security vulnerabilities.
exampleTranslation: 公司正採取措施消除任何潛在的安全漏洞。

meaning: 殺手；極度困難或令人筋疲力盡的事物；極好的、了不起的
exampleSentence: That exam was a real killer; I barely finished on time.
exampleTranslation: 那場考試真是要命，我幾乎沒有及時完成。

meaning: 千卡；大卡 (能量單位，等於 1000 卡路里)
exampleSentence: A kilocalorie is often referred to as a Calorie (with a capital C) on food labels.
exampleTranslation: 食品標籤上常將千卡（kilocalorie）稱為大卡（Calorie，C大寫）。

meaning: 公斤
exampleSentence: The package weighs five kilograms.
exampleTranslation: 這個包裹重五公斤。

meaning: 公克（重量單位），通常用於衡量貨物、包裹或商品的重量。
exampleSentence: The shipping company requires all packages to be under 20 kilograms to qualify for express delivery.
exampleTranslation: 為了符合快遞資格，快遞公司要求所有包裹的重量必須低於 20 公克。

meaning: 公里 (公尺的一千倍；測量距離的單位)
exampleSentence: The nearest gas station is about five kilometers from here.
exampleTranslation: 最近的加油站離這裡大約五公里。

meaning: 公里，公里的單位（用於測量距離，尤其在商業和運輸領域）
exampleSentence: The delivery service guarantees a maximum distance of 500 kilometers for overnight shipping.
exampleTranslation: 該快遞服務保證隔夜運送的距離上限為 500 公里。

meaning: 金氏世界紀錄（Kim's World Record）
exampleSentence: The company aims to have its product listed in the Kim's World Record for the fastest-selling item.
exampleTranslation: 公司希望將其產品列入金氏世界紀錄，成為銷售速度最快的商品。

meaning: 友善的；和藹的；仁慈的；（指人）善良的
exampleSentence: The manager was very kind and helpful in resolving the employee's concerns.
exampleTranslation: 經理非常友善且樂於助人，解決了員工的顧慮。

meaning: 心地善良，富有同情心，樂於助人。
exampleSentence: The manager is known for being kindhearted and always willing to help his team.
exampleTranslation: 這位經理以心地善良且樂於助人而聞名，總是願意幫助他的團隊。

meaning: 禮貌地；請客氣地
exampleSentence: Kindly submit your expense report by the end of the week.
exampleTranslation: 請客氣地在週末前提交您的費用報表。

meaning: 仁慈、友善、慷慨的行為或品質，尤其是在商業環境中，指以體貼和關懷待人。
exampleSentence: The company's kindness towards its employees, including flexible work arrangements, has boosted morale.
exampleTranslation: 公司對員工的友善，例如彈性工作安排，提升了士氣。

meaning: 種類；類別；類型
exampleSentence: We offer several kinds of software solutions to meet different client needs.
exampleTranslation: 我們提供多種軟體解決方案以滿足不同客戶的需求。

meaning: 君主；國王
exampleSentence: The CEO, often referred to as the 'king' of the company, made a bold decision to restructure the department.
exampleTranslation: 這位公司執行長，通常被稱為「公司之王」，做出了重組部門的重大決策。

meaning: 王國；（公司、組織等）領域、範疇
exampleSentence: Our company aims to be a leading kingdom in the software development industry.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司的目標是成為軟體開發領域的領先者。

meaning: 親吻; 接吻; (輕輕地)觸碰
exampleSentence: They shared a passionate kiss under the moonlight.
exampleTranslation: 他們在月光下深情擁吻。

meaning: 裝備, 工具組, 成套用品; （特定用途的）工具箱; （製造某物的）零件包
exampleSentence: The first aid kit is kept in the storage room.
exampleTranslation: 急救箱放在儲藏室裡。

meaning: 廚房；烹飪區，通常指餐廳或飯店的後方烹飪區域。
exampleSentence: The chef requested a new oven for the kitchen to improve efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 主廚要求為廚房安裝新的烤箱以提高效率。

meaning: 廚房電器，指廚房中使用的各種電器設備，例如冰箱、烤箱、微波爐等。
exampleSentence: The company is investing in new kitchen appliances to improve efficiency in the cafeteria.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在投資新的廚房電器，以提高食堂的效率。

meaning: 廚房用具，泛指廚房所需的各種器具和器皿。
exampleSentence: The company is sourcing high-quality kitchenware from overseas suppliers.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在從海外供應商採購高品質的廚房用具。

meaning: 小尺寸的；微型的；（數量、金額等）小的
exampleSentence: The company is developing a klein version of the tablet to appeal to a wider audience.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在開發一款小尺寸的平板電腦，以吸引更廣泛的受眾。

meaning: 膝蓋；膝關節
exampleSentence: The employee reported a knee injury after a fall in the warehouse.
exampleTranslation: 這位員工在倉庫跌倒後報告稱膝蓋受傷。

meaning: 髕骨；膝蓋骨（名詞）；打擊膝蓋骨（動詞）
exampleSentence: He fell and injured his kneecap during the hiking trip.
exampleTranslation: 他在健行時跌倒，傷到了膝蓋骨。

meaning: 跪拜；單膝跪地
exampleSentence: The CEO knelt before the board of directors to apologize for the company's recent financial losses.
exampleTranslation: 為了公司最近的財務損失，執行長向董事會單膝跪地道歉。

meaning: 刀子；餐刀
exampleSentence: The restaurant provides each guest with a steak knife and a fork.
exampleTranslation: 餐廳為每位客人提供一隻牛排刀和一隻叉子。

meaning: 編織（毛線等）；將線材編織成物
exampleSentence: The company is exploring the possibility of outsourcing the production of knitted goods to reduce costs.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在探討將編織品生產外包的可能性，以降低成本。

meaning: 旋鈕；控制鈕（用來調整設定或操作設備）
exampleSentence: The technician adjusted the volume knob to ensure clear audio during the online presentation.
exampleTranslation: 技術人員調整音量旋鈕，以確保線上簡報的音訊清晰。

meaning: 輕敲；敲門
exampleSentence: Could you knock before entering the conference room?
exampleTranslation: 進入會議室前，可以先敲門嗎？

meaning: 停止工作；下班；（價格）降價
exampleSentence: The manager announced that everyone could knock off early today due to the unexpected rain.
exampleTranslation: 經理宣布由於突如其來的降雨，今天大家可以提前下班。

meaning: 知道；了解；認識；懂得
exampleSentence: I know what you mean.
exampleTranslation: 我知道你的意思。

word: know A like the back of one’s hand
meaning: 非常熟悉；瞭若指掌（指對某事物或區域的知識非常深入，如同對自己手掌的熟悉程度）
exampleSentence: Our logistics team knows the city's distribution routes like the back of one’s hand, ensuring timely deliveries.
exampleTranslation: 我們的物流團隊非常熟悉該市的配送路線，確保及時送達。

meaning: 對特定領域或業務相關資訊、事實與技能的了解與認識
exampleSentence: Our team’s knowledge of the new software will reduce training time for new hires.
exampleTranslation: 我們團隊對新軟體的了解將縮短新進員工的培訓時間。

meaning: 博學多聞的；知識淵博的，對特定領域有深入了解的。
exampleSentence: Our team is looking for a knowledgeable candidate with experience in international trade.
exampleTranslation: 我們團隊正在尋找一位對國際貿易有經驗且知識淵博的候選人。

meaning: 知道；了解（第三人稱單數）
exampleSentence: The manager knows the company's policy on expense reimbursement.
exampleTranslation: 經理了解公司關於費用報銷的政策。

meaning: 指關節；（動物的）膝關節；（尤指用指關節）敲擊，碰擊；屈服，讓步
exampleSentence: He cracked his knuckles nervously before the meeting.
exampleTranslation: 他在會議前緊張地扳了扳指關節。

meaning: 空洞；空隙；（容器）容量
exampleSentence: The warehouse manager needs to check if there's enough kong in the storage unit for the new shipment.
exampleTranslation: 倉庫經理需要檢查儲存單位的空隙是否足夠容納新的貨運。

meaning: 酷；時髦；很棒（通常用於形容事物或表達讚賞）
exampleSentence: This new marketing campaign is really cool; it's attracting a lot of attention.
exampleTranslation: 這個新的行銷活動真的很酷，它吸引了許多關注。

meaning: 吉蘭丹州的首府，馬來西亞東海岸重要的港口城市，也是商業和貿易中心。
exampleSentence: The company is considering expanding its operations to Kuala Terengganu.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在考慮將業務擴展到瓜拉特拉干努。

meaning: 拙火，昆達里尼（印度瑜伽哲學中，指位於脊椎底部、沉睡的、具有神聖能量的蛇狀力量）
exampleSentence: She practices yoga to awaken her kundalini energy.
exampleTranslation: 她透過瑜伽練習來喚醒她的拙火能量。

meaning: 京都（日本古都），通常指日本的京都府，在商務情境中常指該地的文化、歷史或旅遊資源。
exampleSentence: Our company is planning a corporate retreat in Kyoto to explore its historical temples and gardens.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司計畫前往京都舉辦公司旅遊，以探索那裡的歷史寺廟和花園。

meaning: 實驗室；檢驗室
exampleSentence: The IT department needs to send the damaged equipment to the lab for testing.
exampleTranslation: IT部門需要將損壞的設備送到實驗室進行測試。

meaning: 實驗室報告，通常包含實驗結果、分析和結論，用於記錄和傳達科學研究或測試的結果。
exampleSentence: The quality control department requires a comprehensive lab report for each batch of products.
exampleTranslation: 品質控制部門要求對每批產品提供一份全面的實驗室報告。

meaning: 實驗室技術員，負責在實驗室協助科學家或研究人員進行實驗、分析樣本和操作儀器。
exampleSentence: The lab technician is responsible for calibrating the equipment before each test.
exampleTranslation: 實驗室技術員負責在每次測試前校準設備。

meaning: 標籤；標示；標籤名
exampleSentence: The shipping department needs to label each package with the correct destination.
exampleTranslation: 運輸部門需要為每個包裹標示正確的寄達地。

meaning: 標示；標籤；被標記的
exampleSentence: The documents were labeled with 'Confidential' to ensure privacy.
exampleTranslation: 為了確保隱私，這些文件被標示為「機密」。

meaning: 指在企業或組織中所投入的體力或智力工作，以及從事此工作的員工總稱。
exampleSentence: The company plans to reduce labor costs by automating the assembly line.
exampleTranslation: 公司計畫透過自動化組裝線來降低勞動成本。

meaning: 勞動成本，指企業為支付員工工資、福利、社會保險等所產生的費用。
exampleSentence: The company is looking for ways to reduce labor costs without affecting employee morale.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在尋找降低勞動成本的方法，同時不影響員工士氣。

meaning: 勞資爭議；勞工與雇主之間的衝突或不和諧關係，通常涉及工資、工作條件或權益等問題。
exampleSentence: The company is currently negotiating with the union to resolve the ongoing labor dispute.
exampleTranslation: 公司目前正在與工會協商，以解決持續的勞資爭議。

meaning: 實驗室；研發部門
exampleSentence: The R&D department, or laboratory, is working on a new prototype.
exampleTranslation: 研發部門，也就是實驗室，正在開發新的原型。

meaning: 蕾絲，精緻的網狀織物，常用於服裝、窗簾等裝飾品。
exampleSentence: The hotel's curtains were adorned with delicate lace trim.
exampleTranslation: 這家飯店的窗簾裝飾著精緻的蕾絲邊緣。

meaning: 缺乏；不足；缺少
exampleSentence: The company lacks sufficient resources to implement the new project.
exampleTranslation: 公司缺乏足夠的資源來執行新項目。

meaning: 缺乏自信，對自身能力或判斷力感到不確定。
exampleSentence: Many junior employees lack confidence when presenting ideas in meetings.
exampleTranslation: 許多初級員工在會議中提出想法時缺乏自信。

meaning: 缺乏；不足
exampleSentence: The proposal lacked sufficient data to support the investment.
exampleTranslation: 這份提案缺乏足夠的數據來支持這項投資。

meaning: 缺乏；不足；欠缺
exampleSentence: The report is lacking crucial data, so we need to gather more information.
exampleTranslation: 這份報告缺乏關鍵數據，因此我們需要收集更多資訊。

meaning: 缺乏；缺少
exampleSentence: The proposal lacks sufficient detail regarding the budget allocation.
exampleTranslation: 這份提案在預算分配的細節方面顯然缺乏。

meaning: 乳酸鹽；分泌乳汁；產生乳酸
exampleSentence: When you exercise vigorously, your muscles produce and accumulate lactate.
exampleTranslation: 當你劇烈運動時，肌肉會產生並累積乳酸。

meaning: 階梯；梯子
exampleSentence: The maintenance team used a ladder to repair the faulty light fixture in the warehouse.
exampleTranslation: 維護團隊使用梯子來修理倉庫裡故障的燈具。

meaning: 女士；夫人；小姐（對女性的客氣稱呼）
exampleSentence: Good morning, ladies and gentlemen, and welcome to our annual conference.
exampleTranslation: 女士們、先生們，早上好，歡迎參加我們的年度會議。

meaning: 延遲；落後；間隔時間
exampleSentence: There was a significant lag between the order placement and the shipment confirmation.
exampleTranslation: 訂單確認和貨物發貨之間存在顯著的延遲。

meaning: 湖泊；湖面（通常指較大的水體，用於描述風景或環境，在商務情境中可能與旅遊、休閒或環境評估相關）
exampleSentence: The company is considering a team-building retreat near a scenic lake.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在考慮在風景如畫的湖泊附近舉辦團隊建設活動。

meaning: 湖濱；湖畔的（位置或區域）
exampleSentence: The hotel's lakefront location offers stunning views.
exampleTranslation: 這家飯店的湖濱位置提供令人驚豔的景色。

meaning: 小羊肉；羊肉（通常指羔羊肉）
exampleSentence: The restaurant offers a special promotion on roasted lamb during the holiday season.
exampleTranslation: 餐廳在節假日期間推出烤小羊肉的特別促銷活動。

meaning: 燈；燈具
exampleSentence: The desk lamp provides sufficient light for reading.
exampleTranslation: 這盞檯燈提供足夠的光線用於閱讀。

meaning: 路燈柱；街燈柱
exampleSentence: The street was poorly lit, with several lampposts malfunctioning.
exampleTranslation: 這條街光線昏暗，許多路燈柱都失靈了。

meaning: 土地；指可供建築、農業或其他用途的地面；亦指使（飛機、船舶等）降落或抵達目的地。
exampleSentence: The company plans to acquire additional land for its new manufacturing plant.
exampleTranslation: 公司計畫購買額外的土地，以建設新製造廠。

meaning: 靠岸；停靠在碼頭
exampleSentence: The cargo ship is scheduled to land at the dock tomorrow morning.
exampleTranslation: 貨船預計明天早上靠岸。

meaning: 垃圾掩埋場；垃圾填埋場（指專門用於安全填埋廢棄物的區域）
exampleSentence: The company is exploring alternative waste management solutions to reduce its reliance on landfills.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在探索替代廢棄物管理方案，以減少對垃圾掩埋場的依賴。

meaning: 降落；（飛機、太空船等）到達地面
exampleSentence: The pilot announced a smooth landing at the international airport.
exampleTranslation: 飛行員宣布飛機已在國際機場安全降落。

meaning: 房東；地主（通常指出租房屋或商業空間者）
exampleSentence: The landlord is responsible for maintaining the building's structural integrity.
exampleTranslation: 房東負責維護建築物的結構完整性。

meaning: 地標；著名建築或景點，常被用來指示方向或作為商務活動的參考點。
exampleSentence: The conference venue is conveniently located near the city's most famous landmark, the Golden Gate Bridge.
exampleTranslation: 會議場地位於該市最著名的地標——金門大橋附近，交通便利。

meaning: 地標；著名建築或景點，通常用於辨識位置或方向。
exampleSentence: The conference venue is near several well-known landmarks, making it easily accessible.
exampleTranslation: 會議場地鄰近幾個著名的地標，交通便利。

meaning: 地景；風景（尤指自然環境，用於描述建築物或設施周圍的環境）
exampleSentence: The hotel boasts stunning landscapes, attracting many tourists.
exampleTranslation: 這家酒店擁有迷人的地景，吸引了許多遊客。

meaning: 景觀美化；庭園設計與維護
exampleSentence: The company is investing in landscaping to improve the building's curb appeal.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在投資景觀美化，以提升建築物的門面吸引力。

meaning: 車道；跑道；（飛行）航線
exampleSentence: The truck driver was fined for changing lanes without signaling.
exampleTranslation: 卡車司機因未打方向燈變換車道而被罰款。

meaning: 語言；溝通媒介，用於表達思想和交流資訊。
exampleSentence: The company offers translation services to facilitate communication across different languages.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供翻譯服務，以促進跨語言的溝通。

meaning: 語言習得：指學習和掌握一門語言的過程，包括詞彙、語法和語用能力的獲取。
exampleSentence: The company offers language acquisition programs to help employees improve their communication skills.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供語言習得課程，以幫助員工提升溝通能力。

meaning: 語言；多種語言
exampleSentence: Our company offers translation services for a wide range of languages.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司提供多種語言的翻譯服務。

meaning: 膝部; (賽跑等)一圈; 輕拍; 舔食
exampleSentence: The child sat comfortably on his father's lap.
exampleTranslation: 孩子舒服地坐在他父親的膝上。

meaning: 筆記型電腦，便攜式電腦，適用於辦公和移動工作。
exampleSentence: The IT department is providing each employee with a new laptop to improve productivity.
exampleTranslation: 資訊部門為提高生產力，為每位員工提供新的筆記型電腦。

meaning: 巨大的；大量的；體積大的
exampleSentence: The company needs a larger office space to accommodate its growing team.
exampleTranslation: 為了容納不斷增長的團隊，公司需要更大的辦公空間。

meaning: 主要地；大部分地；在很大程度上
exampleSentence: The company's revenue is largely dependent on its overseas sales.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的收入主要取決於其海外銷售。

meaning: 雷射
exampleSentence: The company uses advanced laser technology for engraving intricate designs.
exampleTranslation: 該公司使用先進的雷射技術來雕刻複雜的圖案。

meaning: 維持、持續、存續；最後的
exampleSentence: The project must last until the end of the fiscal year.
exampleTranslation: 這個專案必須持續到財政年度結束。

meaning: 最後一刻的；緊急的；臨時的（通常指在截止期限或活動開始前短時間內發生的事情或安排）
exampleSentence: We had a last-minute cancellation, so we have an extra room available.
exampleTranslation: 我們臨時取消了訂單，所以還有額外的房間。

meaning: 持久的；長久的；持續的
exampleSentence: The company aims to create lasting relationships with its clients.
exampleTranslation: 公司旨在與客戶建立持久的關係。

meaning: 持續、維持（時間）
exampleSentence: The training program lasts for three days.
exampleTranslation: 這項培訓課程持續三天。

meaning: 遲到；晚的；延遲的
exampleSentence: The meeting was postponed due to the CEO's late arrival.
exampleTranslation: 由於執行長遲到，會議被延遲了。

meaning: 近來；最近（指一段時間內）
exampleSentence: The company has been focusing on improving employee satisfaction lately.
exampleTranslation: 公司最近一直在專注於提升員工滿意度。

meaning: 遲到；遲延，延誤
exampleSentence: The manager issued a warning about repeated lateness.
exampleTranslation: 經理對多次遲到發出警告。

meaning: 潛在的；隱藏的；尚未顯現的
exampleSentence: The company is exploring latent opportunities in the emerging markets.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在探索新興市場中的潛在商機。

meaning: 側面的; 橫向的; 橫向調動的
exampleSentence: She made a lateral move to a different department to gain new experience.
exampleTranslation: 她橫向調動到另一個部門以獲取新經驗。

meaning: 最新的；最近的
exampleSentence: Please review the latest version of the report before the meeting.
exampleTranslation: 會議前請審閱報告的最新版本。

meaning: 最新作品；最新成果（通常指工作、研究或專案）
exampleSentence: The CEO is eager to review the team's latest work on the marketing campaign.
exampleTranslation: 執行長很期待審閱團隊在行銷活動上的最新成果。

meaning: 拉丁語；源自拉丁語的
exampleSentence: The document contains several Latin phrases that require translation.
exampleTranslation: 這份文件包含幾個需要翻譯的拉丁語短語。

meaning: 背闊肌（latissimus dorsi）的縮寫，指背部兩側的大肌肉，常用於健身語境。
exampleSentence: He spent a lot of time working on his lats at the gym.
exampleTranslation: 他在健身房花了很多時間鍛鍊他的背闊肌。

meaning: 後面的；較晚的信件或事物（通常指兩封信件中的第二封）
exampleSentence: In his letter, he mentioned the latter part of the agreement.
exampleTranslation: 在他的信中，他提到了協議的後續部分。

meaning: 因幽默或喜悅而發出的笑聲；（因某事）感到好笑。
exampleSentence: The team laughed at the humorous presentation, which helped ease the tension.
exampleTranslation: 團隊對幽默的簡報發笑，這有助於緩解緊張氣氛。

meaning: 用笑聲化解；用幽默轉化（尷尬或不悅之情）
exampleSentence: The manager laughed away the employee's concerns about the new project timeline.
exampleTranslation: 經理用笑聲化解了員工對新專案時程表的擔憂。

meaning: 笑聲；笑
exampleSentence: The sound of children's laughter filled the park.
exampleTranslation: 公園裡充滿了孩子們的笑聲。

meaning: 發布；推出（新產品、服務或計畫）
exampleSentence: The company plans to launch its new smartphone model next quarter.
exampleTranslation: 公司計畫在下個季度推出其新款智慧型手機。

meaning: 發布；推出（新產品、服務或計畫）
exampleSentence: The company launched its new smartphone with advanced features last month.
exampleTranslation: 該公司上個月發布了具有先進功能的全新智慧型手機。

meaning: 發布；推出（新產品、服務或計畫）
exampleSentence: The company is launching a new marketing campaign next month to boost sales.
exampleTranslation: 公司下個月將推出新的行銷活動以提高銷售額。

meaning: 洗錢；洗滌，清洗
exampleSentence: The criminal organization used shell companies to launder the illicit proceeds.
exampleTranslation: 該犯罪組織利用空殼公司洗錢非法所得。

meaning: 洗衣物；洗衣服務
exampleSentence: The hotel offers a convenient laundry service for guests.
exampleTranslation: 飯店為住客提供便利的洗衣服務。

meaning: 洗衣服務；提供清洗、烘乾、熨燙衣物的專業服務。
exampleSentence: The hotel offers a convenient laundry service for guests.
exampleTranslation: 這家飯店為住客提供方便的洗衣服務。

meaning: 華麗的；慷慨的；奢華的（指花費、裝飾等），通常帶有過度或不必要的意味。
exampleSentence: The company is known for its lavish marketing campaigns, which often feature celebrity endorsements.
exampleTranslation: 該公司以其華麗的行銷活動而聞名，這些活動通常會採用名人代言。

meaning: 法律；法規；規則
exampleSentence: The company must comply with all relevant laws and regulations.
exampleTranslation: 公司必須遵守所有相關的法律和法規。

meaning: 律師事務所；律師行
exampleSentence: Our company retained a reputable law firm to review the contract.
exampleTranslation: 我們聘請了一家信譽良好的律師事務所來審閱合約。

meaning: 草坪；草地（通常指經過修剪和維護的草地，常見於住宅或商業場所）
exampleSentence: The landscaping company is responsible for maintaining the lawn and gardens.
exampleTranslation: 景觀公司負責維護草坪和花園。

meaning: 法律、法規；規則
exampleSentence: The company must comply with all relevant labor laws.
exampleTranslation: 公司必須遵守所有相關勞動法律。

meaning: 訴訟
exampleSentence: The company's new lawsuit initiative exceeded expectations in the first quarter.
exampleTranslation: 公司的新lawsuit計畫在第一季度超出了預期。

meaning: 律師；法律顧問
exampleSentence: The company hired a lawyer to review the contract before signing.
exampleTranslation: 簽署合約前，公司聘請了一位律師來審閱。

meaning: 律師；法律顧問
exampleSentence: The company retained lawyers to review the contract and ensure compliance with all applicable laws.
exampleTranslation: 公司聘請律師審閱合約，以確保符合所有相關法律。

meaning: 寬鬆的；不嚴格的；放鬆的（指規則、標準等）
exampleSentence: The company's lax security measures led to a data breach.
exampleTranslation: 公司寬鬆的安全措施導致了數據洩露。

meaning: 放置；陳列；鋪設
exampleSentence: Please lay the report on the conference table before the meeting begins.
exampleTranslation: 請在會議開始前將報告放在會議桌上。

meaning: 裁員；解雇（通常指因公司經濟狀況或重組而解僱員工）
exampleSentence: Due to the economic downturn, the company had to lay off 10% of its workforce.
exampleTranslation: 由於經濟下滑，公司不得不裁員 10%。

meaning: 詳細說明、陳述、規劃、展現（計畫、資訊等）
exampleSentence: The manager asked the team to lay out the project timeline during the meeting.
exampleTranslation: 經理要求團隊在會議中說明專案時間表。

meaning: 層；層次；階層 (n.) / 鋪設；分層 (v.)
exampleSentence: The cake has three layers of chocolate and cream.
exampleTranslation: 這蛋糕有三層巧克力和奶油。

meaning: 裁員；大規模解雇（通常指公司因經濟原因而解僱員工）
exampleSentence: Due to the economic downturn, the company announced layoffs affecting several departments.
exampleTranslation: 由於經濟下滑，公司宣布裁員，影響到幾個部門。

meaning: 版面配置；設計排版
exampleSentence: The graphic designer is responsible for the layout of the company brochure.
exampleTranslation: 平面設計師負責公司宣傳冊的版面設計。

meaning: 中轉停留；轉機時間
exampleSentence: Due to the flight delay, we have a 3-hour layover in Frankfurt.
exampleTranslation: 由於航班延誤，我們在法蘭克福有 3 小時的中轉停留時間。

meaning: 懶散的；不勤奮的；缺乏積極性
exampleSentence: The employee's lazy attitude has negatively impacted team productivity.
exampleTranslation: 這位員工的懶散態度已對團隊生產力產生負面影響。

meaning: 引導；領導；擔任要職；（電線等）連接
exampleSentence: The project manager will lead the team to complete the project on time.
exampleTranslation: 專案經理將帶領團隊按時完成專案。

meaning: 逐漸引導、鋪墊至（某個結果或事件），通常指逐步提升或準備。
exampleSentence: The training program is designed to lead up to the final certification exam.
exampleTranslation: 這項訓練課程旨在逐步準備，以應對最終的認證考試。

meaning: 領導者；領導人，通常指在組織或團隊中具有影響力並引導方向的人。
exampleSentence: The company is looking for a strong leader to head the new marketing department.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在尋找一位強有力的領導者來領導新的行銷部門。

meaning: 領導者；領導人物
exampleSentence: The company is seeking strong leaders to drive innovation and growth.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在尋找強有力的領導者來推動創新和增長。

meaning: 領導能力；指在組織或團隊中指導、影響及激勵成員以達成目標的能力。
exampleSentence: The company's leadership emphasized the importance of meeting the quarterly sales targets.
exampleTranslation: 公司領導層強調達成季度銷售目標的重要性。

meaning: 領導、主導、領先；（產品、市場等）領先於他人
exampleSentence: Our company is a leading provider of software solutions in the Asia-Pacific region.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司是亞太地區領先的軟體解決方案供應商。

meaning: 引導；帶領；導致
exampleSentence: The project manager leads the team to achieve the quarterly goals.
exampleTranslation: 專案經理帶領團隊達成季度目標。

meaning: 葉子；（書本的）頁；（金屬、紙張等薄而平的）片；翻閱，快速瀏覽
exampleSentence: The autumn leaves turned golden and red before falling.
exampleTranslation: 秋天的樹葉在落下前變成了金黃色和紅色。

meaning: 聯盟; 聯賽; 等級
exampleSentence: Our company formed a strategic league with several other tech firms to develop new AI solutions.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司與其他幾家科技公司結成戰略聯盟，以開發新的人工智慧解決方案。

meaning: 滲漏；洩漏（液體、資訊等）
exampleSentence: The company is investigating the leak in the roof that caused water damage to the office equipment.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在調查導致辦公室設備受損的屋頂滲漏問題。

meaning: 漏水；滲漏
exampleSentence: The maintenance team needs to address the leaking roof before the rainy season begins.
exampleTranslation: 在雨季開始前，維護團隊需要處理漏水的屋頂。

meaning: 有漏洞的；滲漏的
exampleSentence: The warehouse roof is leaky, and we need to repair it before the rainy season.
exampleTranslation: 倉庫的屋頂有漏水，我們需要在雨季來臨前修理它。

meaning: 傾斜；倚靠；節儉
exampleSentence: The company is leaning towards outsourcing its IT department to reduce costs.
exampleTranslation: 公司傾向於將其 IT 部門外包，以降低成本。

meaning: 倚靠在柵欄上
exampleSentence: The security guard leaned against the fence, observing the loading dock for any suspicious activity.
exampleTranslation: 保全人員倚靠在柵欄上，觀察貨運碼頭是否有任何可疑活動。

meaning: 身體向後傾斜，通常表示放鬆或不正式的姿勢。
exampleSentence: After a long meeting, he leaned back in his chair and sighed.
exampleTranslation: 冗長的會議結束後，他靠在椅子上，嘆了口氣。

meaning: 俯身於欄杆旁，通常是為了觀察或與他人交談。
exampleSentence: She leaned over the railing to wave goodbye to the departing ship.
exampleTranslation: 她俯身於欄杆旁，向即將駛離的船隻揮手道別。

meaning: 突飛猛進；大幅躍升；跳躍
exampleSentence: The company's profits have leaped significantly since the implementation of the new marketing strategy.
exampleTranslation: 自新行銷策略實施以來，該公司的利潤大幅躍升。

meaning: 學習；獲取知識或技能
exampleSentence: Employees are encouraged to learn new software to improve their productivity.
exampleTranslation: 鼓勵員工學習新的軟體以提高生產力。

meaning: 學習；習得（技能、知識等）
exampleSentence: The new employee is eager to learn the company's procedures.
exampleTranslation: 這位新員工渴望學習公司的流程。

meaning: 學習；獲取知識或技能的過程，常用於員工培訓與職能提升的商務情境。
exampleSentence: The company provides continuous learning programs to help employees stay competitive.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供持續的學習計畫，協助員工保持競爭力。

meaning: 學習中心，通常提供各種課程、研討會和資源，幫助學習者提升技能或準備考試。
exampleSentence: The company partners with a local learning center to provide employees with language training.
exampleTranslation: 公司與當地學習中心合作，為員工提供語言訓練。

meaning: 租賃契約；租期
exampleSentence: The company is negotiating a five-year lease for the new office space.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在洽談新辦公室空間的五年租賃合約。

meaning: 皮革；皮革製品
exampleSentence: The company is sourcing high-quality leather for the new line of luxury handbags.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在採購高品質皮革，用於新款的奢侈手提包。

meaning: 離開；賦予；留下（某物）
exampleSentence: Please leave a message with the receptionist if Mr. Smith is not available.
exampleTranslation: 如果史密斯先生不在，請在接待處留下訊息。

meaning: 留言；留下訊息
exampleSentence: Could you please leave a message with my secretary, and I'll call you back later.
exampleTranslation: 請您留言給我的秘書，我稍後會回電。

meaning: 將...交由...決定；讓...自行處理
exampleSentence: The manager decided to leave the scheduling up to her assistant.
exampleTranslation: 經理決定將排程工作交由她的助理負責。

meaning: 將…留下給…；使…處於…狀態
exampleSentence: The manager left the project with the senior team member to ensure its successful completion.
exampleTranslation: 經理將專案交由資深團隊成員負責，以確保專案順利完成。

meaning: 出發前往（某地），通常指為了商務或旅行目的
exampleSentence: The sales team will leave for Tokyo tomorrow morning to attend the industry conference.
exampleTranslation: 銷售團隊將明天早上出發前往東京，參加產業研討會。

meaning: （樹）葉子；離職人員
exampleSentence: The company is experiencing a high turnover of leaves this quarter, impacting project timelines.
exampleTranslation: 本季度公司離職率很高，影響了專案進度。

meaning: 講台；演講台
exampleSentence: The speaker placed his notes on the lectern before beginning his presentation.
exampleTranslation: 演講者在開始簡報前，將筆記放在講台上。

meaning: 演講台；講台
exampleSentence: The speaker placed his notes on the lectern before beginning his presentation.
exampleTranslation: 演講者在開始簡報前，將筆記放在講台上。

meaning: 演講；講座（通常是正式且結構化的，用於教育或資訊傳遞）
exampleSentence: The professor will deliver a lecture on the impact of AI on the job market.
exampleTranslation: 這位教授將會就人工智慧對就業市場的影響進行演講。

meaning: 演講者；講師（通常指在大學或學院進行學術演講的人）
exampleSentence: The lecturer began his presentation on market trends with a brief overview of the current economic climate.
