meaning: 探究, 探查, 盤問 (動詞); 探針, 探測器, 詳細調查 (名詞)
exampleSentence: The detective continued to probe the suspect with difficult questions.
exampleTranslation: 偵探繼續用難題盤問嫌疑犯。

meaning: 問題、困境；障礙
exampleSentence: We need to identify the root problem causing the production delays.
exampleTranslation: 我們需要找出造成生產延遲的根本問題。

meaning: 構成問題或困難的；令人擔憂的
exampleSentence: The new software has several problematic bugs that need to be addressed immediately.
exampleTranslation: 這個新軟體有一些令人擔憂的錯誤，需要立即處理。

meaning: 問題；困境；障礙
exampleSentence: We need to identify the root problems causing delays in the project.
exampleTranslation: 我們需要找出造成專案延遲的根本問題。

meaning: 程序；步驟；操作流程
exampleSentence: Please follow the standard procedure for submitting expense reports.
exampleTranslation: 請依照標準程序提交費用報銷。

meaning: 標準作業流程；程序
exampleSentence: All employees must follow the company's safety procedures.
exampleTranslation: 所有員工都必須遵守公司的安全程序。

meaning: 繼續進行；按計畫進行
exampleSentence: Let's proceed with the next agenda item.
exampleTranslation: 我們來進行下個議程項目吧。

meaning: 會議記錄、議事過程；正式的會議紀錄或程序。
exampleSentence: The conference proceedings will be published online next week.
exampleTranslation: 會議記錄下週將在網路上發布。

meaning: 收益、收入（尤指從銷售或活動中獲得的）
exampleSentence: The company will donate the proceeds from the charity event to local schools.
exampleTranslation: 公司將從慈善活動中所得的收益捐給當地學校。

meaning: 流程；處理程序；步驟
exampleSentence: The company is streamlining its order processing to improve efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在簡化訂單處理流程以提高效率。

meaning: 經過處理的；加工過的（通常指食品或材料，強調經過改進或變更的狀態）
exampleSentence: The company is shifting towards using more processed foods to reduce costs.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正轉向使用更多加工食品以降低成本。

meaning: 流程；程序；處理方式（指一系列步驟或活動，用於達成特定目標）
exampleSentence: The company is streamlining its order processing processes to improve efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在簡化其訂單處理流程以提高效率。

meaning: 處理；對資料、文件、訂單等進行分析、整理或轉換的過程
exampleSentence: Our accounting department is currently processing the payroll for all employees.
exampleTranslation: 我們的會計部門正為全體員工處理薪資。

meaning: 處理器；中央處理單元 (CPU)，用於執行指令和處理數據。
exampleSentence: The company is upgrading its servers with faster processors to improve system performance.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在使用更快的處理器升級其伺服器，以提高系統效能。

meaning: 正式宣告；公開聲明
exampleSentence: The CEO proclaimed the company's commitment to sustainable practices.
exampleTranslation: 執行長宣告公司對永續發展的承諾。

meaning: 延遲處理；拖延（任務或責任）
exampleSentence: He tends to procrastinate on important projects, which often leads to missed deadlines.
exampleTranslation: 他傾向於延遲重要的專案，這經常導致錯過期限。

meaning: 取得；採購；獲得（通常指透過購買或訂購）
exampleSentence: The purchasing department needs to procure office supplies before the end of the month.
exampleTranslation: 採購部門需要在月底前採購辦公用品。

meaning: 採購
exampleSentence: The procurement department negotiated better terms with suppliers this quarter.
exampleTranslation: procurement部門本季與供應商談判了更好的條款。

meaning: 1. (動詞) 戳；刺；捅；輕推。 2. (動詞) 督促；激勵；促使。 3. (名詞) 戳；刺；捅；輕推。
exampleSentence: She prodded him in the ribs to get his attention during the meeting.
exampleTranslation: 在會議期間，她輕戳他的肋骨以引起他的注意。

meaning: 生產；製造；（產品）成果；（公司/機構）產品
exampleSentence: The factory is capable of producing over 10,000 units per month.
exampleTranslation: 該工廠每月可以生產超過 10,000 個單位。

meaning: 製造、生產；（產品）產自
exampleSentence: The factory produced over 1,000 units of the new smartphone last week.
exampleTranslation: 工廠上週生產了超過 1,000 部新款智慧型手機。

meaning: 製片人；製作人（通常指電影、電視節目、音樂等），也指負責生產或供應商品的廠商。
exampleSentence: The film producer is responsible for overseeing all aspects of the movie's production.
exampleTranslation: 製片人負責監督電影製作的各個方面。

meaning: 生產；製造；產生
exampleSentence: The factory produces over 10,000 units of the product each month.
exampleTranslation: 該工廠每月生產超過 10,000 個產品。

meaning: 生產；製造；製作
exampleSentence: The factory is producing a new line of electric vehicles.
exampleTranslation: 該工廠正在生產一條新的電動汽車產品線。

meaning: 產品；商品；成果
exampleSentence: Our company is launching a new product next month to meet the growing market demand.
exampleTranslation: 為了滿足不斷增長的市场需求，我們公司下個月將推出一款新產品。

meaning: 產品設計師，負責產品的功能、外觀和使用者體驗的設計。
exampleSentence: Our company is seeking a talented product designer to lead the development of our new mobile app.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在尋找一位有才華的產品設計師來領導我們新行動應用程式的開發。

meaning: 產品展示；商品陳列，通常指在商店或展覽中展示商品的方式。
exampleSentence: The store is planning a new product display to attract more customers during the holiday season.
exampleTranslation: 為了在節日期間吸引更多顧客，該店正在規劃新的產品展示。

meaning: 產品標誌；品牌圖案，通常用於識別和推廣公司或產品。
exampleSentence: The company invested heavily in designing a memorable product logo to enhance brand recognition.
exampleTranslation: 該公司投入大量資金設計一個令人難忘的產品標誌，以增強品牌知名度。

meaning: 生產；製造；產量；產品
exampleSentence: The company is increasing production to meet the rising demand.
exampleTranslation: 公司正提高產量以滿足不斷上升的需求。

meaning: 生產配額；生產目標
exampleSentence: The factory failed to meet its production quota for the third quarter.
exampleTranslation: 工廠未能達到第三季的生產配額。

meaning: 生產；製造；產品（複數）
exampleSentence: The company's annual productions increased by 15% due to the new automated system.
exampleTranslation: 由於新的自動化系統，該公司的年度生產量增加了 15%。

meaning: 有成效的；能產生結果的；能有效利用時間或資源的
exampleSentence: The new software has significantly increased our team's productivity.
exampleTranslation: 這款新軟體顯著提高了我們團隊的生產力。

meaning: 高效地；富有成效地
exampleSentence: The new software allows employees to work more productively.
exampleTranslation: 這套新軟體讓員工可以更有效率地工作。

meaning: 生產力；產出效率
exampleSentence: The company is investing in new software to boost employee productivity.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在投資新軟體以提高員工生產力。

meaning: 產品；商品（指公司或企業所生產或銷售的物品或服務）
exampleSentence: Our company offers a wide range of innovative products to meet customer needs.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司提供多種創新產品，以滿足客戶的需求。

meaning: 聲稱；宣稱；公開表示（觀點、信念等）
exampleSentence: The company professes a commitment to sustainable practices.
exampleTranslation: 該公司聲稱致力於可持續發展的措施。

meaning: 職業；事業（通常指需要專業知識或技能的活動）
exampleSentence: She chose a profession in healthcare because she wanted to help others.
exampleTranslation: 她選擇了醫療保健行業作為她的職業，因為她想幫助他人。

meaning: 具有專業技能或知識，並以此為職業的人或事物。
exampleSentence: The company hired a professional translator for the important contract.
exampleTranslation: 公司聘請了一位專業翻譯人員來處理重要的合約。

meaning: 專業地；職業地；內行地
exampleSentence: She handled the difficult client very professionally.
exampleTranslation: 她非常專業地處理了這位難搞的客戶。

meaning: 專業人士；專業從業人員
exampleSentence: The company is seeking experienced professionals to fill the open positions in the IT department.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在尋找經驗豐富的專業人士來填補 IT 部門的空缺職位。

meaning: 職業；事業
exampleSentence: The company offers training programs to help employees advance in their professions.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供培訓計畫，以幫助員工在其職業生涯中更上一層樓。

meaning: 大學或學院的教授，通常具有專業知識和豐富的教學經驗。
exampleSentence: The professor will present the research findings at the upcoming conference.
exampleTranslation: 這位教授將在即將到來的會議上發表研究結果。

meaning: 熟練程度；能力，精通程度（指在某領域或技能上達到較高的水平）
exampleSentence: The company requires a high level of proficiency in Microsoft Excel for this position.
exampleTranslation: 這個職位需要對 Microsoft Excel 具有很高的熟練程度。

meaning: 精通的；熟練的，在某領域具有高超技能。
exampleSentence: She is proficient in Microsoft Excel and can create complex spreadsheets.
exampleTranslation: 她精通 Microsoft Excel，並且能夠製作複雜的試算表。

meaning: 個人資料；簡歷；檔案（電腦用語）
exampleSentence: Please update your employee profile with your current skills and experience.
exampleTranslation: 請更新您的員工檔案，包含您目前的技能和經驗。

meaning: 盈餘；淨利；在營運或投資中獲得的收益
exampleSentence: The company's profit increased by 15% last quarter.
exampleTranslation: 公司上季的盈餘增長了 15%。

meaning: 毛利率；指營業收入扣除成本後的利潤佔比，用於衡量企業獲利能力的指標。
exampleSentence: Our company's profit margin increased by 3% after implementing the new cost-saving measures.
exampleTranslation: 在實施新的成本節約措施後，我公司的毛利率提升了 3%。

meaning: 盈利能力；獲利能力，指企業產生利潤的能力。
exampleSentence: The company's profitability has increased significantly due to the new marketing strategy.
exampleTranslation: 由於新的行銷策略，該公司的盈利能力顯著提高。

meaning: 有利可圖的；能帶來利潤的
exampleSentence: The company's new marketing strategy has proven to be highly profitable.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的全新行銷策略已證明非常有利可圖。

meaning: 從...中獲利；從...中得到收益
exampleSentence: The company profited significantly from the new product launch.
exampleTranslation: 公司從新產品的推出中獲得了顯著的利潤。

meaning: 利潤；收益；公司盈利
exampleSentence: The company reported a significant increase in profits this quarter.
exampleTranslation: 本季公司報告利潤大幅增加。

meaning: 深奧的；深遠的；深刻的；極度的
exampleSentence: The professor's lecture had a profound impact on his students.
exampleTranslation: 這位教授的演講對他的學生產生了深遠的影響。

meaning: 深刻地；徹底地；對…產生了深遠的影響
exampleSentence: The company's reputation was profoundly damaged by the recent scandal.
exampleTranslation: 最近的醜聞對公司的聲譽造成了深刻的損害。

meaning: 計畫、程式、系統（一系列有組織的活動或指令）
exampleSentence: The IT department is developing a new software program to improve efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 資訊部門正在開發一個新的軟體程式，以提高效率。

meaning: 編程人員；軟體開發者，負責設計、編寫和測試電腦程式。
exampleSentence: Our company is looking for experienced programmers to develop a new mobile application.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在尋找有經驗的編程人員，以開發新的行動應用程式。

meaning: 編程；程式設計，指使用程式語言來創建軟體或解決問題的過程。
exampleSentence: Our IT department is responsible for programming and maintaining the company's software applications.
exampleTranslation: 我們的 IT 部門負責編程和維護公司的軟體應用程式。

meaning: 計畫、程式、系統（通常指電腦程式或一系列活動）
exampleSentence: The IT department is developing new software programs to improve efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 資訊部門正在開發新的軟體程式，以提高效率。

meaning: 進展；發展；提升
exampleSentence: We've made significant progress on the new product development project.
exampleTranslation: 我們在新產品開發專案上取得了顯著的進展。

meaning: 進程；發展進度；階級提升
exampleSentence: The company is pleased with the progression of the new project, which is ahead of schedule.
exampleTranslation: 公司對新專案的進度感到滿意，目前已超前於原定時間。

meaning: 漸進的；進步的；持續發展的
exampleSentence: The company is implementing a progressive approach to employee training, focusing on continuous skill development.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在實施一種漸進式的人力資源培訓方法，著重於持續的技能發展。

meaning: 逐漸地；隨著時間推移
exampleSentence: The company is implementing new technologies progressively to improve efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 公司正逐步導入新技術以提高效率。

meaning: 禁止；阻止；嚴禁（某事發生）
exampleSentence: Company policy prohibits the use of personal devices during confidential meetings.
exampleTranslation: 公司政策禁止在機密會議期間使用個人設備。

meaning: 專案；計畫，通常指需要時間和資源來完成的任務。
exampleSentence: The marketing team is currently working on a new product launch project.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊目前正在進行一個新產品發布專案。

meaning: 專案協調員，負責監督和組織專案的執行，確保專案按時、按預算完成。
exampleSentence: The project coordinator is responsible for tracking progress and addressing any roadblocks.
exampleTranslation: 專案協調員負責追蹤進度並處理任何障礙。

meaning: 專案管理：組織、規劃、執行和控制專案以達成特定目標的過程。
exampleSentence: Effective project management is crucial for ensuring the timely completion of the new product launch.
exampleTranslation: 有效的專案管理對於確保新產品順利上市至關重要。

meaning: 預估、預測；（影像、聲音等）投射
exampleSentence: The company projected a 15% increase in sales for the next quarter.
exampleTranslation: 公司預估下個季度銷售額將增加 15%。

meaning: 預估
exampleSentence: The company's new projection initiative exceeded expectations in the first quarter.
exampleTranslation: 公司的新projection計畫在第一季度超出了預期。

meaning: 投影機；放映機
exampleSentence: Please set up the projector for the presentation.
exampleTranslation: 請將投影機設置好，以準備簡報。

meaning: 專案；計畫（通常指需要時間和資源完成的任務）
exampleSentence: The marketing team is currently working on several key projects to increase brand awareness.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊目前正在進行幾個關鍵專案，以提高品牌知名度。

meaning: 迅速擴散、大量繁殖，通常指數量或事物快速增加。
exampleSentence: The company's online presence proliferated after the launch of its new marketing campaign.
exampleTranslation: 隨著新行銷活動的推出，該公司的線上存在感迅速擴散。

meaning: 快速增長；激增；擴散
exampleSentence: The proliferation of smartphones has changed daily life dramatically.
exampleTranslation: 智慧型手機的激增大大改變了日常生活。

meaning: 延長；延遲；使持續更長時間
exampleSentence: The company decided to prolong the deadline for project submissions due to unforeseen circumstances.
exampleTranslation: 由於突發狀況，公司決定延長專案提交期限。

meaning: 延長的；持續的；冗長的
exampleSentence: The project experienced a prolonged delay due to unforeseen circumstances.
exampleTranslation: 由於 непредвиденные обстоятельства, 專案經歷了延長的延遲。

meaning: （尤其指在海邊或公園等地方的）散步、閒逛；（正式場合的）遊行
exampleSentence: After the conference, attendees enjoyed a leisurely promenade along the beach.
exampleTranslation: 會議結束後，與會者們在海灘上悠閒地散步。

meaning: 顯著的；傑出的；重要的（通常指地位、影響力或知名度）
exampleSentence: The company's logo is prominently displayed on all marketing materials.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的標誌在所有行銷材料上都顯著地展示。

meaning: 顯著地；突出地；引人注目地
exampleSentence: The company's logo was prominently displayed on all marketing materials.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的標誌在所有行銷材料上都顯著地展示。

meaning: 承諾；保證；約定
exampleSentence: The supplier promised to deliver the goods by next Friday.
exampleTranslation: 供應商承諾在下週五前交付商品。

meaning: 承諾；答應；許諾
exampleSentence: The supplier promised to deliver the goods by next Friday.
exampleTranslation: 供應商承諾會在下週五前交付商品。

meaning: 承諾；保證；允諾
exampleSentence: The company promises to deliver the goods within the agreed timeframe.
exampleTranslation: 公司承諾在約定的時間框架內交付商品。

meaning: 有希望的；前景看好的；有潛力的
exampleSentence: The company's new product line shows promising results in the initial market tests.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的新產品線在初步市場測試中顯示出令人鼓舞的結果。

meaning: 推廣（產品、服務或品牌）或提升（員工的職位或職責）
exampleSentence: The company will promote the new product through a series of online advertisements.
exampleTranslation: 公司將透過一系列線上廣告來推廣新產品。

meaning: 提升（職位或等級）；推廣（產品、服務或訊息）
exampleSentence: After three years of outstanding performance, she was promoted to senior manager.
exampleTranslation: 在三年的卓越表現之後，她被升遷為資深經理。

meaning: 推廣；促進；鼓勵
exampleSentence: The company promotes its new product through online advertising and social media campaigns.
exampleTranslation: 該公司透過線上廣告和社群媒體活動來推廣其新產品。

meaning: 推廣；促進；提升（銷售、產品、活動等）
exampleSentence: The company is promoting its new product line through social media campaigns.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正透過社群媒體活動來推廣其新的產品線。

meaning: 晉升；提升（職位）；促銷活動
exampleSentence: She received a promotion to Senior Manager after exceeding her sales targets.
exampleTranslation: 她在超額完成銷售目標後獲得了晉升，成為資深經理。

meaning: 用於推廣產品或服務的，旨在吸引顧客或提高知名度的。
exampleSentence: The company launched a promotional campaign to boost sales during the holiday season.
exampleTranslation: 為了在節日期間提高銷售額，公司推出了一項促銷活動。

meaning: 促銷活動；升遷
exampleSentence: The company is offering special promotions on all summer products to boost sales.
exampleTranslation: 為了提升銷售額，公司正在針對所有夏季產品推出特別促銷活動。

meaning: 提示；引導；啟動
exampleSentence: The software prompts the user to enter their password.
exampleTranslation: 軟體會提示使用者輸入密碼。

meaning: 促使；引起；引導（某人做某事）
exampleSentence: The software prompts the user to enter their password before accessing the system.
exampleTranslation: 軟體在存取系統之前會提示使用者輸入密碼。

meaning: 立即地；迅速地（指在預期或要求的時間內），通常用於強調行動的及時性。
exampleSentence: The delivery service promised to ship the order promptly.
exampleTranslation: 貨運服務承諾會立即發貨。

meaning: 準時性；及時性，特指在約定的時間內準時完成任務或回應。
exampleSentence: The manager emphasized the importance of promptness in responding to client emails.
exampleTranslation: 經理強調了在回覆客戶郵件時準時性的重要性。

meaning: 1. 傾向於...的；易於...的；有...傾向的 2. 俯臥的；面朝下的
exampleSentence: She is prone to exaggerate when telling stories.
exampleTranslation: 她講故事時往往會誇大其詞。

meaning: 發音; 宣告; 判決
exampleSentence: Could you please pronounce your name for me?
exampleTranslation: 你能幫我發音一下你的名字嗎？

meaning: 證據；證明；確鑿的資料
exampleSentence: The contract requires solid proof of insurance coverage before it can be signed.
exampleTranslation: 簽訂合約前，需要提供足夠的保險覆蓋證明。

meaning: 在職證明，用以確認員工目前在公司就職的正式文件。
exampleSentence: The bank requires proof of employment and a recent pay stub for the loan application.
exampleTranslation: 銀行要求提供在職證明和最近的薪資單才能申請貸款。

meaning: 校對；仔細檢查（文件、文章等）以找出並修正錯誤。
exampleSentence: Before submitting the report, please proofread it carefully for any typos or grammatical errors.
exampleTranslation: 提交報告前，請仔細校對，以確保沒有任何錯字或語法錯誤。

meaning: 支撐物；支持者；（戲劇、電影等的）道具；支撐；支持
exampleSentence: The government introduced new policies to act as a prop for the struggling economy.
exampleTranslation: 政府推出新政策，作為對困境中經濟的支撐。

meaning: 支撐、抵住；以...作為支撐物
exampleSentence: The company is propping up its struggling subsidiary with a significant financial injection.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正以大量資金注入來支撐其掙扎的子公司。

meaning: 丙烷，一種用於烹飪、加熱和工業用途的氣體燃料。
exampleSentence: Our company is seeking a reliable supplier of propane for our industrial generators.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在尋找丙烷的可靠供應商，用於我們的工業發電機。

meaning: 推動；驅動；促使（向前進展）
exampleSentence: The company's innovative marketing strategy propelled sales growth significantly.
exampleTranslation: 公司的創新行銷策略顯著地推動了銷售增長。

meaning: 適當的；恰當的；符合規定或標準的
exampleSentence: Please ensure that all expense reports are filed in the proper format before submission.
exampleTranslation: 請確保所有費用報告在提交前以適當的格式歸檔。

meaning: 適當的；正確的；恰當的
exampleSentence: Please ensure all documents are labeled properly before filing.
exampleTranslation: 請確保所有文件在歸檔前都已正確標記。

meaning: 特性、財產、屬性（尤指房地產或公司資產）
exampleSentence: The company is evaluating the properties to determine their market value.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在評估這些房地產，以確定其市場價值。

meaning: 資產；財產；所有權；特性
exampleSentence: The company's property portfolio includes several commercial buildings and residential units.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的資產組合包括多棟商業大樓和住宅單位。

meaning: 土地界線；產權邊界
exampleSentence: The surveyor confirmed that the new fence was built exactly on the property line.
exampleTranslation: 測量師確認新的圍欄完全建在產權界線上。

meaning: 支持者；倡導者
exampleSentence: The company's CEO is a strong proponent of remote work and flexible hours.
exampleTranslation: 公司的執行長是遠端工作和彈性工時的堅定支持者。

meaning: 比例；比率；部分
exampleSentence: The company's profit margin decreased due to a shift in the proportion of high-value to low-value sales.
exampleTranslation: 由於高價值銷售與低價值銷售的比例轉變，公司的利潤率有所下降。

meaning: 成比例的；相稱的
exampleSentence: The size of the bonus will be proportional to the company's annual profit.
exampleTranslation: 獎金的金額將與公司的年度利潤成比例。

meaning: 成比例的；與...成比例的
exampleSentence: The company's expenses must be proportionate to its revenue to ensure profitability.
exampleTranslation: 為了確保盈利能力，公司的支出必須與收入成比例。

meaning: 提案；建議方案（通常為書面形式，用於正式提出某項計畫或建議）
exampleSentence: The marketing team submitted a proposal for a new advertising campaign.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊提交了一份新的廣告活動提案。

meaning: 提案；建議方案（通常為書面形式，用於正式提交給主管或客戶）
exampleSentence: The marketing team submitted several proposals for the new advertising campaign.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊提交了幾個關於新廣告活動的提案。

meaning: 提議；建議（通常是正式的或書面的）
exampleSentence: The marketing team will propose a new advertising campaign to increase brand awareness.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊將向管理層提出一個新的廣告活動，以提高品牌知名度。

meaning: 提議；建議（通常指正式或經過考慮的提議）
exampleSentence: The marketing team proposed a new advertising campaign to increase brand awareness.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊提議了一項新的廣告活動以提高品牌知名度。

meaning: 建議；提議；主張；（商業）提議，交易；（待解決的）問題
exampleSentence: The board is currently reviewing a proposition to expand into new markets.
exampleTranslation: 董事會目前正在審查一項拓展新市場的提議。

meaning: 專有的；專賣的；私人擁有的；所有權的
exampleSentence: The software is proprietary, so users cannot modify its source code.
exampleTranslation: 這款軟體是專有的，因此用戶無法修改其原始碼。

meaning: 所有者；老闆（通常指小型企業或商店）
exampleSentence: The proprietor of the restaurant is responsible for ensuring food safety standards are met.
exampleTranslation: 餐廳的老闆負責確保食品安全標準得到滿足。

meaning: 獨資企業；所有權
exampleSentence: She decided to run her consulting business as a sole proprietorship to maintain full control.
exampleTranslation: 她決定以獨資企業的形式經營她的顧問業務，以保持完全的掌控權。

meaning: 優點與缺點；利弊分析
exampleSentence: Before making a decision, let's weigh the pros and cons of each proposal.
exampleTranslation: 在做出決定之前，讓我們權衡每個提案的優點和缺點。

meaning: 起訴；對...提出訴訟（通常指政府或機構對個人或公司）
exampleSentence: The company was prosecuted for violating environmental regulations.
exampleTranslation: 該公司因違反環境法規而被起訴。

meaning: 起訴；檢察官；訴訟
exampleSentence: The prosecution presented strong evidence against the defendant.
exampleTranslation: 檢察官提出了對被告不利的有力證據。

meaning: 檢察官
exampleSentence: The prosecutor presented strong evidence against the defendant.
exampleTranslation: 檢察官提出了對被告不利的有力證據。

meaning: 潛在客戶或機會；前景；展望
exampleSentence: Our sales team is focusing on identifying promising prospects in the tech industry.
exampleTranslation: 我們的銷售團隊正專注於在科技產業中尋找有潛力的客戶。

meaning: 潛在的；未來的；指可能發生的或被考慮的（尤指與商業或職業相關）
exampleSentence: The company is seeking prospective employees with strong communication skills.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在尋找具備良好溝通技巧的潛在員工。

meaning: 招股說明書；內容說明書；簡章
exampleSentence: Investors should carefully read the prospectus before making an investment decision.
exampleTranslation: 投資者在做出投資決策前應仔細閱讀招股說明書。

meaning: 繁榮; 昌盛; 成功
exampleSentence: Many businesses prospered during the economic boom.
exampleTranslation: 許多企業在經濟繁榮時期蓬勃發展。

meaning: 繁榮；成功；富裕，通常指經濟或商業上的成功和發展。
exampleSentence: The company's prosperity is directly linked to its ability to innovate and adapt to market changes.
exampleTranslation: 公司的繁榮與其創新和適應市場變化的能力直接相關。

meaning: 繁榮的；昌盛的；成功的
exampleSentence: The company has experienced a prosperous year, with profits increasing significantly.
exampleTranslation: 這家公司度過了繁榮的一年，利潤大幅增長。

meaning: 保護；防護；維護（安全、權益等）
exampleSentence: The company is committed to protecting its intellectual property rights.
exampleTranslation: 公司致力於保護其知識產權。

meaning: 保護；防護
exampleSentence: The company is investing in new security measures to protect its intellectual property.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在投資新的安全措施，以保護其知識產權。

meaning: 保護；防護措施
exampleSentence: The company is investing in cybersecurity protection to safeguard sensitive data.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在投資網路安全防護，以保護敏感數據。

meaning: 保護的，防護的；有保護心的
exampleSentence: Wearing a helmet is a good protective measure when cycling.
exampleTranslation: 騎自行車時戴頭盔是一種很好的保護措施。

meaning: 保護性圍裙，通常用於工作場所以保護衣物和身體。
exampleSentence: The warehouse staff are required to wear protective smocks when handling hazardous materials.
exampleTranslation: 倉庫員工在處理危險材料時必須穿著保護性圍裙。

meaning: 蛋白質
exampleSentence: Protein is essential for building and repairing tissues in the body.
exampleTranslation: 蛋白質對於身體組織的建造和修復至關重要。

meaning: 公開表達不同意或反對的行為，通常以示威或抗議的形式。
exampleSentence: Employees staged a protest against the proposed salary cuts.
exampleTranslation: 員工們發起抗議，反對提議的薪資削減。

meaning: 抗議者；示威者
exampleSentence: The protesters demanded immediate action from the government.
exampleTranslation: 抗議者要求政府立即採取行動。

meaning: 抗議活動；示威
exampleSentence: The company is closely monitoring the ongoing protests in the region to assess potential supply chain disruptions.
exampleTranslation: 公司正密切關注該地區持續的抗議活動，以評估潛在的供應鏈中斷。

meaning: 協議
exampleSentence: The company's new protocol initiative exceeded expectations in the first quarter.
exampleTranslation: 公司的新protocol計畫在第一季度超出了預期。

meaning: 質子
exampleSentence: A proton is a subatomic particle with a positive electric charge.
exampleTranslation: 質子是一種帶正電的亞原子粒子。

meaning: 原型；初步設計（通常用於產品開發階段，表示尚未正式發布的版本）
exampleSentence: The engineering team is working on a prototype of the new software application.
exampleTranslation: 工程團隊正在開發新軟體應用程式的原型。

meaning: 為…感到自豪；以…為榮
exampleSentence: Our team is proud to have completed the project ahead of schedule and under budget.
exampleTranslation: 我們的團隊很自豪地完成了專案，且在預定時間和預算內。

meaning: 證明；確證；驗證
exampleSentence: The company needs to prove its commitment to sustainability to attract investors.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要證明其對可持續發展的承諾，以吸引投資者。

meaning: 經證實的；已獲得驗證的；確鑿的
exampleSentence: The company's success is a proven track record of innovation and customer satisfaction.
exampleTranslation: 公司的成功是創新和客戶滿意度的確鑿記錄。

meaning: 提供；供給；供應
exampleSentence: Please provide all necessary documents for the visa application.
exampleTranslation: 請提供所有簽證申請所需的必要文件。

meaning: 提供；供給；供應
exampleSentence: The company provides employees with comprehensive training programs.
exampleTranslation: 公司為員工提供全面的培訓計畫。

meaning: （在特定條件下）提供、供給；（若...的話）
exampleSentence: The company will provide training to all new employees, provided they complete the onboarding process.
exampleTranslation: 公司將為所有新進員工提供培訓，前提是他們完成入職流程。

meaning: 供應商；提供者（指提供商品、服務或資訊的對象）
exampleSentence: Our company is seeking a reliable internet provider with competitive pricing.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在尋找一家具有競爭力價格的可靠網路供應商。

meaning: 供應商；提供者（指提供產品、服務或資訊的機構或個人）
exampleSentence: Our company is seeking reliable internet service providers.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在尋找可靠的網路服務供應商。

meaning: 提供；供給；供應
exampleSentence: The company provides comprehensive training programs for all new employees.
exampleTranslation: 公司為所有新進員工提供全面的培訓計畫。

meaning: 提供；供給；供應
exampleSentence: The company is providing employees with additional training to improve their skills.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在為員工提供額外的培訓以提升他們的技能。

meaning: 省份；（某一學術、活動等的）領域，範圍，本分
exampleSentence: The company operates in several provinces across the country.
exampleTranslation: 這家公司在全國的多個省份都有業務。

meaning: 屬於地方性的；省級的；（指）地方性的、鄉下的
exampleSentence: The company decided to expand its operations beyond the provincial market.
exampleTranslation: 公司決定將其業務拓展到省級市場以外。

meaning: 供應；備妥；條款；規定
exampleSentence: The contract includes a provision for handling unforeseen circumstances.
exampleTranslation: 這份合約包含處理不可預見情況的條款。

meaning: 激怒；引起（某人）憤怒或不滿，使產生反應
exampleSentence: The manager's harsh criticism provoked a strong reaction from the team.
exampleTranslation: 經理嚴厲的批評激發了團隊強烈反彈。

meaning: 挑釁的；引起爭論的；激怒的
exampleSentence: The manager warned the employee that his provocative comments could damage the company's reputation.
exampleTranslation: 經理警告這位員工，他的挑釁言論可能會損害公司的聲譽。

meaning: 接近程度；鄰近性
exampleSentence: The office is located in close proximity to the subway station, making it convenient for employees.
exampleTranslation: 辦公室鄰近捷運站，方便員工通勤。

meaning: 代理人；代理權；代理伺服器
exampleSentence: Shareholders can appoint a proxy to vote on their behalf at the annual meeting.
exampleTranslation: 股東可以委派代理人在年度會議上代為投票。

meaning: 謹慎的；深謀遠慮的；節儉的
exampleSentence: It's prudent to save money for a rainy day.
exampleTranslation: 未雨綢繆地儲蓄是謹慎的做法。

meaning: 精神病學的；精神病的
exampleSentence: She is receiving psychiatric treatment for her depression.
exampleTranslation: 她正在接受精神疾病治療以改善她的憂鬱症。

meaning: 與心理學相關的；涉及心理過程或心理狀態的。
exampleSentence: The employee's performance issues may be due to psychological factors, requiring a sensitive approach.
exampleTranslation: 員工的績效問題可能源於心理因素，需要謹慎處理。

meaning: 心理學家
exampleSentence: She decided to consult a psychologist to help her deal with stress.
exampleTranslation: 她決定諮詢一位心理學家來幫助她處理壓力。

meaning: 心理學；心理學研究
exampleSentence: The HR department is considering incorporating psychological assessments into the hiring process.
exampleTranslation: 人資部門正在考慮將心理測驗納入招聘流程。

meaning: 英式酒吧，通常提供餐飲和社交場所。
exampleSentence: After a long day of negotiations, the team decided to unwind at a local pub.
exampleTranslation: 經過一天的談判，團隊決定在一家當地酒吧放鬆一下。

meaning: 公開的；公共的；屬於大眾的
exampleSentence: The company released a public statement addressing the recent allegations.
exampleTranslation: 公司發布了一份公開聲明，以回應最近的指控。

meaning: 公開展示；公共展示（通常指產品、廣告或資訊）
exampleSentence: The company invested heavily in a public display of its new electric vehicle at the auto show.
exampleTranslation: 該公司在汽車展覽上投入巨資公開展示其新款電動汽車。

meaning: 公開聽證會；公開聽取意見的會議，通常由政府機構或公司舉辦，以聽取公眾對特定議題的回饋。
exampleSentence: The city council will hold a public hearing next week to discuss the proposed development project.
exampleTranslation: 市政府下週將舉行公開聽證會，討論擬議的開發項目。

meaning: 法定假日，通常指政府或公司規定不需上班或上課的日子。
exampleSentence: Please note that our office will be closed on the public holiday.
exampleTranslation: 請注意，我們的辦公室將在法定假日休市。

meaning: 公共圖書館：由政府或非營利機構營運，向公眾開放的圖書館，提供書籍、期刊、數位資源等資訊服務。
exampleSentence: The company encourages employees to utilize the public library for research and professional development.
exampleTranslation: 公司鼓勵員工利用公共圖書館進行研究和專業發展。

meaning: 公共公園，通常為政府或社區維護的開放空間，供公眾休憩娛樂。
exampleSentence: The company is considering building a new office complex near a public park to attract employees.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在考慮在公共公園附近建造新的辦公綜合大樓，以吸引員工。

meaning: 公開個人檔案，通常指在社交媒體或專業網站上可供公眾瀏覽的個人資料。
exampleSentence: Before joining the company, he carefully reviewed his public profile on LinkedIn.
exampleTranslation: 在加入公司之前，他仔細審閱了他在 LinkedIn 上的公開個人檔案。

meaning: 公共關係部門，負責塑造和維護企業與公眾之間的良好關係，包括媒體溝通、危機管理、品牌形象塑造等。
exampleSentence: The public relations department is responsible for managing the company's image and reputation.
exampleTranslation: 公共關係部門負責管理公司的形象和聲譽。

meaning: 公開演講；公開發表演講
exampleSentence: The CEO's public speaking skills significantly enhanced the company's image.
exampleTranslation: 執行長公開演講的技巧顯著提升了公司的形象。

meaning: 公共交通系統，指由政府或私人機構運營，向公眾開放的交通工具，如巴士、火車、地鐵等。
exampleSentence: The company encourages employees to use public transportation to reduce carbon emissions.
exampleTranslation: 公司鼓勵員工使用公共交通工具以減少碳排放。

meaning: 出版物；發行物（通常指書籍、雜誌、報紙等）
exampleSentence: The company's latest publication highlights its commitment to sustainability.
exampleTranslation: 這家公司的最新出版物強調了其對可持續發展的承諾。

meaning: 出版公司；負責書籍、雜誌等出版品的公司。
exampleSentence: Our marketing team is collaborating with the publication company to promote the new book.
exampleTranslation: 我們的行銷團隊正在與出版公司合作推廣這本新書。

meaning: 出版物；發行物（通常指公司、組織或政府發行的文件、報告、雜誌等）
exampleSentence: The company's annual publications include a financial report and a sustainability overview.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的年度出版物包括財務報告和可持續發展概述。

meaning: 公開傳播；公眾注意，通常指透過媒體的宣傳活動。
exampleSentence: The company launched a major publicity campaign to promote its new product.
exampleTranslation: 該公司啟動了一項大型宣傳活動，以推廣其新產品。

meaning: 公開宣傳；廣泛宣佈（某事）
exampleSentence: The company plans to publicize its new product line through social media and online advertising.
exampleTranslation: 公司計畫透過社群媒體和線上廣告來宣傳其新產品線。

meaning: 公開地；當眾地
exampleSentence: The company publicly announced its new product line.
exampleTranslation: 該公司公開宣布了其新產品線。

meaning: 發布；公佈（資訊、報告等）
exampleSentence: The company plans to publish its quarterly earnings report next week.
exampleTranslation: 公司計劃下週發布其季度盈利報告。

meaning: 已發表的；已發布的（指文件、報告、公告等正式對外公開的狀態）
exampleSentence: The quarterly financial report was published on the company intranet yesterday.
exampleTranslation: 本公司季度財務報告已於昨日在內部網路上發布。

meaning: 出版商；發行人（通常指書籍、雜誌等）
exampleSentence: The publisher is seeking manuscripts for their upcoming business journal.
exampleTranslation: 該出版商正在尋找其即將發行的商業雜誌的手稿。

meaning: 出版；發行（書籍、雜誌等）
exampleSentence: The company is publishing a new marketing report next month.
exampleTranslation: 公司下個月將發行一份新的行銷報告。

meaning: 布丁；（尤指）甜點，通常為果味或巧克力口味的凝固食品。
exampleSentence: The hotel offers a complimentary dessert buffet featuring various puddings and pastries.
exampleTranslation: 這家飯店提供免費的甜點自助餐，包含各種布丁和點心。

meaning: 一陣噴氣或煙霧；泡芙；（報章等的）吹捧；喘氣；噴出；使膨脹
exampleSentence: A puff of smoke escaped from the old engine.
exampleTranslation: 一陣煙霧從老舊的引擎中冒出。

meaning: （印度或巴基斯坦的）米飯料理，通常以香料和蔬菜或肉類烹調而成。
exampleSentence: The restaurant offers a variety of flavorful pulao dishes, including vegetable and chicken options.
exampleTranslation: 這家餐廳提供多種美味的米飯料理，包括蔬菜和雞肉口味。

meaning: 拉；牽引；(引導、吸引)
exampleSentence: The logistics team needs to pull the shipment forward to meet the delivery deadline.
exampleTranslation: 物流團隊需要將貨物提前拉到前線，以滿足交貨期限。

meaning: 將...拉下；降低（價格、數量等）；拆除（結構）
exampleSentence: The company decided to pull down the old warehouse to make way for a new office building.
exampleTranslation: 公司決定拆除舊倉庫，以便為新的辦公大樓讓出空間。

meaning: 駛入（車輛）；停靠（車輛）
exampleSentence: The taxi pulled into the hotel driveway.
exampleTranslation: 計程車駛入飯店的車道。

meaning: 從（某物）中拉出；（車輛）駛出（某處）；（計畫、提案等）退出
exampleSentence: The company decided to pull out of the joint venture due to financial difficulties.
exampleTranslation: 由於財務困難，公司決定退出合資企業。

meaning: 清除雜草，拔除雜草
exampleSentence: The groundskeeper needs to pull weeds from the flowerbeds before the company event.
exampleTranslation: 在公司活動前，園丁需要從花壇中清除雜草。

meaning: 拉；牽；提取；拔出（通常指用力或突然的動作）
exampleSentence: The shipping department pulled the order records to verify the delivery status.
exampleTranslation: 運輸部門提取了訂單記錄以核實交貨狀態。

meaning: 滑輪；定滑輪；動滑輪
exampleSentence: The construction workers used a pulley system to lift the heavy beams to the roof.
exampleTranslation: 建築工人使用滑輪系統將沉重的橫樑吊到屋頂。

meaning: 套頭衫，套頭毛衣
exampleSentence: She chose a comfortable cotton pullover for her casual day out.
exampleTranslation: 她選擇了一件舒適的棉質套頭衫，以便輕鬆外出。

meaning: 脈搏；（電腦）訊號、節奏
exampleSentence: The server's pulse rate dropped unexpectedly, indicating a potential hardware failure.
exampleTranslation: 伺服器的脈搏速率意外下降，表示可能存在硬體故障。

meaning: （機械、設備）幫浦；（價格、數量等）提升，提高
exampleSentence: The logistics department needs to order new pumps for the water treatment facility.
exampleTranslation: 物流部門需要為水處理設施訂購新的幫浦。

meaning: （用拳頭）打；（電腦）鍵入，輸入
exampleSentence: He punched in his employee ID to access the system.
exampleTranslation: 他輸入了他的員工 ID 以訪問系統。

meaning: 守時的；準時的
exampleSentence: It's important to be punctual for meetings to show respect for others' time.
exampleTranslation: 開會準時很重要，這表示你尊重他人的時間。

meaning: 準時地；按時地（強調遵守時間表或約定）
exampleSentence: Please submit your expense reports punctually to ensure timely reimbursement.
exampleTranslation: 請準時提交您的費用報告，以確保及時報銷。

meaning: 懲罰；處罰；施以懲戒
exampleSentence: The company will punish employees who violate the code of conduct.
exampleTranslation: 公司將懲罰違反行為準則的員工。

meaning: 懲罰；處罰；制裁
exampleSentence: The company has a strict policy regarding punishment for employees who violate company regulations.
exampleTranslation: 公司對於違反公司規章的員工的處罰有嚴格的政策。

meaning: 學生；瞳孔
exampleSentence: The teacher praised the diligent pupil for her excellent grades.
exampleTranslation: 老師稱讚那位勤奮的學生獲得了優異的成績。

meaning: 幼犬，小狗
exampleSentence: The children were excited to play with the new puppy.
exampleTranslation: 孩子們很興奮能和這隻新來的小狗玩耍。

meaning: 購買；採購
exampleSentence: The company plans to purchase new equipment to improve production efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 公司計劃採購新設備以提高生產效率。

meaning: 購買訂單：一份正式文件，由買方發出，用於正式要求供應商提供特定商品或服務，並包含數量、價格、交貨日期等詳細資訊。
exampleSentence: The accounting department needs to verify all purchase orders before processing payments.
exampleTranslation: 會計部門需要核對所有購買訂單，然後才能處理付款。

meaning: 購買；採購
exampleSentence: The company purchased a new server to improve data processing speed.
exampleTranslation: 公司購買了新的伺服器以提高資料處理速度。

meaning: 採購者；買方；購買人
exampleSentence: The purchaser is responsible for inspecting the goods upon delivery.
exampleTranslation: 採購者有責任在貨物交付時進行檢查。

meaning: 購買行為；購買品項
exampleSentence: The company's annual purchases of raw materials totaled over $5 million.
exampleTranslation: 公司每年購買的原材料總額超過 500 萬美元。

meaning: 採購；購買（通常指企業或組織的正式採購流程）
exampleSentence: The purchasing department is responsible for negotiating contracts with suppliers.
exampleTranslation: 採購部門負責與供應商協商合約。

meaning: 純粹的；未經摻雜的；絕對的
exampleSentence: The company prides itself on using pure ingredients in its products.
exampleTranslation: 該公司以其產品中使用純淨成分為傲。

meaning: 純粹地；完全地；僅僅
exampleSentence: The decision was purely based on the facts, not on personal opinions.
exampleTranslation: 這個決定純粹是基於事實，而非個人意見。

meaning: 使純淨；去除雜質（尤指水、空氣或流程）
exampleSentence: The company invested in a new water purification system to ensure the safety of its products.
exampleTranslation: 公司投資了新的水淨化系統，以確保其產品的安全。

meaning: 目的；意圖；目標
exampleSentence: The main purpose of this meeting is to discuss the upcoming marketing campaign.
exampleTranslation: 這次會議的主要目的是討論即將到來的行銷活動。

meaning: 目的；用途；意圖（通常指多個目的）
exampleSentence: The company's main purposes are to increase profits and expand its market share.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的主要目的包括提高利潤和擴大市場份額。

meaning: 錢包；手提包；財政；獎金
exampleSentence: She reached into her purse to find her wallet.
exampleTranslation: 她伸手進錢包找她的皮夾。

meaning: 事務長；管事；（船隻、客機等的）座艙長，空服經理
exampleSentence: The purser is responsible for all financial transactions and passenger services on board the ship.
exampleTranslation: 事務長負責船上所有財務交易和旅客服務。

meaning: 依照；根據；按照（尤指法律、協議或計劃）
exampleSentence: Pursuant to the contract, payment is due within 30 days of invoice.
exampleTranslation: 根據合約，款項應在發票開立後30天內支付。

meaning: 追求；積極追尋（目標、事業、夢想等）
exampleSentence: The company encourages employees to pursue professional development opportunities.
exampleTranslation: 公司鼓勵員工積極追求專業發展機會。

meaning: 積極追求；致力於（某目標或事業）
exampleSentence: The company is pursuing a new market segment to increase its revenue.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在積極開拓新的市場區域以增加收入。

meaning: 追求；致力於（某目標或事業）
exampleSentence: The company's primary pursuit is to expand its market share in Asia.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的主要追求是擴大其在亞洲的市場份額。

meaning: 推動；用力將某物移開；(比喻)促使；鼓勵
exampleSentence: Please push the button to activate the elevator.
exampleTranslation: 請按下按鈕以啟動電梯。

meaning: 延遲、推遲（時間、日期、會議等）；反對、抵制（提議、計畫等)
exampleSentence: The project deadline was pushed back due to unforeseen circumstances.
exampleTranslation: 由於突發狀況，專案截止日期被延遲了。

meaning: 強行擠過；憑藉毅力突破重重阻礙
exampleSentence: During the busy trade show, attendees often have to push their way through the crowds to reach the booths.
exampleTranslation: 在繁忙的貿易展覽中，參與者經常需要強行擠過人群才能到達展位。

meaning: 伏地挺身
exampleSentence: He does 50 pushups every morning as part of his routine.
exampleTranslation: 他每天早上做50個伏地挺身，作為他日常習慣的一部分。

meaning: 使…面臨危險；將…置於險境
exampleSentence: Delaying the project could put the company's reputation in jeopardy.
exampleTranslation: 延遲專案可能會使公司的聲譽面臨危險。

meaning: 將...公開出售；將...列為出售
exampleSentence: The company decided to put the excess inventory out for sale at a discounted price.
exampleTranslation: 公司決定將多餘的庫存以折扣價公開出售。

meaning: 催促；加快處理速度
exampleSentence: We need to put a rush on this order to ensure it arrives before the conference.
exampleTranslation: 我們需要加快這個訂單的處理速度，以確保它在會議前送達。

meaning: 對...造成壓力或負擔；使...感到吃力
exampleSentence: The recent increase in production costs has put a strain on our profit margins.
exampleTranslation: 最近的生產成本增加對我們的利潤空間造成了壓力。

meaning: 收納、歸位；將物品放置於指定位置
exampleSentence: Please put away the documents in the filing cabinet after the meeting.
exampleTranslation: 會議結束後，請將文件收納到檔案櫃中。

meaning: 放下；記錄；批評（貶義）；停止（某項活動）
exampleSentence: Please put down your name and employee ID on the attendance sheet.
exampleTranslation: 請在考勤表上填寫您的姓名和員工編號。

meaning: 提出（想法、建議、計畫等），努力嘗試
exampleSentence: The marketing team needs to put forth a new strategy to increase brand awareness.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊需要提出一個新的策略來提高品牌知名度。

meaning: 提出（建議、計畫、觀點等）；延遲（時間、日期等）
exampleSentence: The marketing team will put forward a new advertising campaign next week.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊下週將會提出一個新的廣告活動。

meaning: 投入；放置；安裝；（資料）輸入
exampleSentence: Please put the report on my desk before the meeting.
exampleTranslation: 請在會議前將報告放在我的桌上。

meaning: 提出報價；提交出價（通常指在競標、購買房產等情況下）
exampleSentence: We're waiting to see if anyone puts in an offer on the property.
exampleTranslation: 我們正在等待看看是否有人對這棟房產提出報價。

meaning: 整理歸位；將...按順序擺放
exampleSentence: Could you please put the documents in order on your desk?
exampleTranslation: 請您整理桌面上的文件。

meaning: 將...放置於指定位置；實施；執行
exampleSentence: The project manager needs to put the new safety protocols in place immediately.
exampleTranslation: 專案經理需要立即將新的安全協議實施到位。

meaning: 加班；額外工作
exampleSentence: Due to the approaching deadline, several team members had to put in some overtime this week.
exampleTranslation: 由於截止日期逼近，本週有幾位團隊成員不得不加班。

meaning: 實施；執行（計畫、政策等）
exampleSentence: The company will put the new policy into effect next Monday.
exampleTranslation: 公司將在下週一實施新的政策。

meaning: 延遲、推遲（某事）；將...延後
exampleSentence: We had to put off the meeting due to a scheduling conflict.
exampleTranslation: 由於時間安排衝突，我們不得不延遲會議。

meaning: 穿戴（衣服、飾品等）；開啟（燈、電視等）
exampleSentence: Please put on your name badge before entering the conference room.
exampleTranslation: 請在進入會議室之前，請佩戴您的姓名標籤。

meaning: 陳列展示；擺放供人觀賞
exampleSentence: The store manager instructed the staff to put out the new collection for display near the entrance.
exampleTranslation: 店長指示員工將新款系列陳列在入口附近供人觀賞。

meaning: 容忍；忍受（不愉快的情況或行為）
exampleSentence: I can't put up with his constant complaining anymore; we need to address this issue.
exampleTranslation: 我再也無法容忍他不斷抱怨了；我們需要解決這個問題。

meaning: 謎題，難題；使困惑，使費解
exampleSentence: The detective tried to piece together the puzzle of the missing documents.
exampleTranslation: 偵探試圖拼湊出文件失蹤的謎團。

meaning: 金字塔；錐體；層級組織
exampleSentence: The Great Pyramid of Giza is one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World.
exampleTranslation: 吉薩大金字塔是世界七大奇蹟之一。

meaning: 金字塔；（比喻）龐大的組織或系統
exampleSentence: The tour guide highlighted the historical significance of the pyramids during the excursion.
exampleTranslation: 導遊在這次旅行中強調了金字塔的歷史意義。

meaning: 四個；由四個部分組成的
exampleSentence: The company is investing in a new quad-core processor to improve system performance.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在投資新的四核心處理器以提升系統效能。

meaning: 股四頭肌
exampleSentence: He felt a strain in his quadricep after the long run.
exampleTranslation: 長跑後，他感覺股四頭肌有些拉傷。

meaning: 資格；符合條件的證明
exampleSentence: The candidate must possess the necessary qualifications for the position.
exampleTranslation: 候選人必須具備該職位所需的資格。

meaning: 資歷；資格；學歷與經驗證明
exampleSentence: The job description lists the required qualifications, including a bachelor's degree and five years of experience.
exampleTranslation: 工作描述列出了所需的資歷，包括學士學位和五年的經驗。

meaning: 具備資格的；符合要求的；勝任的
exampleSentence: The candidate is highly qualified for the position, possessing extensive experience in project management.
exampleTranslation: 這位候選人非常勝任這個職位，擁有豐富的專案管理經驗。

meaning: 符合資格；達到標準；勝任
exampleSentence: To qualify for the promotion, employees must have at least five years of experience.
exampleTranslation: 為了符合升遷資格，員工必須至少有五年的經驗。

meaning: 符合資格；達到標準；勝任
exampleSentence: To qualify for the management trainee program, candidates must have a bachelor's degree and two years of relevant experience.
exampleTranslation: 為了符合管理培訓計畫的資格，候選人必須具備學士學位和兩年的相關經驗。

meaning: 質性的；定性的；與品質有關的（而非數量）
exampleSentence: The research primarily focused on collecting qualitative data through interviews and focus groups.
exampleTranslation: 這項研究主要透過訪談和焦點小組收集質性資料。

meaning: 品質；優良程度；水準
exampleSentence: The company is committed to maintaining the highest quality standards for its products.
exampleTranslation: 公司致力於維持其產品的最高品質標準。

meaning: 品質管制；品質控制，指確保產品或服務符合特定標準和規格的流程。
exampleSentence: Our company places a high priority on quality control to ensure customer satisfaction.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司非常重視品質管制，以確保客戶滿意度。

meaning: 衡量、估算（某事物的大小、數量或程度），通常涉及使用數字或數據。
exampleSentence: The marketing team needs to quantify the impact of the new advertising campaign.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊需要衡量新廣告活動的影響。

meaning: 量化的；數量的；定量的
exampleSentence: The research involved a quantitative analysis of market data.
exampleTranslation: 這項研究包含了對市場數據的量化分析。

meaning: 數量；份數；大批數量
exampleSentence: We need to confirm the quantity of the order before proceeding with production.
exampleTranslation: 在開始生產之前，我們需要確認訂單的數量。

meaning: 物理學中能量或物質的最小不可分割單位；或指其相關的物理現象、理論。
exampleSentence: In quantum mechanics, energy is absorbed or emitted in discrete units called quanta.
exampleTranslation: 在量子力學中，能量以稱為「量子」的離散單位被吸收或發射。

meaning: 爭吵；口角；爭論
exampleSentence: The negotiation broke down after a heated quarrel between the two parties.
exampleTranslation: 雙方在激烈的爭吵後，談判破裂。

meaning: 指一年中的三個月期間（財務季），或指四分之一的量；亦可作動詞，表示提供住宿或安置（如安置部隊）。
exampleSentence: Our sales increased by 8% in the second quarter compared with the same period last year.
exampleTranslation: 與去年同期相比，我們第二季的銷售額增長了 8%。

meaning: 每季；每四分之一年度（通常指財務報告或計畫），指每季一次的。
exampleSentence: The company releases its quarterly earnings report every three months.
exampleTranslation: 該公司每三個月發布一次季度盈利報告。

meaning: 四分之一；（硬幣）四分之一美元
exampleSentence: The company's profits increased by a quarter this fiscal year.
exampleTranslation: 本財年，公司的利潤增加了四分之一。

meaning: 準; 半; 類似 (通常用作複合詞的前綴，表示『幾乎』或『不完全地』)
exampleSentence: The organization functions as a quasi-governmental agency.
exampleTranslation: 該組織作為一個準政府機構運作。

meaning: 查詢；提問（通常指正式或書面的請求資訊）
exampleSentence: The IT department received a query regarding the new software update.
exampleTranslation: 資訊部門收到關於新軟體更新的查詢。

meaning: 提問；問題；詢問
exampleSentence: The interviewer asked several questions about my previous experience.
exampleTranslation: 面試官問了我幾個關於之前經驗的問題。

meaning: 可疑的；值得質疑的；品質或可靠性令人懷疑的。
exampleSentence: The company's accounting practices are questionable and require further investigation.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的會計慣例值得質疑，需要進一步調查。

meaning: 可疑地；令人懷疑地（表示對某事物的真實性或可靠性存在疑問）
exampleSentence: The company's claims about its environmental practices were questionably accurate.
exampleTranslation: 該公司關於其環境保護措施的聲明，其準確性令人懷疑。

meaning: 質疑；審問；詢問（某人關於某事）
exampleSentence: The auditor questioned the accuracy of the financial records.
exampleTranslation: 審計員質疑了財務記錄的準確性。

meaning: 問卷；調查表
exampleSentence: The department implemented innovative questionnaire procedures to improve operational efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 部門實施創新的questionnaire程序以提高營運效率。

meaning: 提問；問題（通常指一系列的提問或測試題目）
exampleSentence: The interviewer asked several questions to assess the candidate's experience.
exampleTranslation: 面試官為了評估候選人的經驗，提出了幾個問題。

meaning: 排隊；隊伍
exampleSentence: Employees are asked to queue up for their ID badges after the security check.
exampleTranslation: 員工在安全檢查後需排隊領取身份證件。

meaning: 快的;迅速的;立即的;機敏的
exampleSentence: We need a quick decision on this proposal to meet the deadline.
exampleTranslation: 我們需要對這項提案做出快速決定，才能趕上截止日期。

meaning: 迅速地；快速地（表示動作或完成某事的速度很快）
exampleSentence: The report needs to be completed quickly to meet the deadline.
exampleTranslation: 為了趕上截止日期，報告需要迅速完成。

meaning: 安靜的；寂靜的；不喧鬧的
exampleSentence: Please keep the volume down; we need a quiet environment to concentrate on our work.
exampleTranslation: 請降低音量；我們需要一個安靜的環境來專注於工作。

meaning: 安靜地；悄悄地
exampleSentence: Please complete the report quietly so as not to disturb your colleagues.
exampleTranslation: 請安靜地完成報告，以免打擾您的同事。

meaning: 辭職；停止從事某項工作或活動
exampleSentence: John decided to quit his position as sales manager after receiving a better offer.
exampleTranslation: 約翰在收到更好的工作機會後，決定辭去銷售經理的職位。

meaning: 相當；頗；表示程度，但通常不表示完全。
exampleSentence: The project is quite challenging, but we're confident we can deliver on time.
exampleTranslation: 這個專案相當具有挑戰性，但我們有信心能夠按時交付。

meaning: 辭職；停止從事
exampleSentence: He decided to quit his job to pursue his dream of starting a business.
exampleTranslation: 他決定辭職，以追求創業的夢想。

meaning: 問答遊戲, 測驗; 詢問, 盤問
exampleSentence: The teacher gave us a short quiz on the vocabulary words.
exampleTranslation: 老師給我們做了一個關於詞彙的簡短測驗。

meaning: 配額；定額；限額；（移民、進口商品等的）限額
exampleSentence: Our sales team failed to meet their quarterly quota this quarter.
exampleTranslation: 我們的銷售團隊本季度未能達到他們的季度配額。

meaning: 報價；引述語句；引用
exampleSentence: We are awaiting the quotation for the new office furniture.
exampleTranslation: 我們正在等待關於新辦公室家具的報價。

meaning: 引用；報價；引述
exampleSentence: Could you please provide a quote for 100 units of this product?
exampleTranslation: 您能為這款產品的 100 個單位提供報價嗎？

meaning: 競賽；種族；（公司）競爭
exampleSentence: The company is in a fierce race to secure market share.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正處於激烈的市場競爭中。

meaning: 競賽；種族；比賽
exampleSentence: The company is conducting races to identify the most efficient logistics routes.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在進行競賽，以找出最有效的物流路線。

meaning: 種族的；人種的
exampleSentence: The company is committed to promoting racial equality in the workplace.
exampleTranslation: 該公司致力於在工作場所推動種族平等。

meaning: 貨架；置物架；堆積物
exampleSentence: The warehouse staff are responsible for organizing the inventory on the racks.
exampleTranslation: 倉庫員工負責在貨架上整理庫存。

meaning: 雷達，一種利用無線電波探測物體位置和距離的系統，常用於交通、物流和安全監控。
exampleSentence: The shipping company uses radar technology to track the location of its cargo containers.
exampleTranslation: 這家運輸公司使用雷達技術來追蹤貨櫃的位置。

meaning: 散發（熱、光、氣味等）；傳播（影響、情感等）
exampleSentence: The new office building radiates a modern and professional image.
exampleTranslation: 這棟新辦公大樓散發著現代且專業的形象。

meaning: 輻射；放射線；放射物；放射療法
exampleSentence: The hospital uses radiation therapy to treat certain types of cancer.
exampleTranslation: 醫院使用放射線療法治療某些類型的癌症。

meaning: 激進的；根本的；徹底的；極端的 (adj.) 激進分子；基數；根號 (n.)
exampleSentence: The company is planning a radical change to its marketing strategy.
exampleTranslation: 公司正計畫對其行銷策略進行徹底的改革。

meaning: 徹底地；根本地；大幅度地（表示改變或不同程度的變化）
exampleSentence: The company decided to radically restructure its operations to improve efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 公司決定徹底重組其營運，以提高效率。

meaning: 無線電；廣播（設備或媒體）
exampleSentence: Our marketing team uses radio advertising to reach a wider audience.
exampleTranslation: 我們的行銷團隊使用廣播廣告來接觸更廣泛的受眾。

meaning: 半徑；橈骨；輻射範圍；活動範圍
exampleSentence: The radius of the Earth is approximately 6,371 kilometers.
exampleTranslation: 地球的半徑大約是6,371公里。

meaning: 摸彩活動；抽獎
exampleSentence: The company is holding a raffle to raise money for charity.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在舉辦摸彩活動以募集慈善捐款。

meaning: 狂怒；盛怒；暴怒；怒不可遏；猛烈發怒；肆虐
exampleSentence: His face was contorted with rage after he heard the news.
exampleTranslation: 聽到這個消息後，他氣得臉部扭曲變形。

meaning: 突擊檢查；搜查（通常指未經通知或突然進行的檢查或搜查，用於發現違規行為或非法物品）
exampleSentence: Customs officials conducted a surprise raid on the warehouse to check for smuggled goods.
exampleTranslation: 海關人員突擊搜查了倉庫，以檢查是否有走私貨物。

meaning: 軌道；鐵軌；（比喻）限制、束縛
exampleSentence: The train was delayed due to a problem with the rails.
exampleTranslation: 由於鐵軌出現問題，火車延誤了。

meaning: 鐵路系統；鐵道網絡
exampleSentence: The company is investing heavily in upgrading the railway network to improve efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在大力投資鐵路網絡的升級，以提高效率。

meaning: 降雨；雨水
exampleSentence: The meeting has been postponed due to heavy rain.
exampleTranslation: 由於大雨，會議已延遲。

meaning: 延期邀請或計畫，通常是為了表示歉意並表示未來會重新安排。
exampleSentence: I'm so sorry, but I have to rain check our lunch meeting due to a last-minute project deadline.
exampleTranslation: 非常抱歉，因為臨時有專案截止日期，我不得不延期我們的午餐會議。

meaning: 熱帶雨林，指降雨量豐富、植被茂盛的熱帶地區。
exampleSentence: The company is committed to sustainable tourism, minimizing the impact on fragile ecosystems like the Amazon rain forest.
exampleTranslation: 該公司致力於永續旅遊，盡量減少對脆弱生態系統（如亞馬遜雨林）的影響。

meaning: 無論天氣如何，無論好壞，持續進行或完成。
exampleSentence: We're committed to delivering the project on time, rain or shine.
exampleTranslation: 我們承諾無論天氣如何，都會準時交付項目。

meaning: 短暫的降雨，通常指持續時間較短且強度適中的降雨。
exampleSentence: The meeting was briefly interrupted by a rain shower, but we resumed shortly after.
exampleTranslation: 會議因為一陣短暫的降雨中斷了，但我們很快就恢復了。

meaning: 雨衣；防水外套
exampleSentence: The company provides employees with raincoats for outdoor deliveries during the rainy season.
exampleTranslation: 公司在雨季為從事戶外派送工作的員工提供雨衣。

meaning: 降雨量; 雨量
exampleSentence: The region experienced record rainfall last month.
exampleTranslation: 該地區上個月經歷了創紀錄的降雨量。

meaning: 降雨；下雨
exampleSentence: The flight has been delayed due to heavy rains in the area.
exampleTranslation: 由於該地區降雨量大，航班已延誤。

meaning: 暴風雨；強烈降雨，通常伴隨雷電和強風。
exampleSentence: Due to the unexpected rainstorm, the outdoor event has been postponed until next week.
exampleTranslation: 由於突如其來的暴風雨，戶外活動已延遲至下週舉行。

meaning: 多雨的；下雨的
exampleSentence: The flight was delayed due to the rainy weather conditions.
exampleTranslation: 由於多雨的天氣狀況，航班延誤了。

meaning: 提升；提高；舉起；引起（話題）
exampleSentence: The company decided to raise salaries by 5% to retain top talent.
exampleTranslation: 為了留住優秀人才，公司決定將薪資提高 5%。

meaning: 舉手示意；表示同意或發言
exampleSentence: Could you please raise your hand if you have any questions about the project timeline?
exampleTranslation: 如果您對專案時程有任何問題，請舉手示意。

meaning: （物體）抬高；（價格、薪資等）提高；（孩子）養育
exampleSentence: The company raised prices by 5% due to increased production costs.
exampleTranslation: 由於生產成本增加，公司將價格提高了 5%。

meaning: 提升、提高（價格、薪資、標準等）；培養、撫養（子女）
exampleSentence: The company is raising salaries by 5% to retain top talent.
exampleTranslation: 為了留住優秀人才，公司將調薪 5%。

meaning: 清理落葉；耙除落葉
exampleSentence: The groundskeeper will rake the leaves from the parking lot before the conference.
exampleTranslation: 研討會之前，園丁會將停車場的落葉耙除。

meaning: 聚集；集結；反彈（價格、銷售額等）
exampleSentence: Despite the initial setback, the sales team managed to rally and exceed their quarterly target.
exampleTranslation: 儘管一開始遇到挫折，銷售團隊還是成功集結並超額完成季度目標。

meaning: 框架；結構；邊框
exampleSentence: The company is restructuring its operational framework to improve efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在重組其營運框架以提高效率。

meaning: 拉麵；一種日本麵食，通常以湯頭為基底，加入肉、蔬菜等配料。
exampleSentence: The company cafeteria will offer ramen as a new lunch option starting next week.
exampleTranslation: 公司食堂將從下週開始提供拉麵作為新的午餐選擇。

meaning: 斜坡；坡道，通常用於方便無障礙通行或貨物運輸。
exampleSentence: The warehouse is equipped with a loading ramp for efficient truck access.
exampleTranslation: 該倉庫配備了貨物坡道，方便卡車高效地進出。

meaning: 牧場；大型農場（通常指畜牧業或耕種的農場）
exampleSentence: The company is looking for a supplier of organic beef from a reputable ranch.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在尋找一家信譽良好的牧場提供的有機牛肉供應商。

meaning: 隨機的；任意的；無規則的；胡亂的；偶然的。在電腦科學、統計學、數學等領域中，通常指沒有特定模式或可預測性的事件或序列。
exampleSentence: The results of the survey were based on a random sample of 1,000 participants.
exampleTranslation: 這項調查的結果是基於對1,000名參與者的隨機抽樣。

meaning: 隨機化; 隨機排列
exampleSentence: It's important to randomize the samples to ensure unbiased results in the experiment.
exampleTranslation: 在實驗中，將樣本隨機化很重要，以確保結果沒有偏差。

meaning: 隨機地；不按特定順序或模式
exampleSentence: The survey participants were selected randomly from the company's database.
exampleTranslation: 調查參與者是從公司資料庫中隨機選取的。

meaning: 範圍；幅度；一系列
exampleSentence: The salary range for this position is between $50,000 and $70,000 annually.
exampleTranslation: 這個職位的薪資範圍是每年 5 萬到 7 萬美元。

meaning: 巡邏員；保護員（通常指國家公園或自然保護區的巡邏人員，負責維護秩序、保護生態環境）
exampleSentence: The park rangers are responsible for ensuring visitor safety and protecting the wildlife.
exampleTranslation: 公園巡邏員負責確保遊客安全並保護野生動物。

meaning: 等級；排名；職等
exampleSentence: The company uses a performance-based ranking system to determine salary increases.
exampleTranslation: 公司使用基於績效的排名系統來決定薪資調整。

meaning: 排名；等級；排序
exampleSentence: Our company's ranking in the industry has improved significantly this year.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司今年的產業排名有了顯著提升。

meaning: 強姦；性侵犯；強姦罪
exampleSentence: The suspect was charged with rape.
exampleTranslation: 該嫌犯被控強姦罪。

meaning: 快速的；迅速的，指速度快或變化快的狀態。
exampleSentence: The company needs to respond to market changes rapidly to maintain its competitive edge.
exampleTranslation: 為了保持競爭優勢，公司需要迅速應對市場變化。

meaning: 迅速地；快速地（指速度或程度的快速變化）
exampleSentence: The company is expanding its operations rapidly to meet the increasing demand.
exampleTranslation: 為了滿足不斷增長的需求，公司正迅速擴展其業務。

meaning: 稀有；罕見；不常見
exampleSentence: The company is launching a limited-edition product to capitalize on the demand for rare collectibles.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在推出限量版產品，以利用對稀有收藏品的需求。

meaning: 很少地；不常地
exampleSentence: The company rarely offers discounts on its premium products.
exampleTranslation: 該公司很少在其旗艦產品上提供折扣。

meaning: 衝動地；不經過深思熟慮地
exampleSentence: The company invested heavily in the new technology without conducting thorough market research, a rashly decision that led to significant losses.
exampleTranslation: 該公司在未進行徹底的市場調查的情況下，大量投資於新技術，這個衝動的決定導致了巨大的損失。

meaning: 老鼠；告密者；（V）告密，告發
exampleSentence: We need to set traps to catch the rat in the warehouse.
exampleTranslation: 我們需要在倉庫裡設陷阱來抓老鼠。

meaning: 比率；費率；評級
exampleSentence: The company is currently reviewing the exchange rate to determine the impact on import costs.
exampleTranslation: 公司目前正在審查匯率，以確定對進口成本的影響。

meaning: 費率；比率；利率
exampleSentence: The bank announced a decrease in interest rates to stimulate the economy.
exampleTranslation: 該銀行宣布降低利率以刺激經濟。

meaning: 寧願；寧可；相當；頗；有點；更確切地說；反而，卻是
exampleSentence: I'd rather stay home and read a book than go to the party.
exampleTranslation: 我寧願待在家看書，也不想去派對。

meaning: 正式批准；確認（協議、條款等）
exampleSentence: The board of directors will ratify the merger agreement next week.
exampleTranslation: 董事會將會在下週正式批准這項合併協議。

meaning: 評等；評分；評價等級
exampleSentence: The hotel received excellent ratings for its cleanliness and service.
exampleTranslation: 這家飯店因其清潔度和服務而獲得了優異的評等。

meaning: 評分；評級；評價
exampleSentence: The online store relies heavily on customer ratings to attract new buyers.
exampleTranslation: 這家網路商店非常依賴客戶評分來吸引新買家。

meaning: 比例；比率；關聯性
exampleSentence: The company's debt-to-equity ratio is a key indicator of its financial stability.
exampleTranslation: 公司的負債與股本比例是衡量其財務穩定的重要指標。

meaning: 配給量；定額；（尤指戰時或困難時期）定量供應
exampleSentence: During the drought, water was distributed in daily rations.
exampleTranslation: 乾旱期間，水按每日配給量分發。

meaning: 理性的；符合邏輯的；基於事實的
exampleSentence: The manager made a rational decision to postpone the project due to unforeseen circumstances.
exampleTranslation: 經理基於不可預見的情況，理性地決定延遲專案。

meaning: 基本原理；理由；邏輯依據
exampleSentence: The rationale behind the new policy is to improve efficiency and reduce costs.
exampleTranslation: 這項新政策的基本原理是提高效率並降低成本。

meaning: 理性；合理性
exampleSentence: The company's decision was based on sound business rationality, not emotion.
exampleTranslation: 公司的決策是基於健全的商業理性，而非情感。

meaning: 高度評價；極佳好評
exampleSentence: The new product received rave reviews from industry experts, leading to a significant increase in sales.
exampleTranslation: 這款新產品獲得了業界專家的高度評價，導致銷售額大幅增加。

meaning: 生的；未加工的；原始的；不成熟的；刺骨的（天氣）
exampleSentence: The chef prefers to use fresh, raw ingredients in his dishes.
exampleTranslation: 這位廚師喜歡在他的菜餚中使用新鮮的生食材。

meaning: 原物料；未經加工的材料
exampleSentence: The company is seeking reliable suppliers of raw materials to ensure consistent production.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在尋找可靠的原物料供應商，以確保穩定的生產。

meaning: 光線；射線；（魚）魟魚；少量，一線；（從中心）放射，射出
exampleSentence: A single ray of sunlight streamed through the window, illuminating the dust motes in the air.
exampleTranslation: 一束陽光從窗戶射入，照亮了空氣中的塵埃。

meaning: （達到）達成、接觸到、伸及
exampleSentence: The company aims to reach a sales target of $1 million this quarter.
exampleTranslation: 本公司本季目標達成 100 萬美元的銷售額。

meaning: 得出結論；歸納出結論
exampleSentence: After analyzing the data, the team was able to reach a conclusion about the project's feasibility.
exampleTranslation: 在分析數據後，團隊得以歸納出該專案可行性的結論。

meaning: 伸手去拿；試圖獲得（某物或機會）
exampleSentence: He reached for the report on his desk to review the latest sales figures.
exampleTranslation: 他伸手去拿桌上的報告，以查看最新的銷售數據。

meaning: 充分發揮潛能；達到最佳績效
exampleSentence: The company provides training programs to help employees reach their full potential.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供培訓計畫，以幫助員工充分發揮潛能。

meaning: 找到解決方案；達成目標
exampleSentence: After extensive research, the team finally reached a solution to the technical problem.
exampleTranslation: 經過廣泛的研究，團隊最終找到了解決技術問題的方案。

meaning: 達成共識；全體一致同意
exampleSentence: After a lengthy discussion, the board members finally reached a unanimous agreement on the new marketing strategy.
exampleTranslation: 經過冗長的討論，董事會成員最終就新的行銷策略達成共識。

meaning: 到達；達到（某目標或狀態）
exampleSentence: The company reached a record profit this quarter.
exampleTranslation: 本季公司達到創紀錄的利潤。

meaning: 達到；觸及；伸及
exampleSentence: The project deadline is fast approaching, and we need to ensure all deliverables reach the client on time.
exampleTranslation: 專案截止日期即將到來，我們需要確保所有交付成果能準時送達客戶。

meaning: 伸手觸及；達到（某目標）；正在進行中
exampleSentence: The company is reaching out to potential clients to expand its market share.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在積極接觸潛在客戶，以擴大其市場份額。

meaning: 對…做出反應；回應
exampleSentence: The company needs to react quickly to the changing market conditions.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要迅速對市場變化做出反應。

meaning: 對...做出反應；回應；處理
exampleSentence: The company needs to react quickly to the negative publicity surrounding the product recall.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要迅速對產品召回事件周圍的負面公關做出反應。

meaning: 做出反應；回應；對...有所表示
exampleSentence: The company reacted swiftly to the negative publicity by issuing a public apology.
exampleTranslation: 公司迅速對負面新聞做出回應，發布了公開道歉聲明。

meaning: 反應；反作用
exampleSentence: The company's reaction approach needs to be updated.
exampleTranslation: 公司的反應方法需要更新。

meaning: 反應性的；回應的；易起反應的
exampleSentence: The company needs to move from a reactive strategy to a proactive one to stay competitive.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要從反應式策略轉變為主動式策略，以保持競爭力。

meaning: 核反應爐；反應器（化學等）；反應的人
exampleSentence: The nuclear reactor generates electricity for millions of homes.
exampleTranslation: 這座核反應爐為數百萬家庭提供電力。

meaning: 閱讀；理解；研讀
exampleSentence: Please read the terms and conditions carefully before proceeding.
exampleTranslation: 在繼續之前，請仔細閱讀條款和條件。

meaning: 閱讀者；讀者，通常指閱讀商業文件或報告的人。
exampleSentence: The company is looking for skilled readers to review and approve marketing materials.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在尋找熟練的閱讀者來審閱和批准行銷材料。

meaning: 讀者；閱讀者（通常指閱讀商業文件或出版物的對象）
exampleSentence: The magazine aims to provide valuable insights for industry readers.
exampleTranslation: 這本雜誌旨在為業界讀者提供有價值的見解。

meaning: 讀者群；讀物受眾
exampleSentence: The magazine boasts a large readership among young professionals.
exampleTranslation: 這本雜誌在年輕專業人士中擁有龐大的讀者群。

meaning: 隨時可得的；樂於提供的；輕而易舉的
exampleSentence: The documents are readily available for review on the shared drive.
exampleTranslation: 這些文件可以在共享雲端硬碟上輕鬆取得，以供審閱。

meaning: 準備就緒；已做好準備；隨時可以
exampleSentence: The presentation slides are ready for review by the marketing team.
exampleTranslation: 簡報簡報已準備好，由行銷團隊審閱。

meaning: 現成的；預製的；無需額外加工或修改即可使用的
exampleSentence: To expedite the project, we opted for ready-made components instead of custom-built ones.
exampleTranslation: 為了加快項目進度，我們選擇了現成的組件，而不是客製化的。

meaning: 真實的；實際的；確切的
exampleSentence: The project manager needs to assess the real impact of the budget cuts.
exampleTranslation: 專案經理需要評估預算削減的真實影響。

meaning: 不動產銷售；房地產交易
exampleSentence: The company reported a significant increase in real estate sales during the last quarter.
exampleTranslation: 該公司在上一季報告了顯著的不動產銷售額增長。

meaning: 現實主義；實際性；寫實主義
exampleSentence: Her approach to the project was characterized by a refreshing sense of realism.
exampleTranslation: 她處理這個專案的方式展現出令人耳目一新的實際性。

meaning: 實際的，現實的；實事求是的
exampleSentence: We need to set realistic goals for the project to ensure its success.
exampleTranslation: 我們需要為這個專案設定實際的目標，以確保其成功。

meaning: 現實地；切合實際地，顧及實際情況地
exampleSentence: We need to assess the project's feasibility realistically, considering the current budget constraints.
exampleTranslation: 我們需要切合實際地評估專案的可行性，考慮到目前的預算限制。

meaning: 現實；真實情況；實際情況
exampleSentence: The company needs to face the reality that sales have declined significantly this quarter.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要正視這個季度銷售額顯著下降的現實。

meaning: 可實現的；可達成的；可變現的
exampleSentence: The project goals must be challenging but still realizable within the given timeframe and resources.
exampleTranslation: 專案目標必須具有挑戰性，但在給定的時間表和資源內仍是可實現的。

meaning: 領悟、體認、認識到（某事）；實現、完成
exampleSentence: After the meeting, there was a sudden realization that we needed to adjust our strategy.
exampleTranslation: 會後，大家突然體認到我們需要調整策略。

meaning: 領悟；意識到；體會到（某事的重要性或真相）
exampleSentence: After reviewing the sales figures, the manager realized the need for a new marketing strategy.
exampleTranslation: 審閱銷售數據後，經理意識到需要新的行銷策略。

meaning: 意識到；領悟到；體會到
exampleSentence: After reviewing the data, the manager realized the project was behind schedule.
exampleTranslation: 審閱數據後，經理意識到專案已落後進度。

meaning: 確實地；真正地；非常
exampleSentence: The project was completed ahead of schedule, which is really impressive.
exampleTranslation: 這個專案提前完成，這真的令人印象深刻。

meaning: 領域; 範圍; 王國
exampleSentence: The company is expanding its operations into the digital realm.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在將其業務擴展到數位領域。

meaning: 指實物資產，如土地、建築物等，通常用於商業和財務背景。
exampleSentence: The company's balance sheet includes a significant portion of its assets allocated to realproperties.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的資產負債表包含大量用於資產的實物資產。

meaning: 房地產經紀人；房地產中介
exampleSentence: The realtor helped us find a suitable office space in the city center.
exampleTranslation: 這位房地產經紀人幫助我們在市中心找到合適的辦公室空間。

meaning: 房地產經紀人（通常指隸屬於房地產仲介公司的專業人士，協助客戶買賣或租賃房產）
exampleSentence: Our realtor helped us find the perfect office space in a convenient location.
exampleTranslation: 我們的房地產經紀人幫助我們在便利的位置找到了完美的辦公空間。

meaning: 實業、實體資產（通常指不動產）。
exampleSentence: The company's portfolio consists primarily of commercial realties.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的投資組合主要由商業不動產構成。

meaning: 收穫（成果、利益）；獲得（報酬、回報）
exampleSentence: The company hopes to reap significant profits from the new marketing campaign.
exampleTranslation: 公司希望從新的行銷活動中收穫可觀的利潤。

meaning: 重新申請；再次提交（申請、文件等）
exampleSentence: Due to the company's restructuring, many employees had to reapply for their current positions.
exampleTranslation: 由於公司重組，許多員工不得不重新申請他們目前的工作。

meaning: 後方；後部；（車輛）後座
exampleSentence: The company is planning to expand its production line to the rear of the factory.
exampleTranslation: 公司計畫將生產線擴展到工廠的後方。

meaning: 重新排列；重新安排
exampleSentence: The manager asked the staff to rearrange the files alphabetically.
exampleTranslation: 經理請員工按照字母順序重新排列檔案。

meaning: 原因；理由；解釋
exampleSentence: The project was delayed due to unforeseen reasons.
exampleTranslation: 由於一些不可預見的原因，專案延遲了。

meaning: 合理的；符合邏輯的；在可接受的範圍內
exampleSentence: The company offered a reasonable salary and benefits package to attract qualified candidates.
exampleTranslation: 為了吸引合格的候選人，公司提供了一份合理的薪資和福利待遇。

meaning: 合理地；適當地；在可接受的範圍內
exampleSentence: The project budget needs to be adjusted to reflect the current market conditions reasonably.
exampleTranslation: 專案預算需要根據目前的市場狀況合理調整。

meaning: 原因；理由；藉由
exampleSentence: The project was delayed due to several reasons, including unforeseen technical issues and a shortage of resources.
exampleTranslation: 專案延遲的原因有很多，包括未預見到的技術問題和資源短缺。

meaning: 重新組裝；將零件重新組合
exampleSentence: After the shipment arrived damaged, the technicians were assigned to reassemble the equipment.
exampleTranslation: 貨物損壞後，技術人員被指派重新組裝設備。

meaning: 重新指派；重新分配（職務、資源等）
exampleSentence: Due to the restructuring, several employees will be reassigned to different departments.
exampleTranslation: 由於組織重組，幾位員工將被重新指派到不同的部門。

meaning: 使安心；消除疑慮
exampleSentence: The manager reassured the team that the project was still on track despite the recent setbacks.
exampleTranslation: 儘管最近遇到了一些挫折，經理向團隊保證專案仍在正軌。

meaning: 使安心；消除疑慮
exampleSentence: The manager reassured the team that the project was still on track despite the recent setback.
exampleTranslation: 儘管最近遇到了一些挫折，經理向團隊保證專案仍在正軌。

meaning: 令人安心的；具有安慰性的，能消除疑慮的
exampleSentence: The manager's reassuring words helped calm the employees' concerns about the company's future.
exampleTranslation: 經理的安慰性言辭幫助平息了員工對公司未來的擔憂。

meaning: 退款、折扣（通常是購買商品或服務後獲得的），或減少價格。
exampleSentence: The company is offering a $50 rebate on all energy-efficient appliances.
exampleTranslation: 公司為所有節能型電器提供 50 美元的退款。

meaning: 違反規定或權威的反抗者；不服從者
exampleSentence: The company needs to address the concerns of employees who are rebelling against the new policy.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要解決對新政策表示反對的員工的顧慮。

meaning: 反彈；恢復；彈回
exampleSentence: The company experienced a strong rebound in sales after the pandemic restrictions were lifted.
exampleTranslation: 隨著疫情限制解除，該公司的銷售額出現了強勁反彈。

meaning: 重建；重新建造；恢復原狀
exampleSentence: The company plans to rebuild the factory after the fire.
exampleTranslation: 公司計畫在火災後重建工廠。

meaning: 回憶；喚起；憶起；召回
exampleSentence: The witness struggled to recall the details of the incident.
exampleTranslation: 這位證人努力回憶起事件的細節。

meaning: 退卻；後退；（水位、潮流等）退去
exampleSentence: Due to the unexpected flood, the water level receded significantly overnight.
exampleTranslation: 由於突如其來的洪水，水位在夜間顯著退去。

meaning: 收據；付款憑證
exampleSentence: Please keep your receipt in case you need to return the item.
exampleTranslation: 請保留您的收據，以備您需要退貨。

meaning: 應收帳款；可收回的
exampleSentence: The company needs to manage its accounts receivable carefully to maintain cash flow.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要仔細管理其應收帳款以維持現金流。

meaning: 收到；獲得
exampleSentence: Please ensure all invoices are received by the accounting department before the deadline.
exampleTranslation: 請確保所有發票在截止日期前已收到會計部門。

meaning: 收到；獲取（信件、包裹等）
exampleSentence: The company received a large order from a new client.
exampleTranslation: 公司收到了一筆來自新客戶的大訂單。

meaning: 接收器；接收者（指接收訊息、貨物或款項的人或設備）
exampleSentence: The company is looking for a reliable receiver for its shipments.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在尋找可靠的貨物接收者。

meaning: 收到；獲得（信件、包裹、資訊等）
exampleSentence: The company receives hundreds of applications for the marketing position every month.
exampleTranslation: 該公司每月收到數百份行銷職位的申請。

meaning: 接收；收到；正在接收
exampleSentence: The warehouse is currently receiving a shipment of new inventory.
exampleTranslation: 倉庫目前正在接收一批新的庫存。

meaning: 近來的；最近的
exampleSentence: The company has seen a significant increase in sales in recent months.
exampleTranslation: 公司在近幾個月來看到銷售額顯著增加。

meaning: 最近，近來，近期（指時間上接近現在）
exampleSentence: The company has recently expanded its operations into Southeast Asia.
exampleTranslation: 公司最近將業務擴展到東南亞。

meaning: 接待；款待；接待處
exampleSentence: The receptionist greeted us warmly at the reception.
exampleTranslation: 接待人員在接待處熱情地迎接了我們。

meaning: 前台接待員；負責迎接訪客、接聽電話及處理一般行政事務的工作人員
exampleSentence: The receptionist scheduled the conference room for the meeting at 10 a.m.
exampleTranslation: 前台接待員已安排會議室於上午 10 點舉行會議。

meaning: 接受的；能理解的；易於接受的
exampleSentence: The manager is receptive to new ideas and suggestions from the team.
exampleTranslation: 經理對團隊提出的新想法和建議持開放態度。

meaning: 受體；感受器；接受器 (生物學、化學領域中指細胞表面或內部的分子，能識別並結合特定分子，啟動細胞反應)
exampleSentence: The drug works by blocking specific receptors in the brain, reducing the perception of pain.
exampleTranslation: 這種藥物透過阻斷大腦中特定的受體來發揮作用，從而減少疼痛感。

meaning: 暫停（工作或活動），休息時間
exampleSentence: The manager announced a 15-minute recess for all employees to refresh themselves.
exampleTranslation: 經理宣布所有員工有 15 分鐘的休息時間，以恢復精神。

meaning: 經濟衰退，指一國的經濟活動在一段時間內顯著下降，通常持續數個季度。
exampleSentence: The company is preparing for a potential recession by cutting costs and streamlining operations.
exampleTranslation: 為了應對潛在的經濟衰退，公司正在削減成本並簡化營運。

meaning: 重新充電；恢復能量；補充（電力、資源等）
exampleSentence: The IT department needs to recharge all the laptops before the conference.
exampleTranslation: IT部門需要在會議前為所有筆記型電腦重新充電。

meaning: 食譜；烹飪方法
exampleSentence: The hotel kitchen needs a new recipe for the vegetarian option.
exampleTranslation: 飯店廚房需要一份新的素食選項食譜。

meaning: 食譜；烹飪方法（通常指用於製作特定菜餚的詳細步驟和材料清單）
exampleSentence: The hotel kitchen relies on standardized recipes to ensure consistent food quality.
exampleTranslation: 飯店廚房依賴標準食譜以確保食物品質的一致性。

meaning: 收件人；接收者（通常指文件、郵件或包裹的接收者）
exampleSentence: Please ensure all invoices are sent to the correct recipient.
exampleTranslation: 請確保所有發票都寄送至正確的收件人。

meaning: 收件人；接收者（通常指郵件、文件或資訊的接收者）
exampleSentence: All invoices should be sent to the correct recipients to ensure timely payment.
exampleTranslation: 所有發票應發送給正確的收件人，以確保及時付款。

meaning: 互惠的；相互的；雙向的，指雙方互相提供或交換利益。
exampleSentence: The company offered a reciprocal discount to its suppliers.
exampleTranslation: 該公司向其供應商提供了一項互惠折扣。

meaning: 估計；認為；判斷（通常基於不完全的資訊）
exampleSentence: Based on the current market trends, we reckon sales will increase by 10% next quarter.
exampleTranslation: 根據目前的市場趨勢，我們預計下個季度銷售額將增加 10%。

meaning: （通常指土地、權利、資源等）收回；重新取得；恢復
exampleSentence: The company is working to reclaim abandoned land for a new industrial park.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正努力收回廢棄土地，以建造新的工業園區。

meaning: （椅子、座椅等）後傾；放鬆身體，倚靠
exampleSentence: After a long flight, I like to recline my seat and relax.
exampleTranslation: 長途飛行後，我喜歡後傾椅背，放鬆身心。

meaning: 辨識；承認；認可；聲譽
exampleSentence: The company's commitment to quality has earned it widespread recognition in the industry.
exampleTranslation: 該公司對品質的承諾使其在業界獲得廣泛的認可。

meaning: 易於辨識的；可被識別的
exampleSentence: The company logo is now more recognizable thanks to the recent marketing campaign.
exampleTranslation: 由於最近的行銷活動，該公司的標誌現在更容易辨識。

meaning: 辨識；認出；承認（某人或事物）
exampleSentence: The security guard recognized the employee from their ID badge.
exampleTranslation: 保全人員從員工的證件上認出了他。

meaning: 被認可；被承認；被識別
exampleSentence: The company's brand is now widely recognized in the international market.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的品牌現在已在國際市場上廣受認可。

meaning: 回憶；記憶；對過去事件的追憶
exampleSentence: The manager asked the employee to share his recollection of the meeting.
exampleTranslation: 經理請員工分享他對會議的回憶。

meaning: 推薦；建議（通常基於經驗或知識）
exampleSentence: I highly recommend this software for streamlining your workflow.
exampleTranslation: 我強烈推薦這款軟體來簡化您的工作流程。

meaning: 值得推薦的；可推薦的，通常指產品、服務或方案等。
exampleSentence: This software is highly recommendable for small businesses looking to streamline their operations.
exampleTranslation: 這款軟體對於希望簡化營運流程的小型企業來說，非常值得推薦。

meaning: 推薦；建議；（書面）推薦信
exampleSentence: The HR department is reviewing employee recommendations for promotions.
exampleTranslation: 人事部門正在審查員工對於升遷的推薦。

meaning: 推薦信，通常由前任雇主、教授或同事撰寫，用以證明求職者的能力、經驗和品格。
exampleSentence: The HR department requires a recommendation letter from your previous employer.
exampleTranslation: 人力資源部門需要您前任雇主的推薦信。

meaning: 建議；推薦（通常是正式的或書面的意見）
exampleSentence: The hotel received positive recommendations for its excellent service and convenient location.
exampleTranslation: 這家飯店因其卓越的服務和便利的位置而獲得了正面的建議。

meaning: 推薦；建議（通常基於專業判斷或經驗）
exampleSentence: The consultant recommended a new software solution to improve efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 顧問建議採用新的軟體解決方案以提高效率。

meaning: 調和；和解；使相符；對帳
exampleSentence: The accountant needs to reconcile the bank statement with the company's records.
exampleTranslation: 會計師需要將銀行對帳單與公司記錄進行對帳。

meaning: 和解, 調和; 對帳
exampleSentence: The accountant performed a reconciliation of the bank statement with the company's ledger.
exampleTranslation: 會計師將銀行對帳單與公司總帳進行了核對。

meaning: 重新配置；重新調整（系統、設備、流程等）以適應新的需求或環境。
exampleSentence: Due to the merger, the IT department is currently undergoing a major reconfiguration of the network infrastructure.
exampleTranslation: 由於合併，IT部門目前正在對網路基礎架構進行大規模重新配置。

meaning: 重新建立聯繫；恢復聯繫
exampleSentence: After the system upgrade, we need to reconnect all the network devices.
exampleTranslation: 系統升級後，我們需要重新連接所有網路設備。

meaning: 重新考慮，再三思量，重新審議，再研究
exampleSentence: Please reconsider your decision before we finalize the project plan.
exampleTranslation: 請在我們最終確定專案計畫之前重新考慮您的決定。

meaning: 重新考慮；再次審查
exampleSentence: After reviewing the proposal, the committee decided to postpone a decision pending further reconsideration.
exampleTranslation: 在審閱提案後，委員會決定延遲決定，等待進一步的重新考慮。

meaning: 重建;重現;修復
exampleSentence: Engineers are working to reconstruct the bridge that was damaged in the earthquake.
exampleTranslation: 工程師們正在努力重建在地震中受損的橋樑。

meaning: 重建；復原；修復。常用於建築、社會、經濟等領域。
exampleSentence: The city began a massive reconstruction effort after the earthquake.
exampleTranslation: 地震後，該城市開始了大規模的重建工作。

meaning: 再次召開（會議等）
exampleSentence: The board of directors will reconvene next week to discuss the merger proposal.
exampleTranslation: 董事會將於下週再次召開，以討論併購提案。

meaning: 記錄；錄音；銷售數據
exampleSentence: The sales department needs to record all customer interactions in the CRM system.
exampleTranslation: 銷售部門需要將所有客戶互動記錄在 CRM 系統中。

meaning: 歷史新高；創下紀錄的高點（通常指價格、銷售量、利潤等）
exampleSentence: The company reported a record high profit this quarter, exceeding all previous forecasts.
exampleTranslation: 本公司本季報告創下歷史新高的利潤，遠超所有先前預測。

meaning: 錄音的；被記錄的；（聲音、影像等）被錄製的
exampleSentence: The meeting was recorded for future reference.
exampleTranslation: 會議被錄音以供日後參考。

meaning: 錄音；錄製物
exampleSentence: Please send me the recording of the meeting so I can review the action items.
exampleTranslation: 請將會議錄音寄給我，以便我能審查行動項目。

meaning: 記錄；檔案；銷售紀錄
exampleSentence: The sales department needs to update the sales records daily.
exampleTranslation: 銷售部門需要每天更新銷售記錄。

meaning: 恢復；痊癒；找回（損失、資料等）
exampleSentence: The company is recovering from the recent economic downturn.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在從最近的經濟衰退中恢復過來。

meaning: 恢復、找回（健康、物品、數據等）；康復
exampleSentence: The company's sales recovered quickly after the promotional campaign.
exampleTranslation: 促銷活動後，該公司的銷售額迅速恢復。

meaning: 從疾病、傷害或困境中恢復；修復；重新建立（例如：聲譽、關係）
exampleSentence: The company is recovering from the recent economic downturn and expects to see increased profits next quarter.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在從最近的經濟衰退中恢復，並預計下個季度將看到利潤增加。

meaning: 復原；恢復（健康、經濟、系統等）；損害修復
exampleSentence: The company is focusing on a swift recovery from the recent economic downturn.
exampleTranslation: 公司正致力於從最近的經濟衰退中迅速復甦。

meaning: 休閒活動；娛樂
exampleSentence: The company offers a variety of recreational activities for its employees to promote work-life balance.
exampleTranslation: 為了促進工作與生活平衡，公司為員工提供多種休閒活動。

meaning: 與休閒娛樂相關的；非工作性質的
exampleSentence: The company offers recreational facilities like a gym and a swimming pool for its employees.
exampleTranslation: 該公司為員工提供健身房和游泳池等休閒設施。

meaning: 休閒活動，通常指工作或學習之外的娛樂或放鬆活動。
exampleSentence: The company offers subsidized recreational activities to improve employee morale.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供補貼的休閒活動以提升員工士氣。

meaning: 招募；聘用（人才）
exampleSentence: The company plans to recruit several experienced marketing professionals to expand its market share.
exampleTranslation: 為了擴大市場佔有率，公司計畫招募幾位經驗豐富的行銷專業人士。

meaning: 招募人員；招聘者
exampleSentence: The recruiter called me for a second interview.
exampleTranslation: 招募人員打電話給我進行第二次面試。

meaning: 招聘；招募（人才）
exampleSentence: The company is currently recruiting for several marketing positions.
exampleTranslation: 該公司目前正在招聘多個行銷職位。

meaning: 招聘
exampleSentence: The company's new recruitment initiative exceeded expectations in the first quarter.
exampleTranslation: 公司的新recruitment計畫在第一季度超出了預期。

meaning: 糾正；修正（錯誤、問題等）
exampleSentence: The company needs to rectify the errors in the financial report before submitting it to the board.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要在提交給董事會之前，修正財務報告中的錯誤。

meaning: 恢復體力或健康；休養
exampleSentence: After a demanding project, employees are encouraged to recuperate and recharge.
exampleTranslation: 在完成一個繁重的項目後，員工們被鼓勵休養並恢復精力。

meaning: 再次發生；重複出現
exampleSentence: The system error recurred despite the recent software update.
exampleTranslation: 儘管最近更新了軟體，系統錯誤仍然再次發生。

meaning: 週期性發生的；經常性的；重複出現的
exampleSentence: The company faces recurring expenses for software maintenance.
exampleTranslation: 公司在軟體維護方面面臨經常性的支出。

meaning: 可回收的；能被重新利用的，符合環保標準的。
exampleSentence: Our company is committed to using recyclable packaging materials to reduce environmental impact.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司致力於使用可回收的包裝材料，以減少環境影響。

meaning: 將廢棄物重新處理，製成新的產品或材料，以減少資源浪費。
exampleSentence: Our company is committed to recycling all paper and plastic waste to reduce our environmental impact.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司致力於回收所有紙張和塑膠廢棄物，以減少對環境的影響。

meaning: 再利用的；以回收材料製成的
exampleSentence: Our company is committed to using recycled paper for all internal documents to reduce our environmental impact.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司致力於使用回收紙張作為所有內部文件，以減少對環境的影響。

meaning: 資源再利用；回收利用
exampleSentence: Our company is committed to improving its recycling program to reduce environmental impact.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司致力於改善回收計畫，以減少對環境的影響。

meaning: 紅色；表示紅色。
exampleSentence: The report highlighted the company's red figures for the last quarter.
exampleTranslation: 報告指出公司上季的虧損數字呈現紅色。

meaning: 重新裝修；重新佈置；重新裝潢
exampleSentence: We plan to redecorate the living room next month to give it a fresh look.
exampleTranslation: 我們計畫下個月重新裝修客廳，讓它煥然一新。

meaning: 兌換；換取（通常指使用優惠券、獎勵點等獲得商品或服務）
exampleSentence: Customers can redeem their loyalty points for a free coffee.
exampleTranslation: 顧客可以用他們的忠誠度積分兌換一杯免費咖啡。

meaning: 可兌換的；可換取的（通常指獎勵、優惠券等）
exampleSentence: The loyalty program offers redeemable points for frequent purchases.
exampleTranslation: 忠誠度計畫提供可兌換的積分，以獎勵顧客的頻繁購買。

meaning: （通常指通過行動或犧牲）抵償、補救；（票券、優惠券等）兌換、折抵
exampleSentence: The company offered a redemption program to encourage customers to return defective products.
exampleTranslation: 該公司提供了一個補償計畫，以鼓勵客戶退回有缺陷的產品。

meaning: 重新設計；改進設計方案
exampleSentence: The company decided to redesign its website to improve user experience.
exampleTranslation: 公司決定重新設計其網站以改善使用者體驗。

meaning: 重新設計；改進設計
exampleSentence: The company has redesigned its website to improve user experience.
exampleTranslation: 該公司已重新設計其網站以改善使用者體驗。

meaning: 重新設計；改進設計
exampleSentence: The company is redesigning its website to improve user experience.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在重新設計其網站以改善使用者體驗。

meaning: 紅魚（一種魚類，在餐飲業中常用於菜單或食材描述）
exampleSentence: The restaurant's menu features grilled redfish with lemon butter sauce.
exampleTranslation: 這家餐廳的菜單特色是搭配檸檬奶油醬的烤紅魚。

meaning: 將資源或流量重新導向至另一個位置或目標。
exampleSentence: Due to the website maintenance, all traffic will be redirected to our temporary landing page.
exampleTranslation: 由於網站維護，所有流量將會重新導向到我們的臨時首頁。

meaning: 重新做；再次執行（某項工作或任務）
exampleSentence: The report contained several errors, so we need to redo it.
exampleTranslation: 報告包含幾個錯誤，所以我們需要重新做一份。

meaning: 減少；降低（數量、成本、風險等）
exampleSentence: The company aims to reduce operating costs by streamlining its processes.
exampleTranslation: 公司旨在透過優化流程來降低營運成本。

meaning: 減少；降低（數量、價格、規模等）
exampleSentence: The company offered a reduced price for the bulk order.
exampleTranslation: 公司為批量訂單提供了一個降價優惠。

meaning: 減少；降低（數量、成本、風險等）
