meaning: 研讀；學習（通常指認真或長時間的學習）
exampleSentence: The marketing team studied the latest market trends to develop a new campaign.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊研究了最新的市場趨勢，以開發新的活動。

meaning: 研究；調查；學習（科目或領域）
exampleSentence: The marketing team conducted studies to determine the effectiveness of the new advertising campaign.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊進行研究，以確定新廣告活動的有效性。

meaning: 錄音室；攝影棚；工作室（通常指用於專業錄製或拍攝的空間）
exampleSentence: The marketing team needs to record the promotional video in the studio.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊需要將宣傳影片在錄音室錄製。

meaning: 對特定主題或市場進行系統性的調查與分析，以獲取資訊或知識。
exampleSentence: The marketing team will conduct a study on consumer preferences before launching the new product.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊將在新產品上市前進行消費者偏好調查。

meaning: 物品、材料、內容（泛指）；事務、事情（非正式）
exampleSentence: The warehouse is full of office supplies and other stuff.
exampleTranslation: 倉庫裡堆滿了辦公用品和其他物品。

meaning: （因不熟練或不小心）跌倒、踉蹌；（比喻）遭遇挫折或困難
exampleSentence: The company stumbled in the third quarter due to unexpected market fluctuations.
exampleTranslation: 由於意料之外的市場波動，該公司在第三季度遭遇挫折。

meaning: 震驚；使驚呆；使目瞪口呆
exampleSentence: The unexpected announcement stunned the entire sales team.
exampleTranslation: 這突如其來的公告震驚了整個銷售團隊。

meaning: 令人驚豔的；極好的；非凡的（通常指外觀或品質）
exampleSentence: The new marketing campaign features a stunning visual presentation.
exampleTranslation: 新的行銷活動採用令人驚豔的視覺呈現。

meaning: 愚蠢的；笨的；傻的
exampleSentence: It was a stupid mistake to forget to back up the data.
exampleTranslation: 忘記備份資料是一個愚蠢的錯誤。

meaning: 穩固地；堅實地（表示結構或物體以堅固的方式建造或站立）
exampleSentence: The new warehouse was built sturdily to withstand strong winds and heavy snowfall.
exampleTranslation: 新的倉庫是堅固地建造的，以抵禦強風和暴雪。

meaning: 風格；模式；方式（指事物或行為的獨特表現形式）
exampleSentence: The company's marketing campaign needs a fresh style to attract younger customers.
exampleTranslation: 為了吸引年輕客戶，公司行銷活動需要一個新的風格。

meaning: 風格；款式；樣式（指設計、服裝、行為等方面的特徵或趨勢）
exampleSentence: The company is launching a new line of clothing with a modern and minimalist style.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在推出一系列具有現代簡約風格的服裝。

meaning: 風格設計；造型設計；（產品）外觀設計
exampleSentence: The company invested heavily in product styling to appeal to younger consumers.
exampleTranslation: 該公司在產品外觀設計上投入巨資，以吸引年輕消費者。

meaning: 時髦的；有品味的，符合潮流的
exampleSentence: The company's new marketing campaign features models wearing stylish and modern clothing.
exampleTranslation: 公司的新行銷活動以穿著時髦且現代服裝的模特兒為特色。

meaning: 以時尚、時髦的樣式；以引人注目的風格
exampleSentence: The marketing team presented the new product campaign stylishly, capturing the audience's attention.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊以引人注目的風格呈現了新產品的宣傳活動，成功地吸引了觀眾的注意力。

meaning: 替補者；代用品；暫代；（訂閱的）簡稱
exampleSentence: The regular manager is on vacation, so we have a sub for two weeks.
exampleTranslation: 正規經理休假，所以我們有位替補人員工作兩週。

meaning: 將部分工作或任務外包給其他公司或個人。
exampleSentence: To meet the project deadline, we decided to subcontract the manufacturing process to a specialized firm.
exampleTranslation: 為了趕上專案期限，我們決定將製造流程外包給一家專業公司。

meaning: 分包商：指由總承包商委託，負責特定工程或服務的承包商。
exampleSentence: The general contractor hired several subcontractors to complete the project on time.
exampleTranslation: 總承包商僱用了幾家分包商，以確保專案能按時完成。

meaning: 制服；壓制；使屈服
exampleSentence: The company successfully subdued the competitor's aggressive marketing campaign.
exampleTranslation: 該公司成功地壓制了競爭對手的激進營銷活動。

meaning: 主題；議題；科目
exampleSentence: The meeting will cover the subject of budget allocation.
exampleTranslation: 本次會議將討論預算分配的主題。

meaning: 基於個人觀點或感受的；主觀的，非客觀的。
exampleSentence: The employee's performance review was largely subjective, based on the manager's personal opinion.
exampleTranslation: 員工的績效評估很大程度上是主觀的，基於經理的個人意見。

meaning: 科目；主題；學科（尤指在學校或大學課程中）
exampleSentence: The meeting will cover several subjects, including sales performance and marketing strategies.
exampleTranslation: 本次會議將涵蓋幾個主題，包括銷售業績和行銷策略。

meaning: 提交；呈交；（報告、文件等）的遞交
exampleSentence: The project team needs to submit the final report by Friday.
exampleTranslation: 專案團隊需要在星期五前提交最終報告。

meaning: 提交的文件或作品；投稿
exampleSentence: The deadline for project submissions is next Friday.
exampleTranslation: 專案提交的截止日期是下週五。

meaning: 提交；呈交；遞交
exampleSentence: Please submit your expense report by the end of the week.
exampleTranslation: 請在週末前提交您的費用報表。

exampleSentence: Please submit your expense reports by the end of the month.
exampleTranslation: 請在月底前提交您的費用報表。

meaning: 提交；遞交（文件、報告、申請等）
exampleSentence: The proposal was submitted to senior management last week.
exampleTranslation: 該提案已於上週提交給高層管理。

meaning: 提交；呈交；遞交（文件、報告等）
exampleSentence: Please submit your expense report by the end of the week.
exampleTranslation: 請在週末前提交您的費用報銷單。

meaning: 亞軌道（飛行）；指飛行器達到亞軌道速度，但未進入軌道，通常用於短時間的太空旅行。
exampleSentence: The company is developing a suborbital flight service for tourists.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在開發亞軌道飛行服務，以吸引觀光客。

meaning: подчиненный; 從屬的; 輔助的
exampleSentence: As a subordinate employee, he needs to follow the manager's instructions carefully.
exampleTranslation: 作為一名從屬員工，他需要仔細遵循經理的指示。

meaning: 次級的；（尤指）次級抵押貸款的
exampleSentence: The subprime mortgage crisis had a significant impact on the global economy.
exampleTranslation: 次級抵押貸款危機對全球經濟產生了重大影響。

meaning: 訂閱；按時付費以獲得服務或出版物的權利
exampleSentence: We encourage customers to subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive deals and updates.
exampleTranslation: 我們鼓勵客戶訂閱我們的電子報，以獲得獨家優惠和最新資訊。

meaning: 訂閱者；訂戶（通常指訂閱服務或刊物的對象）
exampleSentence: Our marketing team is focused on increasing the number of subscribers to our monthly newsletter.
exampleTranslation: 我們的行銷團隊專注於增加訂閱我們每月電子報的訂閱者數量。

meaning: 訂閱者；訂閱戶（通常指訂閱服務、新聞、頻道等的用戶）
exampleSentence: Our marketing campaign aims to increase the number of subscribers to our newsletter.
exampleTranslation: 我們的行銷活動旨在增加訂閱我們電子報的訂閱者數量。

meaning: 訂閱；成為...的訂閱者
exampleSentence: Many customers are subscribing to our monthly newsletter for exclusive deals.
exampleTranslation: 許多客戶訂閱我們的月度電子報以獲取獨家優惠。

meaning: 訂閱；會員資格；訂閱費用
exampleSentence: The company offers a monthly subscription for access to its premium software features.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供每月訂閱費用，以獲得其高級軟體功能的存取權。

meaning: 訂閱；定期付費服務
exampleSentence: The company offers various subscription plans for its online magazine.
exampleTranslation: 該公司為其線上雜誌提供多種訂閱方案。

meaning: 小節；分節；子部分
exampleSentence: Please refer to subsection 3.1 for more details on the project timeline.
exampleTranslation: 請參考專案時間表中的 3.1 小節以獲取更多細節。

meaning: 後續的；接著發生的；隨後的
exampleSentence: Following the initial meeting, subsequent discussions focused on budget allocation.
exampleTranslation: 在初步會議之後，後續的討論集中在預算分配上。

meaning: 後來，隨後
exampleSentence: The company's profits increased significantly, and subsequently, they expanded their operations globally.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的利潤顯著增長，隨後他們將業務擴展到全球。

meaning: 子集；（大群體中的）一部分
exampleSentence: The marketing team analyzed a subset of the customer data to identify key trends.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊分析了客戶資料的一個子集，以識別關鍵趨勢。

meaning: （問題、爭論、情緒等）逐漸平息、減退；（洪水、風暴等）退卻
exampleSentence: The company is hoping that the recent labor dispute will subside quickly.
exampleTranslation: 公司希望最近的勞資爭議能迅速平息。

meaning: 子公司
exampleSentence: The parent company established a new subsidiary to expand into Asian markets.
exampleTranslation: 母公司成立了新的subsidiary以擴展亞洲市場。

meaning: 補助；資助（通常指政府或組織為降低成本或鼓勵特定行為而提供的資金支持）
exampleSentence: The government subsidizes renewable energy projects to promote sustainability.
exampleTranslation: 政府補助再生能源項目，以促進可持續發展。

meaning: 補貼金;津貼;補助費
exampleSentence: The government offers subsidies to farmers to help them stay competitive.
exampleTranslation: 政府向農民提供補貼，以幫助他們保持競爭力。

meaning: 物質；成分；內容；主題
exampleSentence: The lab technician analyzed the substance to determine its chemical composition.
exampleTranslation: 實驗室技術人員分析該物質以確定其化學成分。

meaning: 大量的；實質性的；重要的
exampleSentence: The company reported a substantial increase in profits this quarter.
exampleTranslation: 本公司本季報告了顯著的利潤增長。

meaning: 實質上；大體上；顯著地
exampleSentence: The company's profits increased substantially after the implementation of the new marketing strategy.
exampleTranslation: 在新行銷策略實施後，該公司的利潤顯著增加。

meaning: 提供證據支持；證實
exampleSentence: The company needs to substantiate its claims with solid data before launching the new product.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要在推出新產品之前，用確鑿的數據來支持其宣稱。

meaning: 實質上；在根本上；在重要性上
exampleSentence: The company's profits increased substantively after implementing the new marketing strategy.
exampleTranslation: 在實施新的行銷策略後，公司的利潤有了實質性的增長。

meaning: 替代品；代理人；取代
exampleSentence: Due to Mr. Lee's sudden illness, Ms. Chen will substitute for him in the upcoming sales meeting.
exampleTranslation: 由於李先生突發疾病，陳小姐將在即將到來的銷售會議中代理他。

meaning: 取代；替代；以…代替
exampleSentence: The company substituted the outdated software with a more efficient version.
exampleTranslation: 公司將過時的軟體替換為更有效率的版本。

meaning: 替代；取代；換用
exampleSentence: Due to a supplier shortage, we had to make a substitution of the original component with a similar one.
exampleTranslation: 由於供應商短缺，我們不得不將原始零件替換為類似的零件。

meaning: 替代方案；取代物；（尤指）替換
exampleSentence: Due to a supplier shortage, we had to make substitutions in the product components.
exampleTranslation: 由於供應商短缺，我們不得不對產品組件進行替換。

meaning: 基質；底物；襯底；基底
exampleSentence: The enzyme binds to the substrate to catalyze a reaction.
exampleTranslation: 該酶與基質結合以催化反應。

meaning: 微妙的；難以察覺的；不明顯的；精巧的
exampleSentence: There's a subtle difference between good and excellent service.
exampleTranslation: 良好服務與卓越服務之間存在著微妙的差異。

meaning: 小計；部分總計（通常指在總計之前計算出的部分金額）
exampleSentence: Could you please break down the bill? I'd like to see the subtotal before the tax and service charge.
exampleTranslation: 您能將帳單細分嗎？我想在稅金和服務費之前看到小計。

meaning: 從...中減去；扣除；減少
exampleSentence: The accountant needs to subtract the expenses from the total revenue to calculate the profit.
exampleTranslation: 會計師需要從總收入中扣除費用，以計算利潤。

meaning: 郊區；郊外地區（通常指城市周圍的住宅區，居民主要以通勤上班為主）
exampleSentence: Many employees choose to live in the suburbs for a quieter lifestyle and larger homes.
exampleTranslation: 許多員工選擇住在郊區，以獲得更寧靜的生活方式和更大的住宅。

meaning: 郊區鐵路系統，通常指連接市中心與郊區住宅區的通勤鐵路。
exampleSentence: The company is considering extending the suburban train line to accommodate the growing residential area.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在考慮延長郊區鐵路系統，以適應不斷增長的住宅區。

meaning: 地下鐵；城市內部的快速公共運輸系統，常用於通勤或商務出行。
exampleSentence: Our new office is located next to a subway station, which makes daily commuting easier for staff.
exampleTranslation: 我們的新辦公室位於地鐵站旁，讓員工每日通勤更方便。

meaning: 地鐵站；捷運站，通常指城市地下鐵路系統的停靠點。
exampleSentence: The conference venue is conveniently located near the subway station.
exampleTranslation: 會議場地鄰近地鐵站，交通十分便利。

meaning: 成功；達到目標
exampleSentence: The company's new marketing strategy is expected to succeed in attracting more customers.
exampleTranslation: 預計公司新的行銷策略將會成功地吸引更多客戶。

meaning: 在...方面取得成功；成功地完成
exampleSentence: She managed to succeed in completing the project ahead of schedule.
exampleTranslation: 她成功地在規定的時間之前完成了這個專案。

meaning: 成就；成功，尤指在事業或目標上取得的成就。
exampleSentence: The company's success is largely attributed to its innovative marketing strategies.
exampleTranslation: 公司的成功很大程度上歸功於其創新的行銷策略。

meaning: 成功的；成就的；獲得成功的
exampleSentence: The company's new marketing strategy proved successful in increasing sales.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的全新行銷策略在增加銷售額方面取得了成功。

meaning: 在競爭中勝出的候選人；成功入選者
exampleSentence: The company announced the successful candidate for the marketing director position.
exampleTranslation: 公司宣布了市場總監職位的成功候選人。

meaning: 成功地；順利地
exampleSentence: The project was completed successfully despite the tight deadline.
exampleTranslation: 儘管時間緊迫，專案還是順利完成。

meaning: 繼任；接替；一系列
exampleSentence: The company is carefully planning the succession of the CEO to ensure a smooth transition.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在仔細規劃CEO的繼任計畫，以確保順利的交接。

meaning: 連續的；相繼的
exampleSentence: The team won three successive games.
exampleTranslation: 這支隊伍連續贏了三場比賽。

meaning: 繼任者；繼承人（通常指職位或頭銜的繼承者）
exampleSentence: The board of directors is searching for a successor to the retiring CEO.
exampleTranslation: 董事會正在尋找一位輪班 CEO 的繼任者。

meaning: 簡潔明瞭的；扼要的
exampleSentence: The manager requested a succinct report summarizing the project's progress.
exampleTranslation: 經理要求一份簡潔的報告，總結專案的進度。

meaning: 屈服於；無法抵抗（壓力、誘惑、疾病等）
exampleSentence: The company ultimately succumbed to market pressure and lowered its prices.
exampleTranslation: 公司最終屈服於市場壓力，降低了價格。

meaning: 如此，這般，極其（用來強調程度或數量）
exampleSentence: The company experienced such a significant increase in profits this quarter that bonuses were awarded to all employees.
exampleTranslation: 本公司在本季經歷了如此顯著的利潤增長，以至於所有員工都獲得了獎金。

meaning: 吸取；消耗；（品質）差勁
exampleSentence: The new marketing campaign is sucking up all of our budget.
exampleTranslation: 這個新的行銷活動正在消耗我們所有的預算。

meaning: 突發的；突然發生的
exampleSentence: The project faced a sudden budget cut, requiring immediate adjustments.
exampleTranslation: 專案面臨突發的預算削減，需要立即調整。

meaning: 突然地；驟然地
exampleSentence: The meeting was cancelled suddenly due to unforeseen circumstances.
exampleTranslation: 由於突發狀況，會議突然被取消。

meaning: 起訴（指控並在法庭上提起訴訟）
exampleSentence: The company was sued for breach of contract.
exampleTranslation: 該公司因違反合約而被起訴。

meaning: 承受（痛苦、損失、困難等）；遭受
exampleSentence: The company suffered a significant loss due to the unexpected market downturn.
exampleTranslation: 由於意料之外的市場下滑，公司遭受了重大的損失。

meaning: 遭受（痛苦、損失、困難等）
exampleSentence: The company suffered a significant loss due to the unexpected market downturn.
exampleTranslation: 由於意料之外的市場下滑，公司遭受了重大損失。

meaning: 承受痛苦、折磨或困境的狀態；遭受損失或負擔。
exampleSentence: The company is committed to reducing employee suffering caused by excessive workloads.
exampleTranslation: 公司致力於減少因過重工作量而導致的員工痛苦。

meaning: 足夠，滿足需求
exampleSentence: This report should suffice as a preliminary assessment of the project's feasibility.
exampleTranslation: 這份報告應該足以作為對專案可行性的初步評估。

meaning: 足夠的；充分的；僅供使用
exampleSentence: The company has sufficient funds to cover the project's expenses.
exampleTranslation: 公司有足夠的資金來支付專案的費用。

meaning: 足夠地；充分地（表示達到某種程度或標準）
exampleSentence: The report must be written sufficiently clearly for all stakeholders to understand.
exampleTranslation: 報告必須寫得足夠清楚，以便所有利害關係人都能理解。

meaning: 糖；（食品產業中）甜味劑，常用於食品和飲料中。
exampleSentence: The hotel offers a variety of sweeteners, including sugar and artificial sweeteners, for guests' coffee and tea.
exampleTranslation: 飯店為客人提供的咖啡和茶有各種甜味劑，包括糖和人工甜味劑。

meaning: 含糖的；富含糖分的，通常指食品或飲料。
exampleSentence: The hotel offers a variety of pastries, but many are quite sugary.
exampleTranslation: 飯店提供多種點心，但其中許多都含有過多的糖分。

meaning: 建議；提出（想法、方案等）
exampleSentence: The marketing team suggested a new campaign targeting younger demographics.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊建議了一項針對年輕人口群的新活動。

meaning: 建議；提出（某種做法或方案）
exampleSentence: The manager suggested a new marketing strategy to boost sales.
exampleTranslation: 經理建議了一項新的營銷策略以提高銷售額。

meaning: 建議；提議（通常是為了改善情況或解決問題）
exampleSentence: I have a suggestion to improve the efficiency of our workflow.
exampleTranslation: 我有一個建議可以提高我們工作流程的效率。

meaning: 建議；提議（通常是多個建議）
exampleSentence: The manager asked for suggestions on how to improve team productivity.
exampleTranslation: 經理詢問了如何提高團隊生產力的建議。

meaning: 建議；暗示；提出（某種可能性或做法）
exampleSentence: The report suggests a potential cost reduction through automation.
exampleTranslation: 報告建議透過自動化來降低潛在成本。

meaning: 自殺；自殺行為
exampleSentence: Suicide is a serious public health issue that requires attention and prevention efforts.
exampleTranslation: 自殺是一個嚴重的公共衛生問題，需要關注和預防措施。

meaning: 一套西裝（通常指商務服裝）；符合需求或適合作某種目的。
exampleSentence: He wore a dark blue suit for the important business meeting.
exampleTranslation: 他在重要的商務會議上穿了一套深藍色的西裝。

meaning: 適當的；合適的；適合的
exampleSentence: The candidate's skills and experience are highly suitable for this position.
exampleTranslation: 這位候選人的技能和經驗非常適合這個職位。

meaning: 行李箱；手提箱（通常用於旅行或短途差旅）
exampleSentence: Please check your suitcase for any prohibited items before boarding.
exampleTranslation: 請在登機前檢查您的行李箱，確認沒有任何禁止物品。

meaning: 套房；一系列相關的物品或服務的組合
exampleSentence: Our hotel offers luxurious suites with stunning city views.
exampleTranslation: 我們飯店提供豪華套房，享有迷人的城市景觀。

meaning: 適當的；合適的；符合需求的
exampleSentence: This software is perfectly suited for managing large datasets.
exampleTranslation: 這款軟體非常適合管理大型數據集。

meaning: 總數；加總結果
exampleSentence: The accounting department needs to calculate the sum of all expenses for the quarter.
exampleTranslation: 會計部門需要計算該季的所有費用總數。

meaning: 概括；簡要說明；總結
exampleSentence: Could you please summarize the key findings of the market research report?
exampleTranslation: 您能請您總結一下市場調查報告的重點發現嗎？

meaning: 概括；簡述；總結
exampleSentence: The executive assistant summarizes the meeting minutes for the CEO.
exampleTranslation: 行政助理為 CEO 總結會議記錄。

meaning: 簡要回顧；摘要；總結
exampleSentence: Could you please provide a summary of the meeting's key decisions?
exampleTranslation: 您能請提供會議重點決定的摘要嗎？

meaning: 夏季；暑假，指一年中最熱的季節，通常與休假和旅遊相關。
exampleSentence: Our company offers discounted rates for summer travel packages.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司提供夏季旅遊套餐的折扣優惠。

meaning: 峰會；頂點
exampleSentence: The department implemented innovative summit procedures to improve operational efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 部門實施創新的summit程序以提高營運效率。

meaning: 高層會談；峰會（指國家元首或高階官員之間的會晤）
exampleSentence: The leaders of both countries will hold a summit meeting next week to discuss trade agreements.
exampleTranslation: 兩國領導人將於下週舉行高層會談，以討論貿易協定。

meaning: 召喚；傳喚；喚起（某人或某事物）
exampleSentence: The manager needs to summon the team leader for an urgent meeting.
exampleTranslation: 經理需要召喚團隊領導進行一場緊急會議。

meaning: 相撲（日本的一種傳統摔跤運動）
exampleSentence: Sumo is the national sport of Japan.
exampleTranslation: 相撲是日本的國技。

meaning: 太陽；陽光
exampleSentence: The project's outdoor event was postponed due to the forecast of heavy clouds and no sun.
exampleTranslation: 由於預測到陰天且沒有陽光，該專案的戶外活動被延遲。

meaning: 星期日，週日，通常指休息或休假日。
exampleSentence: Our office is closed on Sundays and public holidays.
exampleTranslation: 我們的辦公室在星期日和公共假期休市。

meaning: 太陽眼鏡；遮陽鏡，通常用於保護眼睛免受陽光照射。
exampleSentence: The company provides employees with complimentary sunglasses for outdoor events.
exampleTranslation: 公司為戶外活動提供員工免費太陽眼鏡。

meaning: 陽光；日光，尤其指透過窗戶或建築物進入的光線。
exampleSentence: The office building's design maximizes sunlight to reduce energy consumption.
exampleTranslation: 辦公大樓的設計最大化陽光利用，以減少能源消耗。

meaning: 陽光的；晴朗的
exampleSentence: The sunny weather is perfect for a company picnic in the park.
exampleTranslation: 陽好的天氣非常適合在公園裡舉辦公司野餐。

meaning: 防曬乳；防曬霜；防曬油
exampleSentence: Always apply sunscreen before going out in the sun to protect your skin.
exampleTranslation: 出門曬太陽前務必塗抹防曬乳以保護皮膚。

meaning: 日落；黃昏，指太陽落下地平線時的景象，通常用於描述美景或營造浪漫氛圍。
exampleSentence: The hotel offers stunning sunset views from every room.
exampleTranslation: 這家飯店從每個房間都能欣賞到令人驚嘆的日落景色。

meaning: 太陽光；陽光；晴朗天氣；（指人）開朗快活
exampleSentence: The plants need plenty of sunshine to grow.
exampleTranslation: 植物需要充足的陽光才能生長。

meaning: 極好的；優越的；超出預期的
exampleSentence: The project team delivered a super performance, exceeding all expectations.
exampleTranslation: 專案團隊表現極佳，遠超所有預期。

meaning: 極好的；卓越的；出色的
exampleSentence: The presentation was superb, and the client was very impressed.
exampleTranslation: 簡報非常出色，客戶印象深刻。

meaning: 擁有超凡能力並以保護他人為己任的英雄人物，通常具有正義感和強烈的道德觀。
exampleSentence: Our marketing campaign features a superhero character to symbolize the strength and reliability of our product.
exampleTranslation: 我們的行銷活動以超級英雄人物為主角，象徵我們產品的強大和可靠性。

meaning: 優越的；卓越的；高於其他
exampleSentence: Our company offers superior quality products compared to our competitors.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司的產品品質優於競爭對手。

meaning: 上級主管；領導者
exampleSentence: The employee was instructed to submit the report to his superiors.
exampleTranslation: 員工被指示將報告提交給他的上級主管。

meaning: 超級英雄；（比喻）極具能力或表現優異的人
exampleSentence: Our top salesperson is often referred to as a 'superman' due to his ability to close deals consistently.
exampleTranslation: 我們最優秀的銷售人員經常被稱為「超級英雄」，因為他能持續穩定地完成交易。

meaning: 大型超市，通常提供廣泛的商品，包括食品、日用品等，是企業採購或員工購物的重要場所。
exampleSentence: Our company has negotiated a bulk discount with the local supermarket for office supplies.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司已與當地超市協商辦公用品的批量折扣。

meaning: 超集 (在數學和電腦科學中，一個包含另一個集合所有元素的集合)
exampleSentence: In set theory, set A is a superset of set B if all elements of B are also elements of A.
exampleTranslation: 在集合論中，如果集合 B 的所有元素也是集合 A 的元素，那麼集合 A 是集合 B 的超集。

meaning: 監督；監控；指導（工作或活動）
exampleSentence: The project manager will supervise the team's progress and ensure deadlines are met.
exampleTranslation: 專案經理將監督團隊的進度，並確保期限能夠達成。

meaning: 監督；監控；由...監督
exampleSentence: New employees are supervised closely during their training period.
exampleTranslation: 新進員工在培訓期間受到密切監督。

meaning: 監督；指導；監控（通常指對工作或員工的監督）
exampleSentence: The project manager is responsible for the supervision of the entire team.
exampleTranslation: 專案經理負責監督整個團隊的工作。

meaning: 負責監督、指導下屬工作並確保任務達成的管理人員
exampleSentence: The project supervisor will review the team's progress every Friday.
exampleTranslation: 專案主管將於每週五檢查團隊的進度。

meaning: 主管；監督者（通常指負責管理下屬的管理者）
exampleSentence: All supervisors are required to attend the annual management training program.
exampleTranslation: 所有主管都必須參加年度管理培訓課程。

meaning: 主管的；監督的；負責監督的
exampleSentence: The supervisory staff is responsible for training new employees.
exampleTranslation: 主管人員負責培訓新進員工。

meaning: 仰臥的；面朝上的；（喻）不抵抗的，消極的，順從的
exampleSentence: The patient was asked to lie in a supine position for the examination.
exampleTranslation: 病人被要求仰臥以便檢查。

meaning: 補充品；附加物；（用於）補充、增強
exampleSentence: The company offers health supplements to its employees as part of their wellness program.
exampleTranslation: 公司將保健品作為員工健康計畫的一部分提供給員工。

meaning: 補充性的；額外的（通常指用於增強或支持主要內容的材料或資源）
exampleSentence: The company provided supplemental training materials to help employees prepare for the certification exam.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供了補充性的培訓材料，以幫助員工準備認證考試。

meaning: 額外的；補充性的；作為補充的
exampleSentence: The company provided supplementary training materials to help employees understand the new software.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供了額外的培訓材料，以幫助員工了解新的軟體。

meaning: 補充，增補（指補充的行為或過程）
exampleSentence: The report recommended dietary supplementation for improved health.
exampleTranslation: 該報告建議飲食補充以改善健康。

meaning: 供應；提供（資源、資訊等）
exampleSentence: The company is supplied with raw materials from overseas.
exampleTranslation: 該公司從海外獲得原材料供應。

meaning: 供應商，提供商品或服務的廠商
exampleSentence: Our company is seeking reliable suppliers for raw materials.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在尋找可靠的原材料供應商。

meaning: 供應商；提供商品或服務的廠商
exampleSentence: We are currently seeking new suppliers for raw materials to reduce costs.
exampleTranslation: 我們目前正在尋找新的原材料供應商以降低成本。

meaning: 物資、供應品；（尤指辦公室）用品
exampleSentence: The office manager is responsible for ordering stationery supplies.
exampleTranslation: 辦公室經理負責訂購文具用品。

meaning: 供應；提供；供給
exampleSentence: The company needs to secure a reliable supply of raw materials to meet the increasing demand.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要確保穩定的原材料供應，以滿足不斷增長的需求。

meaning: 供應鏈：指從原材料採購到最終產品交付給客戶的整個流程，包含所有參與的機構和活動。
exampleSentence: The company is working to optimize its supply chain to reduce costs and improve efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正致力於優化其供應鏈，以降低成本並提高效率。

meaning: 支援；提供協助；贊助；維持（運作）
exampleSentence: The company provides technical support to its clients 24/7.
exampleTranslation: 該公司為客戶提供全天候的技術支援。

meaning: 支持；贊助；維持；供應
exampleSentence: The company's marketing budget is supported by increased sales revenue.
exampleTranslation: 公司的行銷預算由增加的銷售收入所支持。

meaning: 支持者
exampleSentence: The department implemented innovative supporter procedures to improve operational efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 部門實施創新的supporter程序以提高營運效率。

meaning: 支持者；擁護者（通常指對某組織、產品或理念提供支持的人）
exampleSentence: The company is launching a loyalty program to attract and retain supporters.
exampleTranslation: 該公司正在推出忠誠度計畫，以吸引和留住支持者。

meaning: 支持；資助；維持
exampleSentence: The company is supporting a local charity with a significant donation.
exampleTranslation: 該公司以一筆可觀的捐款支持當地慈善機構。

meaning: 假設；認為；猜測
exampleSentence: I suppose we should start the meeting on time.
exampleTranslation: 我猜我們應該準時開始會議。

meaning: 據說；本來應該；預期
exampleSentence: The meeting was supposed to start at 2:00 PM, but it was delayed.
exampleTranslation: 會議本來預計在下午 2:00 開始，但卻延遲了。

meaning: 據說; 據稱; 想必
exampleSentence: He supposedly won a large sum of money in the lottery.
exampleTranslation: 據說他在樂透中贏得了一大筆錢。

meaning: 抑制；壓制；阻止（某事物出現或被表達）
exampleSentence: The company decided to suppress the negative press coverage to protect its reputation.
exampleTranslation: 為了保護公司聲譽，公司決定壓制負面新聞報導。

meaning: 至高無上的；頂級的；卓越的
exampleSentence: The company aims to offer supreme quality products to maintain its market leadership.
exampleTranslation: 該公司旨在提供頂級品質的產品，以維持其市場領導地位。

meaning: 確定的；確信的；當然的
exampleSentence: Are you sure about the delivery date?
exampleTranslation: 您確定交貨日期嗎？

meaning: 當然；肯定地；毫無疑問地
exampleSentence: Surely, you're aware of the new company policy regarding overtime.
exampleTranslation: 您肯定知道關於加班的新公司政策，對吧？

meaning: 衝浪；瀏覽、搜尋 (網路資訊)
exampleSentence: They went to the beach to surf on their vacation.
exampleTranslation: 他們假期去了海灘衝浪。

meaning: 表面；外觀；範圍
exampleSentence: The report indicates a significant increase in sales on the retail surface.
exampleTranslation: 報告顯示零售市場上的銷售額大幅增加。

meaning: 表面；外觀；（電腦）介面
exampleSentence: The technician needs to clean the display surfaces of the monitors before the presentation.
exampleTranslation: 在簡報前，技術人員需要清潔螢幕的顯示表面。

meaning: 急劇上升；湧現（指數量、價格等），通常指短時間內出現的顯著增長。
exampleSentence: The company experienced a surge in sales after the product launch.
exampleTranslation: 產品上市後，公司經歷了銷售額的急劇上升。

meaning: 外科醫生
exampleSentence: The surgeon successfully performed a complex heart operation.
exampleTranslation: 這位外科醫生成功地完成了一項複雜的心臟手術。

meaning: 外科手術；手術過程
exampleSentence: The company's health insurance plan covers major surgeries.
exampleTranslation: 公司的健康保險計劃涵蓋了重大手術。

meaning: 外科的；手術的
exampleSentence: The patient required urgent surgical intervention.
exampleTranslation: 病患需要緊急的外科手術介入。

meaning: 超越；勝過；超出（某標準或期望）
exampleSentence: Our sales figures for this quarter surpassed all previous records.
exampleTranslation: 我們本季的銷售額超越了所有之前的紀錄。

meaning: 剩餘；盈餘；超出額度
exampleSentence: The company reported a significant surplus at the end of the fiscal year.
exampleTranslation: 該公司在財政年度結束時報告了顯著的盈餘。

meaning: 驚訝；出乎意料
exampleSentence: The unexpected announcement of the merger came as a surprise to all employees.
exampleTranslation: 併購的意外公告讓所有員工都感到驚訝。

meaning: 感到驚訝或意外，通常指對出乎意料的情況產生反應。
exampleSentence: The project manager was surprised by the sudden increase in material costs.
exampleTranslation: 專案經理對於材料成本突然增加感到意外。

meaning: 令人驚訝的；出乎意料的
exampleSentence: The company announced surprisingly high profits despite the economic downturn.
exampleTranslation: 儘管經濟衰退，公司宣布了令人驚訝的高利潤。

meaning: 出乎意料地；令人驚訝地（用於強調結果或情況與預期不同）
exampleSentence: Surprisingly, the project was completed ahead of schedule and under budget.
exampleTranslation: 出乎意料的是，這個專案在預定時間之前且在預算內完成。

meaning: 放棄；交出（權利、控制權等）；投降
exampleSentence: The company decided to surrender the contract due to unforeseen financial difficulties.
exampleTranslation: 由於突如其來的財務困難，公司決定放棄這份合約。

meaning: 環繞；包圍；使…充滿
exampleSentence: The office building is surrounded by lush greenery, creating a peaceful atmosphere.
exampleTranslation: 辦公大樓被茂密的綠植環繞，營造出寧靜的氛圍。

meaning: 環繞；被…包圍
exampleSentence: The office building is surrounded by a beautiful park, providing a relaxing atmosphere for employees.
exampleTranslation: 辦公大樓被美麗的公園環繞，為員工提供放鬆的環境。

meaning: 周遭環境；周圍事物
exampleSentence: The office building is located in a bustling business district, surrounded by numerous restaurants and shops.
exampleTranslation: 這棟辦公大樓位於繁華的商業區，周圍環繞著眾多餐廳和商店。

meaning: 周遭環境；周圍事物
exampleSentence: The office building's surroundings are being landscaped to create a more welcoming atmosphere.
exampleTranslation: 辦公大樓的周遭環境正在進行綠化，以營造更具吸引力的氛圍。

meaning: 監控；監視（通常指使用技術或人員進行持續觀察）
exampleSentence: The company implemented 24-hour surveillance of the warehouse to prevent theft.
exampleTranslation: 為了防止盜竊，公司對倉庫實施了 24 小時監控。

meaning: 調查；意見調查（通常用於收集數據和分析結果）
exampleSentence: The marketing team conducted a customer satisfaction survey to identify areas for improvement.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊進行了一項客戶滿意度調查，以找出需要改進的領域。

meaning: 調查；問卷調查
exampleSentence: The marketing team conducted surveys to gauge customer satisfaction with the new product.
exampleTranslation: 行銷團隊進行了問卷調查，以評估客戶對新產品的滿意度。

meaning: 存活；生存；倖存；殘存
exampleSentence: The company's survival depends on its ability to adapt to new market conditions.
exampleTranslation: 公司的生存取決於其適應新市場條件的能力。

meaning: 生存；經受住；倖免於難
exampleSentence: The company needs to find ways to survive the economic downturn.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要找到方法來度過經濟衰退。

meaning: 易受影響的；容易遭受的（通常指對某種情況或疾病的易感性）
exampleSentence: The company is susceptible to market fluctuations due to its reliance on a single supplier.
exampleTranslation: 由於公司過度依賴單一供應商，使其容易受到市場波動的影響。

meaning: 懷疑；嫌疑犯；認為…可能
exampleSentence: The security team is investigating a suspect in connection with the data breach.
exampleTranslation: 安全團隊正在調查與資料外洩有關的嫌疑人。

meaning: 暫停、中止（某項活動或服務），通常是為了調查或解決問題。
exampleSentence: The company decided to suspend operations temporarily due to the ongoing supply chain disruptions.
exampleTranslation: 由於持續供應鏈中斷，公司決定暫停營運。

meaning: 懷疑；嫌疑；疑心
exampleSentence: Her sudden departure aroused suspicion among her colleagues.
exampleTranslation: 她突然的離開引起了同事們的懷疑。

meaning: 懷疑的；引起疑慮的；可疑的
exampleSentence: The auditor found several suspicious transactions that required further investigation.
exampleTranslation: 審計員發現幾個可疑的交易，需要進一步調查。

meaning: 維持、支撐、承擔（費用、壓力等）；使持續存在
exampleSentence: The company needs to find ways to sustain its growth in the face of increasing competition.
exampleTranslation: 公司需要在日益激烈的競爭中尋找維持增長的途徑。

meaning: 可持續性
exampleSentence: The department implemented innovative sustainability procedures to improve operational efficiency.
exampleTranslation: 部門實施創新的sustainability程序以提高營運效率。

meaning: 可持續的；能夠長期維持的，尤其指環境、經濟或社會效益。
exampleSentence: Our company is committed to implementing sustainable business practices to reduce our environmental impact.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司致力於實施可持續的商業慣例，以減少對環境的影響。

meaning: 持續的；維持的；長期的
exampleSentence: The company's sustained growth over the past five years is a testament to its strong business strategy.
exampleTranslation: 公司過去五年持續的增長，證明了其強大的商業策略。

meaning: 運動型多功能車 (SUV) 是一種結合了轎車的舒適性和休旅車的載貨能力的車輛。
exampleSentence: The company is considering purchasing a fleet of SUVs for its sales team to improve their mobility in various terrains.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在考慮為銷售團隊購買一批 SUV，以提高他們在各種地形中的機動性。

meaning: 吞下；(尤指鳥類) 吞食
exampleSentence: The factory needs to swallow the increased production costs to remain competitive.
exampleTranslation: 為了保持競爭力，工廠需要吸收增加的生產成本。

meaning: 交換；互換
exampleSentence: Let's swap schedules to cover for each other's absence.
exampleTranslation: 我們交換排班，互相照應彼此的缺席。

meaning: 影響；說服；搖擺；支配
exampleSentence: His arguments failed to sway the jury.
exampleTranslation: 他的論點未能動搖陪審團。

meaning: 發誓；宣誓；（表示強烈的情緒或確認）強調
exampleSentence: I swear, the project deadline is unrealistic given the current workload.
exampleTranslation: 我發誓，考慮到目前的工作量，這個專案的截止日期是不切實際的。

meaning: （因緊張、勞累等）流汗；（比喻）費力、辛勞
exampleSentence: He was sweating profusely during the presentation due to nervousness.
exampleTranslation: 他因為緊張，在簡報時流了許多汗。

meaning: 毛衣；針織衫（通常指保暖的衣物）
exampleSentence: The office dress code allows employees to wear sweaters during the winter months.
exampleTranslation: 辦公室的著裝規定允許員工在冬季穿著毛衣。

meaning: 滿身大汗的；出汗的；費力的
exampleSentence: After jogging for an hour, I was hot and sweaty.
exampleTranslation: 慢跑一小時後，我又熱又滿身大汗。

meaning: 瑞典，瑞典國，指位於北歐的國家。
exampleSentence: Our company is exploring potential partnerships with businesses in Sweden.
exampleTranslation: 我們公司正在探討與瑞典企業建立合作夥伴關係的可能性。

meaning: 掃描；清除；（廣泛意義上）瀏覽、檢閱
exampleSentence: The cleaning staff is responsible for sweeping the office floors every evening.
exampleTranslation: 清潔人員每天晚上負責掃地。

meaning: 清掃落葉；將落葉掃除
exampleSentence: The groundskeeper is responsible for sweeping the leaves from the walkways every autumn.
exampleTranslation: 園丁負責每個秋天將落葉從人行道上掃除。

meaning: 徹底的；全面的；大規模的（指範圍或程度）
exampleSentence: The company is implementing sweeping changes to its organizational structure.
exampleTranslation: 公司正在對其組織結構進行大規模的變革。

meaning: 甜美的；令人愉悅的；（指產品）含糖量高的
exampleSentence: The hotel offers a sweet selection of pastries and desserts for breakfast.
exampleTranslation: 這家飯店早餐提供多種甜點和甜食，令人愉悅。

meaning: 膨脹；增長（尤指數量或程度）；湧現
exampleSentence: The company expects sales to swell during the holiday season.
exampleTranslation: 公司預期在假期期間銷售額將大幅增長。

meaning: 「swerzky」並非標準英語詞彙，可能為拼寫錯誤或罕見的口語詞彙。由於其缺乏明確定義，以下提供基於可能拼寫錯誤的假設性定義和範例。
exampleSentence: The manager asked for a quick swerzky on the project's current status.
exampleTranslation: 經理要求快速瞭解專案的目前進度。

meaning: 迅速地；快速地（表示動作或發生快速且流暢）
exampleSentence: The report was completed and submitted swiftly to meet the deadline.
exampleTranslation: 為了趕上截止日期，報告迅速地完成並提交了。

meaning: 游泳；在水中前進
exampleSentence: The company offers wellness programs that include swimming lessons for employees.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供健康計畫，其中包含員工游泳課程。

meaning: 游泳；水域活動
exampleSentence: The company offers wellness programs that include swimming lessons for employees.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供健康計畫，其中包含員工游泳課程。

meaning: 搖晃；擺動；鞦韆
exampleSentence: The company is trying to swing a deal with a major supplier to reduce costs.
exampleTranslation: 公司正試圖與主要供應商達成協議以降低成本。

meaning: 切換；轉換；開關
exampleSentence: Could you switch the projector to presentation mode, please?
exampleTranslation: 請問您能將投影機切換到簡報模式嗎？

meaning: 將 A 轉換為 B；將設定從 A 更改為 B；切換到 B
exampleSentence: Please switch the server from the development environment to the production environment.
exampleTranslation: 請將伺服器從開發環境切換到生產環境。

meaning: 關閉（設備、燈具等），停止運作
exampleSentence: Please switch off your mobile phones during the presentation to avoid any distractions.
exampleTranslation: 為了避免任何干擾，請在簡報期間關閉您的手機。

meaning: 開啟；啟動（設備、機器等）
exampleSentence: Please switch on the projector before the presentation begins.
exampleTranslation: 請在簡報開始前開啟投影機。

meaning: 切換；轉換（系統、流程、或功能等）
exampleSentence: The IT department is switching over to a new server system next week.
exampleTranslation: 資訊部門下週將會切換到新的伺服器系統。

meaning: 劍
exampleSentence: The knight drew his sword to defend the princess.
exampleTranslation: 騎士拔出他的劍來保護公主。

meaning: 音節
exampleSentence: The word 'apple' has two syllables: ap-ple.
exampleTranslation: 「apple」這個詞有兩個音節：ap-ple。

meaning: 課程大綱；教學大綱；摘要
exampleSentence: The professor handed out the syllabus on the first day of class, outlining the course schedule and grading criteria.
exampleTranslation: 教授在第一堂課發了課程大綱，概述了課程時間表和評分標準。

meaning: 符號；象徵（用來代表某事物或概念的圖案、標誌或信號）
exampleSentence: The company's logo is a powerful symbol of its brand identity.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的標誌是其品牌形象的有力象徵。

meaning: 象徵性的；代表的
exampleSentence: The dove is symbolic of peace.
exampleTranslation: 鴿子象徵和平。

meaning: 象徵、代表（某種意義或概念）
exampleSentence: The company logo symbolizes its commitment to quality and innovation.
exampleTranslation: 該公司的標誌象徵著其對品質和創新的承諾。

meaning: 對稱地；以對稱的方式
exampleSentence: The company arranged the seating symmetrically around the conference table to ensure fairness.
exampleTranslation: 為了確保公平，公司將座位圍繞會議桌對稱地安排。

meaning: 同情、理解並感受到他人的感受，尤其是在困難或不幸的情況下。
exampleSentence: I sympathize with your situation; let's see how we can assist you.
exampleTranslation: 我理解你的處境，讓我們看看我們如何幫助你。

meaning: 同情；同感；慰問
